tours.name: Keukenhof, Tulip Farm, Flower Fields & Delft City
tours.description:
Keukenhof, Tulip Farm, Flower Fields & Delft City

This wonderful seasonal tour covers two magnificent Dutch highlights in one day! Wander through the world’s largest flower garden the ‘Keukenhof’ and surround yourself in old world charm as you walk with your guide through the cobblestone streets of historic Delft.

Price

1 Person (Ages 7+) €540
2 People (Ages 7+) €590
3 People (Ages 7+) €660
4 People (Ages 7+) €690
5 People (Ages 7+) €740
6 People (Ages 7+) €790

Tour duration

7 hours

Keukenhof

The Keukenhof is world renowned and the largest flower park in the world. Enjoy dazzling displays of tulips, hyacinths, daffodils, orchids, roses, carnations, irises, lilies and many other flowers. This incredible flower extravaganza attracts visitors from all over the globe.

Delft

Get a taste of old-world charm as you wander around historic Delft. Walk with your guide through cobblestone streets lined with quaint houses, canals, and historic churches. Picture perfect Delft is known for the painter Johannes Vermeer, William of Orange and last but not least Delft's world famous earthenware 'Delft Blue'.

Meet & Connect 

All our tours begin with getting to know our guests and understanding their wishes. The itinerary is flexible and we can add special requests and will not rush you around. Starting from your hotel or vacation address, your private guide will pick you up with our comfortable car to start this beautiful day.

About:

At our life art drawing class, we will give you a short talk on the history of life art and will show you examples of the different kinds of work, both realist and impressionist, that characterize this fascinating artistic discipline. You will be shown several different techniques, including how to invoke a sense of scale and motion. We will provide painting materials and a model for you to draw, giving you an amazing opportunity to capture the essence of a real art model.

tours.name: Amsterdam Highlights - City Walking Tour
tours.description:
Amsterdam City Highlights Tour: 2,5 hrs
Overview:
On this historic walking tour we'll learn about the stories and events that shaped the city's unique character. We’ll delve into the humble beginning of the city, explore 'old Amsterdam,' embark on a historical voyage with the VOC, and uncover the city's progressive past. Discovering hidden gems, we’ll stroll along some of Amsterdam's 100 km of canals, and cover the story of one of the most well-known figures from history, Anne Frank.

This tour provides a comprehensive overview of Amsterdam's rich history, from its humble beginnings to its role as a global trade hub and its enduring legacy as a city of freedom and culture.

tours.name: Day Tour to Köln from Amsterdam
tours.description:
Set off on an exciting journey that begins and ends in Amsterdam, taking you to one of Europe’s most captivating cities: Cologne. This unique tour blends history, culture, and architecture into a single day.

Your first destination is Cologne, one of Germany’s oldest cities, nestled on the banks of the Rhine. Behold the majestic Kölner Dom, an UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of Europe’s finest examples of Gothic architecture. Explore the Old Town, where cobblestone streets and historic façades transport you back in time. Don’t miss the impressive St. Martin’s Church, a beautiful Romanesque landmark. Then, take a scenic walk across the Hohenzollern Bridge, famous for its love locks and panoramic views of the cathedral and the river. Before continuing your journey, enjoy free time in Freedom Square, where you can sample local delicacies or simply soak up the vibrant atmosphere.

After a day filled with remarkable sights and cultural richness, return to Amsterdam with memories of your journey through Germany.

What's included
Round-trip transportation by bus from Amsterdam.
Bilingual professional guide.
What's not included
Lunch
Hotel Pick up and Drop off
Itinerary

tours.name: Highlights of Amsterdam Cruise  - Departure Herengracht 128 on boat Stan Huygens
tours.description:
Discover the highlights of Amsterdam the local way!

What better way to finish your morning in Amsterdam with a combination of the two on this 1,5hr highlights of Amsterdam cruise of the canals. Your captain will welcome you aboard with a serving of apple pie (with optional whipped cream!), and a drink of your choice. During the cruise your captain/host will show you the highlights of the Amsterdam canals, including the 17th century canal belt, Jordaan area, Amstel river among our other favourite spots. During the cruise we’ll pause for a few minutes to offer you a second drink.

This cruise is perfect for all ages, and includes a 90min small group tour (max. 24 guests), a slice of apple pie and 2 drinks. The tour is €47,50 per adult, and available for €30 for kids under 14.

tours.name: Knitted Handbag Workshop
tours.description:
The chunky knit is back and this time we're getting our hands involved! In just two hours at our Craft Café you will learn the simple technique of knitting with your hands and skip home with a cute, statement handbag.

The workshop will show you how to build your bag in just a few simple steps. Included is a ball of Scheepjes Cool Stuff Yarn (of which there are a variety of colours to choose from) and a pattern just in case you want to make this bag again.

So get a group of friends together and come and make this year's sweetest bag of the season!

*Do you want to continue knitting at home after the course, but still need some guidance every now and then? Simply book a slot in our Craft Café.

Address: Van der Hoopstraat 70HS, 1051 VK, Amsterdam

tours.name: Beginner Crochet Workshop: Bandana
tours.description:
If you've been dreaming about diving into the world of crochet but haven't yet had the chance, then this is a great workshop for you! With this package you will learn the basics of crochet while making your own bandana in 2 x 2 hour sessions in our Craft Café. You can choose to include your materials in your booking - we have a selection of yarn colours for you to choose from in our craft store - or buy your own before the lesson. And if you'd like to continue your crocheting journey at home, you can always buy more yarn and hooks from us!

What you will learn:

• chain stitch, single crochet stitch
• how to increase
• how to make straps
• how to start and end your work

Highlights

• Learn the basics of crocheting
• Learn to set up and finish your work
• Go home with your own bandana
• Guidance by a crochet expert

tours.name: Canal Cruise and Museum Rembrandthuis Combination Ticket
tours.description:
Discover Amsterdam from two perspectives with this combination ticket: a scenic canal cruise and entry to the Rembrandt House Museum.

Start your experience on the water with a relaxing 1-hour open boat cruise through the city’s historic canals. Sail past iconic sights and enjoy the atmosphere of Amsterdam from a comfortable Flagship boat, with live commentary from your skipper and host. Drinks are available for purchase on board.

After your cruise, head to the Rembrandt House Museum, located in the original 17th-century townhouse where the artist lived and worked for nearly 20 years. With a multimedia guide, explore Rembrandt’s studio, view his etchings and drawings, and get an authentic impression of his daily life and creative process.

This combination offers the perfect mix of culture and relaxation: experience Amsterdam’s charm from

tours.description:
Private Food & Red Light Tour – Real Amsterdam in 3 Hours

🍟 Dutch Bites | 🍷 Drinks | 🚶‍♂️ Private Guide | ❤️ Stories from Spui to the Red Light

Overview

This is not your average food tour. This is Real Amsterdam — with a full plate and a side of spicy stories.

On this 3-hour private walking experience, we guide you through cozy brown cafés, Surinamese snack spots, historic spice alleys, and cheeky corners of the Red Light District. About

Ditch the typical team dinner and connect over food, laughter, and local flavor. On this private corporate food tour, your group will explore three of Amsterdam’s most iconic neighborhoods — Spui, the UNESCO canals, and the Jordaan — while enjoying 10+ tastings at 5+ authentic stops.

Led by your own expert local host, you’ll share stories and bites from a 200-year-old stroopwafel bakery, a canal-house cheese cellar, and family-run brown cafés — the kind of places locals actually love. Between tastings, your guide weaves in quirky history and fun challenges that turn colleagues into teammates.

It’s the perfect way to reward your staff, welcome international guests, or kick off your company offsite — relaxed, interactive, and full of personality.

tours.name: Combo: Van Gogh Museum + Red Light District Guided Tour - Semi-Private (ENGLISH)
tours.description:
Vincent Van Gogh wasn’t shy about indulging in a few dark pleasures, and after this tour, you’ll understand why. We will trace some of those vices in an engaging and – hopefully – dignified manner on this 5 to 5.5 hour, semi-private tour. Skip the line with our guides who will provide tickets that are valid for the whole day. We designed this tour for first-time visitors to learn about the relationship between the artist and Amsterdam’s iconic Red Light District, a relationship that resulted in Van Gogh painting a few scandalous works of art.

You’ve probably heard about one of the world’s most famous painters, Vincent Van Gogh. But what do you actually know about this Dutch artist? We’ll introduce you to the man behind the famous sunflowers and self-portraits on this intimate, small group tour. Learn about him through his iconic paintings of people eating potatoes and of his own bedroom, or maybe his “Wheat field with Crows” or “Yellow House.” We will visit the world’s largest collection of Van Gogh’s works to learn about his turbulent life stretching from his days in Holland to his dramatic ending in France. And yes, don’t worry, we’ll discuss that whole ear incident.

Then after a break for lunch, we’ll keep it as dignified and serious as possible as we discuss the legal drug vendors, the leather neighborhood, and the smoky “coffee shops” that attract people from around the world. Cast away your guilt and judgement, and let’s discuss the etiquette and laws that will allow you to appreciate this district to its fullest after the tour. Our professional guides will lead you through the salacious streets and coffee shops of the Red Light District, following in the footsteps of Van Gogh himself.

Historic Bruges is one of Europe's most charming cities!
Duration

11 Hours

About

History
Historic Bruges is one of Europe's most charming cities. Bruges has most of its medieval architecture intact, making it one of the most well-preserved medieval towns in Europe. Packed with picturesque alleys and ancient churches, the entire medieval city center is an UNESCO World Heritage site since 2000.

More…

Bruges is forever in competition with Amsterdam and Stockholm for the title of the '' Venice of the North '', as there are so many opulent mansions and characteristic old houses located along its canals. Explore the city from the water on a canal cruise or get the 13th-century feeling while wandering around in the historical city center.

Bruges is also well known for its local beers, lace and chocolate making, all of which you can enjoy in numerous inns and artisanal shops.

By private Minivan or Minibus

You will drive to Bruges with a comfortable Mercedes Benz minivan up to 7 people or a Mercedes Benz Minibus up to 19 people.

Our vehicles are equipped with any comfort as air conditioning, tinted windows, USB phone connections and free bottles of water for the passengers.

tours.name: Shared Off The Beaten Path, Hidden Gems Canal Cruise
tours.description:
Drift different through Amsterdam's hidden canals with local captains who were born here. While other boats pack 50+ people with megaphones, we keep it small and real. Your captains Jannah & Beer know which bridge lights up best, where locals drink coffee, and have real stories from growing up on these waters.

We skip tourist traps for secret spots where Amsterdam actually lives. You'll see quiet canals, local hangouts, and hidden corners that even many locals forget exist. This isn't a museum boat - it's like floating through Amsterdam in your friend's living room.

Come as you are, kick off shoes, grab blankets, and help yourself to drinks. Amsterdam moves fast. We move at water speed. No rush, no stress - just good people, calm water, and authentic connections. Small groups mean you can actually chat and ask questions.

No fixed script, no Heineken hats, no loud music. Just effortless vibes that feel cool without trying too hard. You'll get a Polaroid and our insider map to remember floating through Amsterdam like locals do. Perfect for conscious travelers who want authenticity over luxury.
Welcome aboard. Or as we like to say, welcome home!

What's included
90-minute shared canal cruise
Small group experience (max 6

tours.name: Improv Spectacular | The Famous Boom Chicago Comedy Show
tours.description:
Enjoy 30 years of Boom comedy innovation in one show! This fast-paced funny night features our top cast making you (and themselves) laugh while waiters bring drinks to your table. The evening starts with short-form improv and games with rules, bells, and lots of audience suggestions. We need a job and a movie-style! Ding. Let’s go!

Then after a break, our long-form improvisation creates a whole new world of characters, scenes, and funny situations based on stories inspired by just one word. You will be amazed! After the show, on many nights we present a free third act where we test new material for our new show. Bring your friends and enjoy a great night at Boom Chicago! Ding ding ding!

tours.name: Tour em Português pelo Centro Histórico de Amsterdam | Dam, Bairro Judeu e Mercado das Flores
tours.description:
Você sabia que essa cidade europeia começou sendo um pequeno povoado de pescadores nas margens do rio Amstel e hoje em dia é uma das mais importantes cidades comerciais da Europa?

Começaremos caminhando pelo centro histórico e chegaremos à Praça Dam, onde faremos uma introdução da história de Amsterdam e dos vários acontecimentos históricos que presenciou, desde o domínio espanhol, passando pelo francês e, mais tarde, pelo alemão.

Também passaremos pelo bairro judeu da cidade, o Museu Rembrandt e o Mercado Waterlooplein, o maior e mais antigo mercado das pulgas da cidade. Artesanato, roupas, lembranças e muito mais. Você vai resistir?

Além da parte histórica, também veremos mais sobre o dia-a-dia dos moradores da cidade passeando pelo Mercado das Flores, um dos lugares mais icônicos de Amsterdam.

Finalmente, iremos à loja Cheese & More Flower Market para fazer uma degustação de queijos holandeses. O final perfeito para o tour!

O que está incluído

Guia de língua portuguesa.
Degustação de queijos típicos holandeses.

tours.description: Unleash your warrior spirit with thrilling axe throwing, then bounce, bump, and laugh in hilarious bubble football. Two hours of action, skill, and nonstop fun for groups of all sizes in Amsterdam.

tours.name: Bubble Football & Dodgebee
tours.description: Jump into fast-paced Dodgebee and Bubble Football, where agility, strategy, and laughter collide. Dodge, dodge, and bump your way through fun-filled matches that create unforgettable memories for any group.

tours.name: Bubble Football & Highland Games
tours.description: Unleash your competitive side with Highland Games—try caber toss, axe throwing, archery, and tug-of-war—then bounce into Bubble Football for hilarious, bump-filled fun. Perfect for groups seeking adventure and laughter.

tours.name: Historisch Delftsche Top Tour
tours.description: Experience an unforgettable afternoon in Delft, blending history, culture, and local flavors. Enjoy a relaxing canal cruise with a goodie bag and expert guide, visit the iconic Nieuwe and Oude Churches, and conclude with a delightful beer tasting in the city's oldest beer cellar. A perfect mix of exploration and enjoyment!

tours.name: Undine - the luxury saloon boat of Amsterdam
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam's canals aboard a classic saloon boat, guided by a knowledgeable captain. Enjoy a welcome drink as you soak in the city's history, with options for indoor and outdoor seating. This unique cruise adapts to any weather, ensuring a memorable journey for up to eight guests.

tours.name: Dutch Food Tours - English
tours.description: Embark on a delightful food tour through the city's charming center, savoring Dutch delicacies at vibrant shops and stalls. Experience the unique flavors of traditional treats like croquettes, seasonal specialties, and end with a refreshing Dutch drink. This two-and-a-half-hour walking adventure is perfect for guests and employees alike!

tours.name: Gouda Tour + Cheese Tasting
tours.description: Stroll through historic Gouda on a private 1.5-hour walk, then savor authentic Gouda cheese paired with a refreshing drink—an unforgettable taste of Dutch tradition.

tours.name: Private saloon boat experience
tours.description: Experience the enchanting canals of Amsterdam on a private 2-hour cruise aboard a charming electric boat. With up to 6 guests, enjoy personalized storytelling from your captain, savor delicious Dutch snacks, and indulge in unlimited drinks. This intimate journey is perfect for celebrations, creating unforgettable memories in a stunning setting.

tours.name: BBQ boot
tours.description: Sail through Bergen’s polders and historic bunkers, then glide into Alkmaar’s charming canals. While we cruise, enjoy a sizzling BBQ and breathtaking scenery on this unforgettable boat adventure.

tours.name: Waddenhuus 20 personen, incl. Boeibad
tours.description: Experience a spacious retreat by the Wadden Sea, perfect for families. With two connected homes featuring multiple kitchens, living areas, and a private terrace, enjoy comfort and convenience. Explore unique activities like mudflat hiking and shrimp fishing, all while surrounded by a large playground and stunning natural beauty.

tours.name: Waddenhuus 10 personen, incl. Boeibad
tours.description: Experience a cozy getaway at a fully-equipped holiday home by the Wadden Sea, perfect for families. With spacious living areas, four bedrooms, and a private boeibad offering stunning views, relaxation awaits. Enjoy unique activities like mudflat hiking and shrimp fishing, all easily bookable for an unforgettable stay.

tours.name: Waddenhuus 10 personen, incl. sauna & hottub
tours.description: Experience a cozy getaway at a modern holiday home by the Wadden Sea, perfect for families. Accommodating up to 10 guests, it features a private garden, hot tub, and sauna. Enjoy nearby activities like mudflat hiking and shrimp fishing, making your stay both relaxing and adventurous.

tours.name: Rotterdamse Dakentour
tours.description: Climb onto Rotterdam’s rooftops for stunning skyline views and insider stories about innovative, unused flat roofs. Discover how city daken shape Rotterdam’s future with inspiring ideas and hidden urban treasures.

tours.name: Spectacular Evening Cruise (18+) - Departure Keizersgracht 106
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s enchanting evening canals on a boutique boat, savor local cheeses, enjoy seasonal craft beers and fine wines, and unwind in a relaxed, intimate setting with like-minded guests.

tours.name: Zondag High Tea Rondvaart
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s historic canals on a cozy salonboat, indulging in a luxurious high tea with sweet and savory treats, while a friendly guide shares captivating stories of the city’s past.

tours.name: Walking Lunch
tours.description: Stroll through Delft’s charming streets while savoring a delicious lunch, blending sightseeing with tasty bites in a relaxed, memorable experience.

tours.name: Music Dinner Cruise Amsterdam
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals on an elegant boat, enjoy a four-course gourmet dinner with live music, and toast at the iconic Magere Brug for a memorable night of fine dining and scenic storytelling.

tours.name: Luxe erfgoed-grachtencruises
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s historic canals on the elegant salonboot Valentijn, a rare floating monument. Enjoy intimate views of Jordaan, classic bridges, and curated food and drinks in a refined, peaceful setting.

tours.name: The Semi Private Premium Canal Cruise from Hotel De L'Europe
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s historic canals on the elegant Stan Huygens, once Freddy Heineken’s private boat. Enjoy captivating stories, stunning landmarks, and complimentary drinks in a luxurious, semi-private setting.

tours.name: Private Karaoke Bike Amsterdam
tours.description: Sing your heart out on Amsterdam’s only karaoke bike, cruising for 75 minutes with drinks, lively tunes, and fun games. Perfect for parties, birthdays, or just a wild night out on wheels. Make memories you won’t forget.

tours.name: Private Tours
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam or the serene countryside on a personalized private group tour. Tailored to your preferences, this unique adventure allows you to explore at your own pace. Book now to secure your spot and let us help you create unforgettable memories in this beautiful destination.

tours.name: Amsterdam Historical Tour
tours.description: Pedal through Amsterdam’s iconic canals, historic landmarks, and vibrant neighborhoods. Enjoy scenic river views, a park break, and stories from your guide—perfect for all ages and skill levels.

tours.name: Windmills, Clogs & Cheese Tour
tours.description: Pedal along the scenic Amstel River, passing historic Golden Age architecture, windmills, and landmarks. End at a 15th-century farm famous for cheese and clogs—surprisingly close to bustling Amsterdam.

tours.name: 24-Hour Bike Rentals
tours.description: Rent a bike for 24 hours with two locks, a city map, and a refreshing drink. Explore at your own pace, enjoy the freedom, and see the sights with everything you need for a perfect day on two wheels.

tours.name: 48-Hour Bike Rentals
tours.description: Ride through the city for 48 hours with a bike, two locks, a map, and a refreshing drink. Explore at your own pace and enjoy the freedom to uncover hidden gems on your own adventure.

tours.name: Private Cruise | Departure Red Light District
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s scenic canals on a private boat, enjoying personalized service, stunning views, and captivating stories from our friendly skipper. Relax, sip drinks, and uncover hidden city gems.

tours.name: Amsterdam Flower Bike City Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s vibrant neighborhoods on a colorful flower bike, passing historic canals, the Anne Frank House, and lively squares. Hear quirky stories and capture unforgettable photos in just 1.5 hours.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum Special Small Group Tour
tours.description: Join a 90-minute tour at Rijksmuseum and feel the masters’ genius come alive. Walk through history with a passionate guide, witnessing art as if you’re right there with the creators. An unforgettable journey into masterpieces.

tours.name: Amsterdam Sunset Cruise Experience with Live Guide and Open Bar
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals at sunset, with stunning views, a live guide sharing stories, unlimited drinks, and cozy comfort. Perfect for romance, friends, or celebrations—unforgettable moments await.

tours.name: Groepsbezoek (vanaf 15 personen)
tours.description: Step back in time to experience the harrowing yet resilient lives of 1,276 Dutch hostages during World War II. Explore themed spaces that reveal their daily struggles and the looming threats they faced, while discovering how many became pivotal figures in rebuilding the Netherlands after the war.

tours.name: Top 10 Tastes of Amsterdam: Food & Culture Bike Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s charming canals and hidden streets, savoring top Dutch treats like fluffy poffertjes, savory saté, and crispy herring. Enjoy local drinks and stories behind the city’s rich food heritage in just 3 hours.

tours.name: Urban Axe Throwing
tours.description: Unleash your inner Viking at Amsterdam’s only dedicated axe throwing venue. With 5 lanes, interactive games, and live projections, it’s a thrilling, modern twist perfect for friends, parties, or solo fun.

tours.name: FREE Tour storico
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s rich history and vibrant culture on a flexible tour. Walk through iconic sites, learn about its golden age, multicultural vibe, and unique lifestyle—all while discovering hidden gems and local stories.

tours.name: Dinner Cruise - Lunch Cruise - Brunch Cruise Amsterdam
tours.description: Enjoy a cozy 3-hour private boat cruise in Amsterdam with a delicious three-course dinner, stunning illuminated bridges, and a relaxed atmosphere. Perfect for small groups seeking a memorable, scenic dining experience.

tours.name: In the Footsteps of Rembrandt • 1–12 people (minimum charge of 4)
tours.description: Stroll through Rembrandt’s Amsterdam, walking his streets, homes, and hidden corners. Feel the city’s stories of hope, love, and struggle come alive as you see the world that shaped the master himself.

tours.name: Jewish Amsterdam • 1–12 people (minimum charge of 4)
tours.description: Uncover 400 years of Jewish history in Amsterdam’s vibrant quarter, from lively synagogues to hidden gems. Walk through time, hearing stories of heroes, families, and resilience etched into every corner of this storied neighborhood.

tours.name: The Golden Age • 1–12 people (minimum charge of 4)
tours.description: Stroll through 17th-century Amsterdam’s Golden Age, passing grand mansions, hidden courtyards, and lively markets. Hear stories of painters, explorers, and workers, revealing the city’s beauty and hidden struggles.

tours.name: Candlelight Booze Cruise incl. Welcome Liquor & Snack
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s glowing canals on a cozy, illuminated boat. Sip vanilla vodka, enjoy festive lights, and soak in the winter magic—an enchanting hour of warmth, wonder, and city sparkle.

tours.name: Candlelight Cocktail Cruise incl. Welcome Liquor & Snack
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s glowing canals on a cozy, illuminated boat, sipping vanilla vodka and enjoying festive lights, warm blankets, and lively stories—an enchanting winter celebration on water.

tours.name: Candlelight Cruise incl. Bites Box & Snack
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s glowing canals on a cozy, illuminated boat, sipping vanilla vodka and enjoying festive lights, warm blankets, and lively stories—an enchanting winter celebration on water.

tours.name: A taste of Holland
tours.description: Taste the rich history of the Netherlands through its 12 unique provincial foods, uncovering stories of resilience and culture with each bite at a lively canal-side session.

tours.name: Pancake Boat Tour
tours.description: Sail Amsterdam’s canals on a luxurious, handcrafted electric boat. Enjoy stunning views, fascinating stories, and unlimited beer and wine—all in a refined, relaxed setting perfect for couples and small groups.

tours.name: Financial History Tour
tours.description: Step into Amsterdam’s financial past, from the first stock exchange to WWII bank heists. Walk historic streets, visit iconic banks, and uncover how the city shaped modern capitalism in just 2.5 hours.

tours.name: World War II Tour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s WWII history in a 3-hour private walking tour. Explore resistance, collaboration, and royal stories, seeing how the city endured five years of Nazi occupation and its lasting scars today.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum Tour
tours.description: Explore the Rijksmuseum with a private art historian, uncover Dutch Golden Age secrets, meet legendary figures, and see masterpieces by Vermeer, Rembrandt, and Van Gogh—all in 2.5 hours of immersive Dutch history and art.

tours.name: Privé Amsterdam Noord Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam Noord’s vibrant streets, enjoy scenic ferry rides, explore innovative architecture, visit historic sites, and end at the NDSM-werf with street art and graffiti, all on a lively guided bike tour.

tours.name: Amsterdam Walk with Enthusiastic & Fun Guide
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s charming canals, historic streets, and hidden gardens on a lively 3-hour walk. Learn its fascinating history, enjoy fun stories, and snap perfect photos along the way.

tours.name: Stadswandeling Amsterdam Groepstour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s secrets in 3 hours: hidden alleyways, lively stories from locals, iconic sights, and a special treat at the city’s oldest café. Walk, learn, and enjoy the true spirit of the city.

tours.name: Cheese & Wine Cruise
tours.description: Sail past UNESCO windmills and chocolate factories on a cozy boat, savoring Dutch cheeses and wines while hearing local stories. A scenic, indulgent journey into Zaanse Schans’s rich heritage.

tours.name: Private Tour to Royal Delft - Delfts Blue
tours.description: Visit Royal Delft, the last 17th-century pottery factory, and watch artisans craft iconic Delft Blue pieces. Explore centuries-old traditions, enjoy a museum shop, and add Rotterdam adventures for a truly memorable trip.

tours.name: Heineken Experience Kingsday Boat Party
tours.description: Celebrate King’s Day on a lively 1.5-hour canal cruise with ice-cold Heineken, great music, and vibrant vibes. Party through Amsterdam’s waterways surrounded by friends, fun, and unforgettable moments.

tours.name: Zaanse Schans e-bike tour - Privé Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Noord Holland’s scenic landscape to Zaanse Schans, explore historic windmills, visit a cheese farm and clogs, and enjoy a relaxed ride with a friendly guide—perfect for all ages.

tours.name: Giethoorn, Volendam & Edam Tour from Amsterdam: Small Group & Boat Cruise
tours.description: Explore the Netherlands beyond the crowds with a cozy, storytelling-filled road trip. Visit a traditional farm, taste Gouda and Stroopwafels, see historic villages, and glide through Giethoorn’s peaceful canals—an authentic, personal adventure.

tours.name: Harbour Wellness 2 Hours
tours.description: Relax in Rotterdam’s city center with a floating barrel sauna, hot tub, and ice bath. Unwind amid stunning views, or try waterfietsen on our adventurous Schiller Waterbikes—an unforgettable water wellness experience.

tours.name: Alluring Sensual Art Painting Class m/f
tours.description: Unleash your creativity and flirtation in this 90-minute sensual art class in Amsterdam. Paint a live model, sip wine, and enjoy a stylish private bar—perfect for couples, friends, or celebrations. No experience needed!

tours.name: Traditional Dutch Delft Tile Painting Workshop
tours.description: Create your own Delft Blue tile in a fun, hands-on workshop in Amsterdam. Learn its rich history, choose your design, and paint with expert guidance—then take your masterpiece home in a beautiful gift box.

tours.name: Dé Bitterballen Vaart
tours.description: Sail the IJ on MS De Jordaan with lively live entertainment, tasty bitterballen, and playful music bingo. Enjoy scenic views, hearty snacks, and a fun-filled Amsterdam experience that creates lasting memories.

tours.name: Semi Private Couple Ticket | Prosecco Bottle Included
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s iconic canals and hidden gems on a sleek electric boat. Sip drinks, listen to lively stories, and enjoy stunning sights like the Red Light District, Skinny Bridge, and Dancing Houses—all in one unforgettable hour.

tours.name: Comedy Walks© Amsterdam City Centre
tours.description: Step into Amsterdam’s streets for a hilarious 90-minute Comedy Walk©, where the city becomes your comedy stage. Enjoy witty jokes and lively stories as talented performers bring the streets to life with humor. Perfect for those aged 14 and up, this lively tour guarantees laughs around every corner.

tours.name: Delft: Bier Tour (NL)
tours.description: Join a 3-hour beer tour in Delft, visiting breweries and cafes to taste great beers and tasty snacks. Perfect for groups, starting at 2 PM, with lively stories behind Delft’s brewing history.

tours.name: Royal Experience
tours.description: Experience the royal legacy of diamonds with a private tour at Royal Coster Diamonds, the world's oldest diamond polishing factory. Marvel at the Royal 201 diamond and a Koh-i-Noor replica, explore exclusive rooms, and enjoy tax-free shopping. Conclude your visit with a sparkling gift to cherish.

tours.name: Rotterdamse Haven Fietstour
tours.description: Cycle through Rotterdam’s bustling harbor, from historic docks to modern terminals. Enjoy a lively ride, learn about the port’s growth, and hop on a watertaxi for close-up views of massive ships and busy cranes.

tours.name: Wilde Westen Fietstour
tours.description: Cycle through Rotterdam West’s vibrant contrasts, from historic Delfshaven to innovative city harbors. Discover street art, green spaces, and cultural gems on this lively 2.5-hour guided bike tour.

tours.name: Amsterdam City Tour and Windmills • 3 Hours
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s historic canals, 17th-century houses, and vibrant markets in just a few hours. Visit Zaanse Schans windmills, enjoy scenic drives, and customize your tour for an unforgettable Dutch experience.

tours.name: Giethoorn Tour • 7 Hours
tours.description: Relax on peaceful canals, explore charming thatched-roof farmhouses, and sail in a traditional punter. Enjoy a private ride from Amsterdam, with options for guides, luxury boats, and scenic stops like the Afsluitdijk.

tours.name: Designer Outlet Fashion Tour • 10 Hours
tours.description: Shop top designer brands like Michael Kors and Tommy Hilfiger at stylish outlets in Roermond, then explore historic streets and dine in charming restaurants—all with a private driver to make your day seamless.

tours.name: Delft, The Hague and Rotterdam Tour • 8 Hours
tours.description: Explore Delft’s historic streets and renowned ceramics, then visit nearby The Hague’s museums and government sites or Rotterdam’s vibrant port and modern architecture—all in a comfortable, private minivan tour.

tours.name: Highlights Fietstour - Privé
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam with a local guide on a personalized 2.5-hour bike tour. See iconic sights, hidden gems, and hear stories about the city’s history, architecture, and culture—tailored to your interests and pace.

tours.name: Comedy Walks© Eindhoven
tours.description: Join comedian Hermes Ahmadi on a lively 1.5-hour walk through Eindhoven’s streets, starting at the Anton Philips statue. Uncover quirky secrets about the city’s architecture, including why the station resembles a radio and the story behind its colorful crossings. A fun, witty tour for curious explorers.

tours.name: Queer Night Tour
tours.description: Join a lively night walk through Amsterdam’s historic queer neighborhoods, guided by a local expert. Hear stories, visit iconic bars, and connect with like-minded people in a vibrant, community-driven experience.

tours.name: Luxury Boutique Boat tour with Optional Unlimited Drinks
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s scenic canals on a luxurious electric boat, guided by an expert captain. Sip unlimited beer and wine as you soak in stunning views, fascinating stories, and unforgettable city charm.

tours.name: Privé Waterland Fietstour
tours.description: Cycle through stunning Noord-Holland landscapes, cross the IJ by ferry, and learn how locals battle water on this 4-hour tour. Enjoy scenic views, a cozy café break, and stories of land reclaimed from the sea.

tours.name: Amsterdamse Stadswandeling
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s enchanting winter lights, historic canals, and lively streets. Visit the Negen Straatjes, Westertoren, Anne Frank House, and uncover stories from rebellious provo’s to vibrant neighborhoods—all in 2 hours.

tours.name: Vlissingen - opstaptickets 3 uur zeilen p.p.
tours.description: Set sail on a 3-hour adventure with Captain Cor aboard the Forever, passing giant ships through the sluice and feeling the wind. Help or relax—your Westerschelde voyage awaits!

tours.name: Bourgondische Bierwandeling
tours.description: Sip on locally brewed, aged Bredase beers while exploring Breda’s lively streets and hidden cellars. Enjoy stories, tastings, and a certificate—perfect for groups craving a memorable, flavorful adventure.

tours.name: Bubble Football & Dodgeball
tours.description: Jump into fast-paced dodgeball or bounce around in inflatable bubbles for an hour of laughs, teamwork, and adrenaline. Perfect for any group ready to unleash their competitive spirit and create unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Tzar - the iconic private boat of Amsterdam
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam's canals aboard a classic saloon boat, guided by a knowledgeable captain. Enjoy a welcome drink and the flexibility of indoor or outdoor seating, perfect for any weather. This intimate cruise offers a unique blend of history, comfort, and stunning views, making it a memorable adventure.

tours.name: Day-trip Tour from Amsterdam to Giethoorn with boat tour included
tours.description: Experience the enchanting village of Giethoorn on a guided tour that combines a scenic boat cruise through tranquil canals with free time to explore charming streets lined with thatched-roof houses and vibrant gardens. Discover hidden gems and unwind in this picturesque setting, making unforgettable memories along the way.

tours.name: Day-trip Tour from Amsterdam to Zaanse Schans and Giethoorn
tours.description: Experience the best of Dutch culture and nature in one day! Explore the historic windmills and workshops of Zaanse Schans, then unwind in Giethoorn's serene canals. Enjoy hands-on cheese and clog-making demonstrations, and take a relaxing boat ride through picturesque waterways, creating unforgettable memories along the way.

tours.name: Private Tour from Amsterdam to Zaanse Schans and Giethoorn
tours.description: Experience the charm of the Netherlands in one day by visiting Zaanse Schans and Giethoorn. Explore historic windmills, witness traditional cheese-making, and enjoy a serene boat ride through picturesque canals. This unique blend of culture and nature promises unforgettable memories and stunning photo opportunities.

tours.name: Private Tour from Amsterdam to Giethoorn with Boat Tour Included
tours.description: Experience the enchanting beauty of Giethoorn on a guided tour that combines a scenic boat cruise through tranquil canals with free time to explore charming thatched-roof houses and vibrant gardens. Discover hidden gems and enjoy the rich history of this picturesque village while relaxing in its serene atmosphere.

tours.name: Discount SmartWalk Pride Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a self-guided WhatsApp tour through Amsterdam's vibrant Pride history. Covering 7 km in about two hours, this unique experience allows you to uncover the rich LGBTQI+ heritage and hidden gems at your own pace, making it a memorable journey through the heart of the city.

tours.name: Evening Cruise from Anne Frank House
tours.description: Sail past Amsterdam’s iconic sights like the Skinny Bridge and Jordaan in a cozy, heated boat. Capture stunning photos, enjoy drinks at the café, and learn city secrets from expert skippers—all in just one hour.

tours.name: Kids Indoor Bubble Football
tours.description: Jump into a lively indoor football game with bumping, bouncing, and laughter. Play for an hour with 8 bubbles included—perfect for birthdays or fun gatherings. Add more bubbles for larger groups!

tours.name: Discreet Luxury Smoke-Friendly Canal Cruise
tours.description: Sail Amsterdam’s canals on a luxurious, handcrafted electric boat. Enjoy stunning views, fascinating stories, and unlimited beer and wine—all in a relaxed, elegant setting designed for comfort and discretion.

tours.name: The Hague: Beer Tour (ENG)
tours.description: Sip your way through The Hague’s vibrant brewing scene, visiting modern breweries and cozy cafés. Enjoy craft beers, tasty snacks, and city highlights on a lively 3-hour tour with a local guide.

tours.name: Axe Throwing & Bubble Football
tours.description: Challenge friends to a fun-filled hour of axe throwing and bubble football—perfect for parties, bachelor outings, or team events. Unleash your competitive spirit in this lively Amsterdam adventure.

tours.name: Rondvaart met open boot over het kanaal
tours.description: Sail through Utrecht’s charming canals with KINboat, enjoying a relaxing, comfortable cruise that reveals the city’s picturesque waterways and vibrant atmosphere from the water.

tours.name: See Diamonds In Style Tour
tours.description: Step into GASSAN’s world of diamonds and watches, watch the magic of gemstone cutting, learn the 4 C’s, and see our revolutionary GASSAN 121. Enjoy champagne and explore luxury jewelry collections at your leisure.

tours.name: Spirit of Schiedam Tour
tours.description: Embark on the Spirit of Schiedam Tour to explore the fascinating history of this unique city while savoring its cherished beverages. This immersive experience promises to unveil the stories behind Schiedam's renowned drinks, making it a memorable journey for enthusiasts and history buffs alike.

tours.name: Robbentocht
tours.description: Join a 2-hour family-friendly boat tour with Zeehond, where you’ll see wild seals, learn about Ameland and the Wadden Sea, and enjoy a safe, fun experience for kids and dogs alike, all led by a passionate family crew.

tours.name: Route Hoge- en Lage Vuursche • Hele dag
tours.description: Experience a thrilling day of cycling from 9:30 AM to 4:00 PM, exploring scenic routes like Hoge Vuursche and Soest. With distances ranging from 10.2 km to 23 km, each trail offers unique challenges and breathtaking views. Enjoy included amenities like helmets and roadside assistance for a worry-free adventure.

tours.name: Galerie Tour - Dutch
tours.description: Discover Utrecht's vibrant art scene on a guided tour that takes you through five unique galleries and art shops. Engage with gallery owners, learn about their collections, and enjoy refreshments along the way. This enriching experience will boost your confidence to explore the world of art like never before.

tours.name: Street Art Tour - English
tours.description: Explore Utrecht's vibrant street art scene on a guided tour that reveals the stories behind stunning murals and graffiti. Discover hidden gems, learn about local artists, and delve into the city's history as you walk and cycle through captivating neighborhoods. Experience Utrecht like never before, with art around every corner.

tours.name: Vrouwen Private Tour
tours.description: Explore Leeuwarden’s vibrant streets through stories of powerful women—famous and hidden heroes—while uncovering secret courtyards, colorful murals, and historic sites that bring the city’s rich history to life.

tours.name: Educatie
tours.description: Experience an engaging educational program at Beekvlietboerderij, where students explore vital concepts like democracy and social interaction. Guided by knowledgeable volunteers, participants delve into the poignant history of Dutch hostages during WWII, gaining insight into their resilience and contributions to post-war reconstruction. A unique blend of history and citizenship education awaits!

tours.name: Informatie en Documentatie Centrum
tours.description: Experience the haunting reality of life as a hostage at Beekvliet. A private guide will lead you through themed rooms, immersing you in the daily struggles and fears faced by captives. This unique opportunity offers a profound insight into a harrowing chapter of history, making it both memorable and impactful.

tours.name: Open Boat Tour from Anne Frank Museum
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s canals on a heated electric boat, marvel at stunning light art, and snap perfect photos from the panoramic deck. Enjoy lively stories, Dutch and English guides, and a free mulled wine at the start.

tours.name: Privé Amsterdam Essentials 1 uur Fietstour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s highlights in just 2 hours: cycle through Jordaan, Vondelpark, and the iconic canals, while hearing fascinating stories. Perfect for families, with a relaxed pace and plenty of photo opportunities.

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum, Rijks Museum & Walking Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 7-hour private tour of Amsterdam, blending a scenic walking adventure with a visit to the renowned Rijksmuseum. Discover hidden gems and local favorites while learning about the city's rich history and culture. Enjoy a personalized experience at your own pace, creating unforgettable memories in this vibrant capital.

tours.name: Paintball kids
tours.description: Kids en groepen kunnen nu genieten van 1 uur 45 minuten paintball op een privéveld, met instructie, spannende spellen, en een pauze. Perfect voor feestjes en klasuitjes, vanaf 8 jaar.

tours.name: Diamond Factory Tour
tours.description: See Amsterdam’s diamond heritage firsthand in a 30-minute guided tour. Watch master craftsmen shape sparkling gems, admire the Koh-i-Noor replica, and enjoy tax-free shopping—an unforgettable glimpse into royal brilliance.

tours.name: Architectuur Stadswandeling
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s striking mix of historic landmarks and bold modern architecture on a 2-hour guided walk. See iconic sites like the Cube Houses, Markthal, and Witte Huis, and uncover the city’s innovative spirit and unique skyline.

tours.name: Rotterdamse Dakentour - Privé
tours.description: Climb four hidden Rotterdam rooftops, enjoy stunning skyline views, and see innovative, green spaces. A lively guide reveals city plans and creative rooftop uses, offering a fresh perspective on Rotterdam’s future.

tours.name: Rotterdam Food Tour
tours.description: Taste Rotterdam’s best in a 4-hour food tour with local treats, lively guides, and scenic stops at markets and cafes. Enjoy delicious bites, learn fun facts, and explore the city’s hidden gems on foot or bike.

tours.name: Wemeldinge - Last Minute Opstaptickets - 3 uur
tours.description: Join a 3-hour sail on the Oosterschelde with skipper Marco on a modern yacht. Actively help or relax, enjoy stunning views, and sip a free drink—no experience needed, just pure water and wind adventure.

tours.name: Stadsrondvaart • 1 uur
tours.description: Glide through Leiden’s historic canals on a 1-hour boat tour, passing stunning sights and charming bridges. Your friendly guide and skipper bring the city’s stories to life as you relax on the panoramic deck.

tours.name: Around Jordaan
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s serene Jordaan canals, passing the Anne Frank House and Wester Tower. A one-hour kayak adventure filled with local stories, perfect for water-savvy explorers seeking a unique city view.

tours.name: Rotterdam Private tour + Euromast 360
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s vibrant daytime scene with panoramic views, local street food, water taxis, and a friendly guide—all included. Relax, customize your pace, and soak up the city’s lively energy worry-free.

tours.name: Discover the city of Rembrandt
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through 17th-century Amsterdam, exploring the life of the legendary painter Rembrandt van Rijn. Visit key sites tied to his artistry, enjoy immersive multimedia experiences, and conclude at his historic home, where masterpieces were born. Discover the city through the eyes of a true artistic genius.

tours.name: The Golden Age of Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a captivating three-hour guided tour through Amsterdam's rich history, from its medieval roots to the Golden Age's expansion. Discover iconic landmarks and hidden gems while learning about the East India Company's impact on the city, all led by an expert in local and WWII history.

tours.name: A full day in Amsterdam
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like a local on this personalized tour, where you can explore the city's rich history, vibrant culture, and unique stories. Choose your interests, from museums to shopping, and gain insights from an expert guide in local and WW2 history. Discover the unforgettable charm of this iconic city.

tours.name: Varen met een 8-persoons elektrische sloep • Strand22
tours.description: Sail through Almere’s modern architecture and lush green spots on a boat tour. Perfect for friends or family, enjoy a relaxing day exploring the city’s vibrant waterway and natural beauty from the water.

tours.name: Varen met een elektrische sloep voor 8 personen • Loetje
tours.description: Sail through Almere’s modern architecture and lush green spots on a relaxing electric sloep. Perfect for friends, family, or colleagues to enjoy a scenic day on the water in this vibrant, youthful city.

tours.name: Varen met een 12-persoons elektrische sloep • Strand22
tours.description: Sail through Almere’s modern architecture and lush green spots on a boat. Perfect for friends, family, or colleagues, enjoy a relaxing day exploring this vibrant, water-rich city from a unique perspective.

tours.name: Scooter Rental for 6 Hours
tours.description: Glide effortlessly through vibrant flower fields, quaint towns, and breezy beaches on a comfy scooter. Enjoy the scenic beauty and charming sights at your own relaxed pace in the stunning Bollenstreek.

tours.name: Happy High Tour
tours.description: Join a relaxed, 420-friendly boat tour with stunning views, where like-minded adults unwind, enjoy herbal tobacco options, and share a chill vibe—no loud partying, just simple, fun, stress-free moments.

tours.name: Half-Day Private Tour to Windmills, Cheese & Waterland Charm
tours.description: Explore Holland’s highlights in a private 4-hour tour: windmills at Zaanse Schans, cheese tasting at Simonehoeve, and charming Waterland villages—all with luxury transport and expert insights, avoiding crowds.

tours.name: Fietshuur
tours.description: Rent a sturdy aluminum bike with 7 gears, adjustable seat, LED lights, and quick-release rack. Always lock it securely and enjoy smooth rides—reach out if you need help. Happy cycling!

tours.name: Street Art Tour - Privé
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s vibrant murals on a 1.5-hour guided street art tour. Discover powerful stories, diverse techniques, and the artists behind the colorful murals that reflect the city’s culture and social messages.

tours.name: Countryside and Windmills Tour • 5 Hours
tours.description: Explore the Dutch countryside with windmills, cheese farms, fishing villages, and traditional crafts. Enjoy a private, comfortable tour with tastings, scenic views, and free time at charming harbors—an unforgettable Dutch experience.

tours.name: Private Amsterdam Countryside Tour
tours.description: Explore the scenic Dutch countryside outside Amsterdam on a private, all-inclusive 5-hour tour. Capture stunning landscapes, enjoy hassle-free travel, and immerse yourself in the beauty of the countryside.

tours.name: Italian Cooking Workshop
tours.description: Join a private cooking workshop where you’ll create authentic Italian dishes from scratch! Under the guidance of a welcoming chef, work in groups at your own cooking island, enjoy a delightful meal together, and accommodate any dietary needs. This hands-on experience promises culinary fun and lasting memories with friends or colleagues.

tours.name: Street Art Tour
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s vibrant murals on a 1.5-hour walking tour, where passionate guides reveal colorful art, cultural stories, and social messages behind the city’s dynamic street art scene.

tours.name: Comedy & Clubbing (Adana Twins) - Het Sieraad September 21
tours.description: Experience an unforgettable night at Het Sieraad, where laughter meets rhythm! Enjoy side-splitting English stand-up comedy from top comedians, followed by an electrifying club night featuring renowned DJs. This unique blend of humor and dance promises non-stop entertainment, making it a must-attend event for those seeking a memorable evening!

tours.name: Ritz - a classic luxury saloon boat from 1915
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam's canals aboard a classic 1915 saloon boat. With a knowledgeable captain as your guide, enjoy a welcome drink and the option for more from the onboard minibar. This luxurious, heated vessel accommodates up to 12 guests, ensuring a memorable cruise in any weather.

tours.name: Family Friendly Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (ENGLISH)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2.5-hour private tour of the Van Gogh Museum, where an expert guide brings the artist's vibrant life and works to light. Discover iconic masterpieces like Sunflowers and The Bedroom, while engaging storytelling makes Van Gogh's journey accessible and exciting for families, leaving you inspired and enriched.

tours.name: Smartphone Fietstour Rotterdam Highlights
tours.description: Cycle through Rotterdam’s top sights and hidden gems with your smartphone. Enjoy stories, photos, videos, and quizzes as you explore landmarks like the Markthal, Erasmusbrug, and Kubuswoningen at your own pace.

tours.name: Upcycling workshop – Jeans side panel (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Transform old jeans into stylish new pieces in just three hours! No experience needed—our designers guide you through sewing and upcycling, adding personalized panels for a unique, eco-friendly wardrobe upgrade.

tours.name: Fietsvaren in Den Bosch
tours.description: Glide silently through Den Bosch on a sleek, eco-friendly waterbike—easy to control, stable, and fast. Perfect for small groups, it offers a fun, safe way to explore the water with stunning views and no noise.

tours.name: Golfsurfen - Priveles
tours.description: Catch your first waves in Zandvoort with personalized lessons! Learn safety, balance, and pop-up skills in small surf, guided by expert instructors. Perfect for beginners eager to ride their first or best wave.

tours.name: Kinderfeestje
tours.description: Experience a lively celebration filled with fun and learning! Enjoy unlimited play among straw bales while getting up close with friendly cows and calves, making this event a unique opportunity to connect with farm life in a joyful atmosphere.

tours.name: Rondleiding in de avonduren: Raadhuis De Rijp anno 1630
tours.description: Explore the monumental Raadhuis De Rijp, a stunning 1630 structure by renowned engineer Jan Adriaanszn. Leeghwater. This 45-minute guided tour unveils the building's rich history, featuring the council chamber, mayor's room, and the unique Waterheldentafel, complemented by a captivating film about the Land van Leeghwater. Perfect for history and architecture enthusiasts!

tours.name: Zaanse Schans & Giethoorn: visita ai mulini e al famoso villaggio senza strade!
tours.description: Experience the charm of the Netherlands with a captivating tour of Zaanse Schans and Giethoorn. Explore historic windmills and traditional crafts at Zaanse Schans, then glide through the serene canals of Giethoorn, the "Venice of the Netherlands," where picturesque bridges and thatched-roof farms create a tranquil escape.

tours.name: Zaanse Schans, Volendam & Giethoorn: visita tre famosi villaggi di campagna
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable journey through the Netherlands, visiting the iconic Zaanse Schans with its historic windmills, the charming fishing village of Volendam, and the serene Giethoorn, where canals replace streets. Experience traditional crafts, savor local delicacies, and enjoy a tranquil boat tour in this picturesque landscape.

tours.name: The 0.0 % non-alcohol Beer Bike Experience Amsterdam
tours.description: Hop on a 90-minute Amsterdam beer and prosecco bike tour with stunning city views, 20 liters of non-alcoholic beer, lively music, and a friendly guide. Perfect for groups up to 16 per bike—fun, social, and unforgettable.

tours.name: Maastricht Highlights Private Walking Tour
tours.description: Escape the ordinary with a day trip to Maastricht, where unique architecture and vibrant culture await. Discover hidden gems like the charming Jekerkwartier, grand basilicas, stunning ramparts, and lively squares. Don't miss the breathtaking bookshop that promises to be a highlight of your adventure!

tours.name: Self-guided bike tour Amsterdam Center
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s scenic streets with a safe, easy GPS route that highlights top sights and hidden gems. Enjoy expert audio guides, photos, and videos as you explore landmarks at your own pace—stress-free and unforgettable.

tours.name: Deep Dive Amsterdam
tours.description: Dive beneath Amsterdam’s surface with a full-day private tour exploring hidden courtyards, art, local bites, and secret spots. Immerse yourself in the city’s layered history, vibrant neighborhoods, and rich food culture.

tours.name: Amsterdam Striptease Dinner
tours.description: Savor a three-course meal in a stylish city restaurant, topped with an exclusive VIP strip show just for your group. Enjoy private dining and attentive service in a memorable, evening entertainment experience.

tours.name: Beer Bike Amsterdam
tours.description: Cycle through the city on a lively beer bike, pedaling and sipping as you enjoy included drinks, a friendly guide, and weather protection—perfect for fun, fitness, and friends all in one ride.

tours.name: Steak & Strip Dinner Amsterdam
tours.description: Savor a three-course steak feast with premium cuts and delicious sides, then unwind with an exclusive private striptease in your VIP area, blending gourmet dining with adult entertainment for a night to remember.

tours.name: All-In Boat Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s famous canals on a private boat, sipping unlimited drinks for 1.5 hours. Relax and soak in the city’s beauty in style on this laid-back, unforgettable cruise.

tours.name: Archery Tag Battle Amsterdam
tours.description: Jump into 1.5 hours of outdoor Archery Tag, dodging barricades and firing foam arrows at rivals. Gear up with masks, team challenges, and expert tips for a fun, safe, paintball-free combat experience.

tours.name: Amsterdam Target Shooting Experience
tours.description: Test your skills in a safe indoor range with expert guidance, firing .22 and .38 pistols. Feel the thrill of real recoil as you sharpen your aim in a focused, one-hour session.

tours.name: Footgolf Amsterdam
tours.description: Kick a football into giant holes on scenic footgolf courses, rent turf shoes, and relax with drinks and snacks. Enjoy 1.5 hours of fun, fresh air, and friendly competition in beautiful parkland.

tours.name: Bullets, Babes & Beer
tours.description: Enjoy a thrilling 5-hour adventure with indoor shooting, a guided Heineken brewery tour with tastings, and an exclusive striptease show—an exciting mix of adrenaline, culture, and adult entertainment for your stag party.

tours.name: Target Shooting & All-In Boat Cruise
tours.description: Fire away with 25 pistol shots then unwind on a private 1.5-hour canal cruise with unlimited drinks. This 2.5-hour adventure blends adrenaline and relaxation for an unforgettable escape.

tours.name: Beer, Guns, Boats & Fun
tours.description: Enjoy a thrilling 6-hour adventure with indoor shooting, craft-beer tasting, a private striptease, and a scenic canal cruise—crafted for your group’s perfect day of excitement and fun.

tours.name: Boat Cruise & Striptease
tours.description: Enjoy a 1.5-hour private canal cruise with unlimited drinks, passing historic bridges and charming houses, then relax as a live striptease unfolds right on deck for an unforgettable, intimate show.

tours.name: Amsterdam Karting Experience
tours.description: Speed around an indoor GP-style track in high-performance karts, racing against friends in timed heats. Feel the thrill with safety gear, computerized timing, and podium prizes in just one adrenaline-filled hour.

tours.name: Paintball Amsterdam
tours.description: Dive into two hours of adrenaline-pumping paintball on a sprawling 30-acre park with 12 themed fields. All gear included—just bring your game face for nonstop fun and action.

tours.name: Fire Breathing Workshop
tours.description: Master the art of fire-breathing in just one hour outdoors. Start with water, then ignite your own fiery stunt under expert guidance—safely and confidently.

tours.name: Italian Pizza Boat Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s canals for 1.5 hours with unlimited pizza and drinks. A private captain guides you past iconic sights as you indulge in fresh pizza and sip beer, wine, or soft drinks in a relaxing cruise.

tours.name: BBQ Boat Cruise
tours.description: Sail along scenic canals on a private 1.5-hour tour, then indulge in a mouthwatering onboard BBQ feast with grilled meats, fresh sides, and chilled drinks—perfect for relaxing group gatherings by the water.

tours.name: Amsterdam Whiskey Tasting
tours.description: Savor five premium whiskies in 1.5 hours with expert tips, exploring regional flavors, jotting tasting notes, and enjoying perfect pairing ideas in a cozy, inviting setting.

tours.name: Amsterdam Limousine Striptease
tours.description: Cruise Amsterdam in style with a luxurious stretch limo, complete with leather seats and premium sound. Enjoy a captivating live striptease show for an unforgettable, VIP experience.

tours.name: Amsterdam Limo Service
tours.description: Celebrate your bachelor party in style with luxury limos, from sleek stretchs to massive Hummers. Enjoy VIP treatment, drinks, music, and a smooth ride to Amsterdam’s hottest spots. Relax and toast to the night.

tours.name: Private Tour: In the Footsteps of Rembrandt • 1–6 people included, extra possible
tours.description: Stroll through Rembrandt’s Amsterdam, walking his streets, homes, and hidden corners. Feel the city’s heartbeat and see life as he did—merchants, neighbors, saints, and beggars—bringing his world vividly to life.

tours.name: Private Tour: Jewish Amsterdam • 1–6 people included, extra possible
tours.description: Uncover 400 years of Jewish history in Amsterdam’s vibrant quarter. Walk past synagogues, monuments, and hidden gems, hearing stories of philosophers, resistance heroes, and families who shaped the city’s rich cultural tapestry.

tours.name: Five Days
tours.description: Rent top-quality city bikes with locks, perfect for families. Enjoy a worry-free ride with insurance covering damages. Always in stock—your adventure starts here, no stress, just pedal and explore.

tours.name: Six Days
tours.description: Rent top-quality city bikes with locks, perfect for families. Enjoy a worry-free ride with free damage insurance and always find a bike in stock. Explore the city comfortably and confidently today.

tours.name: Seven days
tours.description: Rent top-quality city bikes with locks, perfect for families. We keep a wide selection in stock, insure against damages, and make it easy with simple ID or card payments—ride worry-free and explore freely.

tours.name: One Hour Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Rent top-quality city bikes with locks, insurance, and a wide family selection. Ride worry-free, enjoy the best bikes in town, and explore comfortably—our fleet is ready whenever you are.

tours.name: Three Hour Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Experience the joy of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. With a wide selection for the whole family, complimentary locks, and no damage fees thanks to insurance, your adventure is worry-free. Rent today and explore the city like never before!

tours.name: Full Day Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Experience the joy of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges thanks to our insurance. With a wide selection for the whole family, we ensure there's always a bike ready for your adventure!

tours.name: Two Day Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for ultimate comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges. With a wide selection for the whole family, we guarantee you'll find the perfect ride. Join us for an unforgettable biking adventure!

tours.name: Three Day Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. With a wide selection for the whole family, complimentary locks, and no damage charges thanks to our insurance, you can ride worry-free. We always have bikes in stock, ready for your adventure!

tours.name: Four Day Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage fees. With a wide selection for the whole family and guaranteed availability, your perfect biking adventure awaits! Just bring your ID or credit card.

tours.name: Five Day Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges. With a wide selection for the whole family, we guarantee you'll find the perfect ride. Just bring your ID or credit card, and you're set!

tours.name: Six Day Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges. With a wide selection for the whole family and guaranteed availability, your perfect biking adventure awaits! Just bring a credit card or ID to get started.

tours.name: One Week Bike Rental - Oosterdok
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges. With a wide selection for the whole family and guaranteed availability, your perfect biking adventure awaits!

tours.name: Half day tour Edam, Volendam & Marken from Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore Holland in half a day: taste authentic cheeses in Edam, snap photos at a windmill, wander charming Volendam’s fishing streets, cross to Marken by ferry, and soak in timeless Dutch scenery—all in one unforgettable trip.

tours.name: The Hague: Hike & Bite Food Tour (ENG)
tours.description: Embark on a culinary and cultural journey through The Hague, where a knowledgeable guide reveals hidden gems and shares captivating stories. Savor delicious local snacks and drinks, making this tour a delightful blend of flavors and history that promises to be both unique and memorable.

tours.name: Cheese Farm Experience
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey from the Erasmus Bridge to Kinderdijk, where you'll marvel at UNESCO's iconic windmills. Experience the art of cheese-making with a guided tour at a local farm, followed by a delightful tasting of three unique cheeses. Conclude your adventure with a scenic boat ride back.

tours.name: Dutch Distillery Experience
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through Schiedam's historic center, exploring one of the world's largest traditional mills. Experience the life of a miller and enjoy stunning city views. Then, delve into the art of distilling at the National Jenever Museum, where you can witness the craft in action and savor a tasting.

tours.name: Huur een kano in Wijnhaven
tours.description: Relax on the water in a canoe for 1 or 2 hours, paddling quietly through historic city harbors. Stay safe, wear a life vest, and enjoy peaceful moments—just don’t forget, swimming and alcohol are off-limits.

tours.name: Huur een kajak in Wijnhaven
tours.description: Paddle solo on calm waters for 1 or 2 hours, enjoying peaceful moments. Stay alert, wear a life vest, and respect safety rules to ensure a fun, safe experience in the historic city harbors.

tours.name: Huur een sup in Wijnhaven
tours.description: Glide silently through historic city harbors on a stand-up paddleboard, soaking in the sights. Stay alert, wear a life vest, and enjoy a safe, peaceful water adventure without noise or alcohol.

tours.name: Huur een sup in Rijnhaven
tours.description: Glide quietly over the Rijnhaven on a solo SUP, soaking in the city’s sights. Stay safe, wear a life vest, and enjoy a peaceful, rule-abiding paddle in designated areas—an unforgettable water escape.

tours.name: Rockstar for a Day! Learn how to Dj fast
tours.description: Start your DJ journey in a lively club before it opens, learning to beat match, mix, and perform on real decks. Feel the thrill of the spotlight, snap iconic selfies, and enjoy a discounted drink afterward. No experience needed!

tours.name: Openbare Rondleiding
tours.description: Uncover the secrets of traditional clogs and cheese-making in an engaging hands-on experience that brings local crafts to life. Dive into authentic techniques and create your own unique souvenirs.

tours.name: Buitenschoolse opvang (BSO)
tours.description: Experience the charm of farm life with an engaging introduction for children. They can explore a fun hay maze and enjoy the delightful activity of feeding cows and calves, making it a unique and memorable adventure in the countryside.

tours.name: School excursie
tours.description: Kids will embark on an educational adventure, discovering the art of clogs and cheese-making. They’ll get hands-on experience crafting cheese, enjoy tasting delicious varieties, and even feed cows. The fun continues with playtime in the hay barn, making this a memorable day of learning and enjoyment!

tours.name: Fietsvaren en loungen in Wijnhaven
tours.description: Paddle historic Rotterdam’s Wijnhaven on our sturdy waterbikes, then relax on the Aquarium-ponton with drinks and views of boats and floating jacuzzis. An active, scenic adventure in the heart of the city.

tours.name: Leuven Highlights Private Walking Tour
tours.description: Discover the enchanting city of Leuven, where academic history meets vibrant culture. Stroll through the UNESCO-listed Great Beguinage, admire the stunning Town Hall, and experience the lively Oude Markt. This customizable tour promises a unique blend of medieval charm and modern energy, perfect for history lovers and beer enthusiasts alike.

tours.name: De mijngeschiedenis van Zuid Limburg
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through the rich mining history of South Limburg. This private tour reveals the lives of miners, their communities, and the lasting impact of coal mining. Explore historical sites, hear poignant stories, and witness the cultural legacy that continues to shape the region today.

tours.name: Amsterdam Highlights Tour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s soul in a personalized 2-hour walk through historic sites, hidden courtyards, vibrant neighborhoods, and lively markets. Enjoy local stories, scenic views, and surprises tailored to your interests.

tours.name: Sunset Stroll
tours.description: As evening falls, stroll through Amsterdam’s glowing canals and secret alleys, soaking in golden light, historic tales, and peaceful moments. Perfect for lovers, solo travelers, or friends seeking quiet magic and timeless beauty.

tours.name: Dutch Tasting Table
tours.description: Savor authentic Dutch flavors on an intimate walking tour through Amsterdam’s hidden neighborhoods, tasting cheeses, stroopwafels, oysters, and local spirits while uncovering stories and secret spots away from tourists.

tours.name: Private Canal Boat Tour with Champagne Tasting
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals in a private luxury boat, sipping three boutique champagnes paired with Dutch treats. Enjoy stunning views, hidden waterways, and personalized stories in an intimate, romantic setting.

tours.name: Grand Masters Museum Tour and Stroll
tours.description: Skip the lines and dive into the Dutch Golden Age with a private Rijksmuseum tour. See masterpieces like The Night Watch, explore hidden stories, and understand the complex history behind the art—all with an expert guide.

tours.name: Red Light Party Pub Crawl Amsterdam
tours.description: Dive into a 6-hour party in the Red Light District with free shots at each bar and VIP access at the final club—skip lines and keep the energy high on this unforgettable pub crawl.

tours.name: Back in Time
tours.description: Sail through historic locks to Muiden, explore the ancient Dutch castle, enjoy a charming village lunch, then relax on scenic waters of Markermeer and IJmeer before returning to your hotel.

tours.name: Adventure VOC
tours.description: Set sail on a scenic inland adventure, passing tiny villages, lush nature, and historic waters. Enjoy a delicious lunch, explore charming micro villages, and feel the thrill of a sea voyage—all in one unforgettable day.

tours.name: Mini River Cruise
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals, passing historic houses and iconic bridges. Enjoy a delicious à la carte lunch at Wispe Brouwerij and explore the scenic Vecht River and Muiden’s locks on this unforgettable evening cruise.

tours.name: Den Haag: Hike & Bite Food Tour (NL)
tours.description: Explore Den Haag’s royal charm with a guided tour full of local stories, hidden gems, and delicious bites. Immerse yourself in culture and flavor on this memorable culinary journey.

tours.name: The Comedy Embassy: English Stand Up Comedy @ Comedy Cafe
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam's premier stand-up comedy show at The Comedy Embassy, where international comedians deliver unforgettable performances. With up to 20 shows monthly, this vibrant venue guarantees a unique blend of humor and culture, making it the ultimate destination for laughter in the Netherlands. Join for an evening of joy and entertainment!

tours.name: The Hague Highlight Fietstour - DUTCH
tours.description: Cycle through Den Haag on a 2.5-hour tour, uncovering city secrets, history, and local tips with a lively guide. Enjoy comfortable bikes, ponchos, and a fun way to explore the city's highlights.

tours.name: Delft: Hike & Bite Food Tour (NL)
tours.description: Join a 4-hour guided tour of Delft, savoring local bites and drinks, exploring the city's highlights, and enjoying a lively, full city overview with a friendly guide—starting at Grote Markt.

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (SPANISH)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2 to 2.5 hour private tour of the Van Gogh Museum, where you'll delve into the life of the iconic artist. With a dedicated guide, explore his masterpieces and personal stories, including the infamous ear incident, in an intimate setting that brings Van Gogh's world to life.

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (FRENCH)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2 to 2.5 hour private tour of the Van Gogh Museum, where you'll delve into the life of the legendary artist. With an exclusive guide, explore his iconic works and personal stories, from sunflowers to self-portraits, and uncover the fascinating details behind his tumultuous journey.

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (ITALIAN)
tours.description: Embark on an intimate 2 to 2.5 hour private tour of the Van Gogh Museum, where expert guides unveil the life and struggles of the iconic artist. Explore his masterpieces, from sunflowers to self-portraits, and gain insight into his turbulent journey, all while enjoying skip-the-line access and a personalized experience.

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (PORTUGUESE)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2 to 2.5 hour private tour of the Van Gogh Museum, where an expert guide reveals the life and struggles of the legendary artist. Explore his iconic works and personal stories, including the infamous ear incident, in an intimate setting that brings Van Gogh's world to life.

tours.name: Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (DUTCH)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2 to 2.5 hour private tour of the Van Gogh Museum, where you'll uncover the life and struggles of the legendary artist. With a dedicated guide, explore his iconic works and personal artifacts, gaining insight into his genius and the stories behind masterpieces like "Sunflowers" and "Wheat Field with Crows."

tours.name: Combo: Rijksmuseum + Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (SPANISH)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 5 to 5.5 hour private tour of Amsterdam's Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh Museum. Led by charming guides, explore masterpieces and intriguing stories, from Rembrandt's works to Van Gogh's iconic paintings. Enjoy skip-the-line access and a personalized experience that immerses you in art and culture like never before.

tours.name: Combo: Rijksmuseum + Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (FRENCH)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 5 to 5.5 hour private tour of Amsterdam's Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh Museum. Led by charming guides, explore masterpieces and intriguing stories, from Rembrandt's works to Van Gogh's iconic paintings. This immersive experience promises a deep dive into art and culture, making it truly unforgettable.

tours.name: Combo: Rijksmuseum + Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (ITALIAN)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 5 to 5.5 hour private tour of Amsterdam's Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh Museum. Led by charming guides, you'll skip the lines and delve into the rich stories behind iconic artworks and lesser-known treasures. Experience art and culture like never before, making unforgettable memories along the way.

tours.name: Combo: Rijksmuseum + Van Gogh Museum Guided Tour - Private (PORTUGUESE)
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 5 to 5.5 hour private tour of Amsterdam's Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh Museum. Led by charming guides, skip the lines and delve into the rich history of Dutch art, from Rembrandt's masterpieces to Van Gogh's iconic works. Experience art and culture like never before!

tours.name: Rotterdam Oorlog Privé Rondleiding
tours.description: Experience Rotterdam's rich history with the Rotterdam War Tour, where you'll explore the impact of World War II and the subsequent rebuilding era. Visit significant sites like the Brandgrens and the Monument De Verwoeste Stad, while uncovering powerful stories and stunning visuals that reveal how the past shapes the city's identity today.

tours.name: Kop van Zuid & Katendrecht Rondleiding
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour walking tour of Katendrecht, where rich maritime history meets modern architecture. Discover the iconic Hotel New York, hear intriguing tales of the area's past, and marvel at Rotterdam's stunning skyline. Experience the vibrant transformation of this once-infamous district into a trendy hotspot.

tours.name: Rotterdam Architectuur Privé Rondleiding
tours.description: Discover the architectural marvels of Rotterdam on an engaging guided tour. Explore iconic structures like the Markthal and Erasmusbrug, while learning about sustainable building techniques and the city's rich architectural history. This experience offers a fresh perspective on Rotterdam as a vibrant city of contrasts and innovation.

tours.name: Rotterdam Multiculti Food Tour
