tours.description: Embark on a vibrant journey through multicultural Rotterdam with the Multiculti Food Tour! Experience the city's rich diversity by visiting a unique mosque, meeting local entrepreneurs, and savoring delicious snacks from various cuisines. This four-hour bike tour promises an unforgettable blend of culture, community, and culinary delights tailored to your preferences.

tours.name: Rotterdam Bierwandeling
tours.description: Embark on a delightful Rotterdam Beer Walk, exploring four authentic cafés while savoring exclusive local brews. Guided by a passionate local, discover the city's highlights and hidden gems. This unique experience combines culture and flavor, culminating in a vibrant spot favored by locals for a memorable finish to your adventure.

tours.name: Private Morning Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s peaceful canals on a private boat, watching the city wake up in serene morning light. Perfect for groups, with optional snacks and drinks to start your day right.

tours.name: 2 uur Step verhuur
tours.description: Experience Utrecht like never before on a kickbike! In just two hours, glide through the city at a thrilling pace, exploring scenic routes and the picturesque Singel. This sporty and fun alternative to cycling promises an unforgettable adventure, making your discovery of Utrecht both exciting and memorable.

tours.name: Amsterdam: Legendary Red Light District Tour & Pub Crawl
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s secret charms with a local guide, visiting lively bars, enjoying free shots, and exploring historic alleys and neon-lit windows of the Red Light District. Dive into culture, nightlife, and hidden stories in 2 hours.

tours.name: 1 uur Privé rondvaart met eigen groep
tours.description: Sail through Groningen’s historic canals on a private boat, choosing your route and duration. Enjoy drinks, snacks, and stunning city views—perfect for parties, team outings, or relaxing afternoons on the water.

tours.name: 2 uur Privé rondvaart met eigen groep
tours.description: Experience a private boat tour through the enchanting Groningse canals, where you can customize your route and enjoy the stunning architecture and vibrant atmosphere. Perfect for gatherings, this unforgettable outing includes an open bar and delicious snacks, ensuring a relaxing and memorable time on the water with friends or colleagues.

tours.name: 3 uur Privé rondvaart met eigen groep
tours.description: Experience the charm of Groningen with a private boat tour through its picturesque canals. Customize your journey, whether it's a quick hour or a leisurely three-hour cruise, complete with an open bar and delicious snacks. Enjoy stunning views and create unforgettable memories with friends or colleagues on the water.

tours.name: Kleinere Gezelschappen (tot 15 personen)
tours.description: Step into the harrowing yet inspiring world of Dutch hostages during World War II. Explore the Beekvliet farm and its surroundings, where 1,276 innocent individuals lived under constant threat. Experience their daily lives and discover how many played pivotal roles in rebuilding the Netherlands after the war.

tours.name: Zaanse Schans Tour
tours.description: Experience the charm of a historic Dutch village as you explore Zaanse Schans. Discover the fascinating world of windmills, witness the craftsmanship of traditional wooden clogs, and savor delicious local cheeses. This immersive journey feels like walking through an open-air museum, showcasing vibrant wooden houses and rich cultural heritage.

tours.name: Zaanse Schans, Volendam, Edam & Marken
tours.description: Experience the charm of traditional Dutch culture on this captivating tour. Explore the historic windmill village of Zaanse Schans, witness the art of wooden clog-making, savor local cheeses, and stroll through the picturesque fishing village of Volendam. Discover the unique beauty of Edam and Marken, filled with colorful wooden houses.

tours.name: Giethoorn: visita con giro in barca incluso
tours.description: Experience the enchanting village of Giethoorn, where canals replace roads and tranquility reigns. Enjoy a captivating boat tour through its picturesque waterways, admire traditional thatched-roof farms, and stroll along charming paths. Discover delightful cafés and immerse yourself in the serene atmosphere of this unique car-free oasis.

tours.name: E-hopper - Privé Rondvaart door Delft (Nieuw!)
tours.description: Experience Delft like never before aboard the E-Hopper, a private electric boat for up to 8 people. Glide silently through historic canals with a knowledgeable skipper who shares captivating stories. Perfect for celebrations or a relaxing outing, this eco-friendly adventure offers comfort, flexibility, and an intimate exploration of the city.

tours.name: Upcycling Lesson: Shirring Technique (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Transform old clothes in just one hour with creative shirring at our Sewing Café. Personalize your t-shirts, skirts, or shirts and give them a fresh, unique look—perfect for beginners eager to upcycle with style.

tours.name: Harbour Wellness 1 Hour
tours.description: Relax in a floating barrel sauna, hot tub, and ice bath amid Rotterdam’s vibrant city center. Enjoy stunning views, unique water wellness, and optional overnight stays or waterbike adventures for a memorable escape.

tours.name: Cheese Fondue Cruise
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals on a private boat, indulging in warm, melty cheese fondue paired with wine. Enjoy stunning views, fresh bread, and pickles as the city’s golden architecture glows around you.

tours.name: Natuurfotografie
tours.description: Capture stunning nature shots in Leersums Veld with pro photographer Leonie Voets. Learn camera tricks, lighting, and composition while working with your own camera in a beautiful outdoor setting.

tours.name: Wildernis EHBO
tours.description: Master life-saving skills tailored for outdoor adventures, from controlling bleeding to handling burns and hypothermia. Prepare for emergencies in nature with hands-on training designed for bushcraft enthusiasts.

tours.name: The Floating Café
tours.description: Cruise Amsterdam’s historic sloop, The Ivan Frank, and enjoy stunning canal views, tasty homemade snacks, and warm hospitality. Glide past iconic landmarks and hidden gems on this cozy, floating café adventure.

tours.name: Flower Boat - Public Cruise
tours.description: Sail past UNESCO windmills and vibrant green houses on a scenic 25-minute cruise. Capture stunning photos under a floral arch, enjoy the scent of cacao, and hear fascinating stories of local history and industry from your expert skipper.

tours.name: Pizza and Drinks Bike Amsterdam
tours.description: Hop on a lively bike tour through Amsterdam with cold beer, prosecco, and pizza. Enjoy 75 minutes of sightseeing, music, and fun, with breaks to relax and refuel. Perfect for parties and memorable adventures.

tours.name: Private Karaoke Bike Utrecht
tours.description: Sing your heart out on Utrecht’s private Karaoke Bike, cruising for 75 minutes with drinks, lively music, and fun games. Perfect for birthdays or parties—turn the city into your personal stage and create unforgettable memories.

tours.name: 10 persoons boot van aluminium
tours.description: Sail through Berger- en Egmondermeer’s vibrant flora and fauna on a motorboat, with options for picnics or a scenic Alkmaar canal tour—perfect for a relaxing, nature-filled day on the water.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum... Better With A Licensed Guide!
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour private tour of the Rijksmuseum, guided by an expert who reveals the hidden gems of the Dutch Golden Age. Delve into the rich history, vibrant symbols, and daily life of the past, making this an unforgettable exploration of art and culture.

tours.name: Alpaca wandeling
tours.description: Stroll across scenic land with friendly alpacas, enjoy meet & greets, and snap plenty of selfies. Perfect for animal lovers seeking a fun, outdoor adventure in a relaxed, picturesque setting.

tours.name: Bubbels & Wandeling
tours.description: Share a romantic 2-hour walk with alpacas, enjoy cava, oysters, and tasty bites in scenic outdoor or cozy indoor settings. Perfect for couples seeking a charming, memorable date with gentle, friendly alpacas.

tours.name: Free Guided Diamond Factory Group Tour
tours.description: Experience the allure of diamonds with a guided tour at Royal Coster Diamonds, the world's oldest diamond polishing factory in Amsterdam. Witness master craftsmen at work, explore the largest collection of unset diamonds outside Antwerp, and enjoy tax-free shopping. This unique opportunity offers a glimpse into the enchanting world of diamonds.

tours.name: Toegangskaarten Museum Bredius
tours.description: Discover the exquisite private collection of Abraham Bredius at Museum Bredius, housed in an elegant 18th-century mansion. Marvel at masterpieces by Rembrandt and Jan Steen, all restored to their original brilliance. Experience the unique ambiance of a historic home, where art and history come alive in a captivating setting.

tours.name: Prosecco Boot
tours.description: Experience a unique Prosecco boat cruise through the picturesque canals of The Hague. Enjoy unlimited chilled prosecco and delicious snacks while listening to your own music. Perfect for bachelorette parties, team gatherings, or a fun outing with friends, this 1.5-hour adventure promises unforgettable moments and bubbly delight.

tours.name: Natuurwandeling aanbetaling * Nature walk deposit
tours.description: Join a 90-minute woodland walk with adorable alpacas in Zeeland. Feed, take selfies, and enjoy a peaceful trek through nature, perfect for families with kids aged 5 and up. An unforgettable animal adventure awaits.

tours.name: Tandem Waterbike verhuur Breda
tours.description: Explore Breda from the water on a fun, eco-friendly waterbike. Glide at 14 km/h, easily steer forward or backward, and enjoy a relaxing ride for 1 or 2 hours—perfect for a unique city adventure.

tours.name: High tea met alpaca's (zonder wandeling)
tours.description: Relax with a cozy High Tea in our AlpaCafé, surrounded by gentle alpacas. Feed, pet, and cuddle these curious, soft creatures as they wander nearby, making your winter visit truly unforgettable.

tours.name: 3 Uren - Gravel bike
tours.description: Experience the thrill of gravel biking in Hilversum, where you can choose from a range of high-quality bikes, including Basic and Premium options. Enjoy expertly maintained bikes, complete with helmets and optional pedals, as you explore stunning routes through forests and heathlands. Perfect for groups, with delivery available!

tours.name: Week - Gravel bike
tours.description: Experience the thrill of gravel biking in Hilversum for a week! Choose from a range of high-quality bikes, complete with helmets and modern features. Explore stunning routes through forests and heathlands, with options for group rentals and delivery. Enjoy well-maintained bikes, ensuring a memorable adventure in nature.

tours.name: Private Boat Magical Light Festival Canal Cruise -  Mulled Wine
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s canals to see stunning light art during the festival’s “Loading” theme. Enjoy unlimited hot drinks, gluhwein, and expert commentary while cozying up on heated boats—an unforgettable winter experience.

tours.name: Shared groepsrondvaart
tours.description: Join a cozy 1-hour boat tour through Dordrecht’s charming center on our spacious Felicità. Small groups, seasonal surprises, and covered seating ensure a relaxing, memorable cruise—perfect for any weather.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart van 1 uur
tours.description: Experience the charm of Dordrecht, the Venice of the North, with a private one-hour boat tour through its historic harbors. Gather your family, friends, or colleagues for a unique adventure aboard one of four luxurious boats, creating unforgettable memories as you explore this picturesque city from the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart van 1,5 uur
tours.description: Experience a private 1.5-hour boat tour through the enchanting historic center of Dordrecht. Gather your family, friends, or colleagues for a luxurious journey aboard one of four elegant vessels. Enjoy the charm of the old harbors while creating unforgettable memories on your own exclusive cruise.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart van 2 uur
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour boat tour through the stunning Hollandse Biesbosch, Europe's largest freshwater tidal area. Experience the beauty of this protected nature reserve with family, friends, or colleagues. Choose from four private boats for a memorable adventure in a breathtaking seasonal landscape.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart van 3 uur
tours.description: Experience a private 3-hour boat tour through the historic city of Dordrecht and the stunning Biesbosch nature reserve. Gather your family or friends for an unforgettable adventure, exploring ancient harbors aboard your own luxurious vessel. Choose from four elegant boats and create lasting memories on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart van 2,5 uur
tours.description: Experience a unique 2.5-hour private boat tour through Dordrecht's historic city center and the stunning Biesbosch nature reserve. Gather your family or friends for an unforgettable adventure aboard one of our luxurious boats, exploring ancient harbors and picturesque landscapes, all while enjoying the beauty of the waterways.

tours.name: Shared | Water & Wandelen
tours.description: Explore Dordrecht’s rich history with a lively 1.5-hour combo of scenic boat ride and interactive city walk, revealing hidden gems from water and land, plus a free city map to enhance your adventure.

tours.name: Plastic Fishing - Basisscholen Amsterdam
tours.description: Kids fish plastic from Amsterdam’s canals in colorful boats, learning how their actions help the environment. Fun teamwork, hands-on cleanup, and a positive message make this a memorable, impactful adventure.

tours.name: Jouw eigen Jutevenement (bedrijfsuitje)
tours.description: Join a fun, eco-friendly beach cleanup in Zandvoort, learn about plastic pollution, and help make the world cleaner. Enjoy outdoor teamwork, see circular plastic products, and leave with a sense of purpose—all in two hours.

tours.name: Private Cruise on partially covered boat with skipper
tours.description: Sail through Dutch history and scenery on a cozy, weatherproof boat. Choose 1 to 2.5 hours to see windmills, charming towns, and heritage sites, all with expert commentary and stunning water views.

tours.name: Private Van Gogh Museum Private Tour (Hotel)
tours.description: Explore Van Gogh’s life and masterpieces on a private 2-hour tour. Dive into his story, see Sunflowers and Potato Eaters, and uncover what made him a post-impressionist legend—without the long lines.

tours.name: Private Rijksmuseum Tour (Hotel)
tours.description: Enjoy a personalized 2-hour private tour of the Rijksmuseum, exploring Dutch masterpieces like Rembrandt’s Nachtwacht, learning their stories, history, and techniques, all while soaking in the stunning building and vibrant art scene.

tours.name: Day Tour to Antwerp and Ghent from Amsterdam
tours.description: Journey through Belgium’s rich history and vibrant culture in a day. Marvel at Ghent’s medieval castle and Gothic cathedral, then explore Antwerp’s stunning Renaissance square, iconic cathedral, and bustling Diamond District. Relax with scenic canal views or a boat ride, immersing yourself in two captivating cities full of art, architecture, and legends.

tours.name: Bring Your Own Drinks Bike Amsterdam
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam for 75 minutes on a comfy bike, bring your own drinks, enjoy lively sightseeing, music, and social fun with friends—an unforgettable, customizable adventure you won’t find anywhere else.

tours.name: Tickets Amsterdam Light festival
tours.description: Experience the enchanting Amsterdam Light Festival from the comfort of a fully electric sloop. Sip mulled wine or hot chocolate as you glide silently through the canals, guided by an enthusiastic captain sharing stories behind stunning artworks. This unique cruise combines art, culture, and relaxation for an unforgettable evening.

tours.name: Rotterdam Delfshaven Rondleiding
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through Delfshaven, Rotterdam's hidden gem, with a knowledgeable guide. Explore the charming 17th-century architecture, visit the iconic Pelgrimskerk, and uncover the rich history of the Pilgrim Fathers. Experience the unique atmosphere and discover local secrets as you stroll along picturesque canals and historic buildings.

tours.name: 3 Dagen - Gravel bike
tours.description: Experience three thrilling days of gravel biking in Hilversum! Choose from a wide selection of well-maintained bikes, complete with helmets and optional click pedals. Explore stunning routes through forests and heathlands, all while enjoying top-notch service. Perfect for groups, this adventure promises unforgettable outdoor fun!

tours.name: Rotterdam Duurzaamheid Tour
tours.description: Embark on a unique cycling tour through Rotterdam, exploring innovative entrepreneurs committed to sustainability. Visit a circular hardware store and the world’s first floating farm, all while learning from a knowledgeable local guide about the pioneers shaping the city’s future. Experience the blend of nature and innovation firsthand!

tours.name: Highlights of Holland, Zaanse Schans, Edam, Volendam
tours.description: Discover Holland’s charm in one day: see historic windmills, watch wooden clogs being made, taste authentic cheeses, explore colorful fishing villages, and learn about Dutch traditions—all with private guide.

tours.name: Spectacular Evening Cruise (18+) - Departure Herengracht 128 on boat Stan Huygens
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s enchanting canals at sunset, savor local cheeses, and enjoy seasonal craft beers and wines in a relaxed, intimate setting. Perfect for unwinding and connecting in style.

tours.name: Half Day Tour Zaanse Schans from Amsterdam
tours.description: Step into 18th-century Holland at Zaanse Schans, where windmills, wooden houses, and rich history come alive. Savor Gouda cheese, hot chocolate, and stroopwafels, then watch traditional clog-making—an authentic Dutch experience.

tours.name: Hollands Finest Zaanse Schans, Volendam, Marken and Cheese farm Tour
tours.description: Explore Holland’s highlights in one day: windmills, cheese tastings, traditional villages, scenic ferry rides, and historic wooden houses—immersing you in Dutch culture and timeless charm.

tours.name: A visit to Camp Westerbork
tours.description: Embark on a poignant journey from Amsterdam to Camp Westerbork, where you'll explore the harrowing history of WWII and the fate of over 100,000 Jews. With an expert guide, reflect at the 102,000 Stones monument and discover the Secret Village, deepening your understanding of this significant chapter in history.

tours.name: Discover the roots of Nazi Germany
tours.description: Embark on a compelling 5-day journey through pivotal sites of World War II, from Munich to Vienna. Led by a knowledgeable guide, explore Dachau, Berchtesgaden, and Mauthausen, with a customizable itinerary tailored to your interests. This unique private tour offers an in-depth look at the historical events that shaped Europe.

tours.name: Red Light District Tour 1.5hr
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s hidden past on a night walk through the Red Light District, exploring historic sites, vibrant streets, and stories of sex work, culture, and freedom with insights from a former dominatrix.

tours.name: Cheese experience
tours.description: Discover the art of cheese-making in this engaging and educational experience. Learn the secrets behind crafting delicious cheese, from ingredients to techniques, and immerse yourself in the rich traditions of this timeless culinary craft. It's a unique opportunity to deepen your knowledge and appreciation for one of the world's favorite foods.

tours.name: Red Light District Primetime Private Tour (18+)
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam's Red Light District like never before on a private nighttime tour. Guided by an expert, explore its iconic sights and hidden stories while soaking in the illuminated canals and historic architecture. This customizable journey reveals the area's rich history and vibrant culture, making it a truly unforgettable adventure.

tours.name: Private Canal Boat Tour
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s UNESCO canals in your own private, elegant boat. Enjoy personalized routes, expert guides, and seamless service—perfect for special moments, celebrations, or simply discovering the city in style.

tours.name: Bean to Bar Experience - Public
tours.description: Watch cacao transform into luscious chocolate in a live demo. Smell, touch, taste, and create your own sweet treat while exploring cacao’s journey from bean to bar in the historic Zaan region.

tours.name: Bean to Bar Experience - Private
tours.description: Unleash your senses in a 45-minute private chocolate workshop. Watch, smell, taste, and touch cacao from bean to bar, then craft your own sweet treat in this immersive, flavorful journey through Zaandijk’s cacao legacy.

tours.name: Working with Chocolate - Private
tours.description: Create your own chocolate masterpieces in a fun, relaxed setting. Learn the bean-to-bar process, craft personalized bars and bonbons, then take home two delicious treats—perfect for celebrating with friends or colleagues.

tours.name: Make you own Bonbon - Private
tours.description: Create your own exquisite bonbons in a hands-on workshop, shaping and filling chocolates with smooth ganache and delicate shells. No experience needed—leave with a box of treats and recipes to craft more at home.

tours.name: Gel Blaster Kids
tours.description: Step onto a giant playing field for gelblaster fun! Shoot tiny, biodegradable gel balls in a safe, action-packed game that mixes strategy and teamwork—perfect for all ages and skill levels.

tours.name: Wadlopen
tours.description: Explore Wieringen’s stunning Waddenzee on a 3.5-hour adventure: walk through mudflats, enjoy boat rides, and embrace nature’s freedom. Perfect for ages 6+, with options for the little ones and tasty treats afterward.

tours.name: Wadlopen - Fish & Chips
tours.description: Join a 4-hour adventure with boat rides, seal spotting, and a 1.5-hour guided mudflat walk. End with classic fish & chips—perfect for ages 6 and up, with options for the little ones to stay onboard.

tours.name: Garnalenvissen Prive
tours.description: Experience the thrill of shrimp fishing in a fun and educational setting! Join us for a unique two-hour adventure where you can explore the waters with your own group or choose a different day. Don’t forget your camera and binoculars to capture the memories and wildlife!

tours.name: 1,5 uur Step verhuur
tours.description: Discover Utrecht like never before on a kickbike! In just 1.5 hours, experience the thrill of exploring the city at a fast pace. Glide along the scenic Singel or venture through beautiful cycling routes, making this a unique and exciting way to see Utrecht's charm.

tours.name: 2,5 uur Step verhuur
tours.description: Experience Utrecht like never before on a kickbike! In just 2.5 hours, glide through the city at a thrilling pace, exploring scenic routes and the picturesque Singel. This sporty and fun alternative to cycling offers a unique way to discover the charm of Utrecht.

tours.name: 3 uur Step verhuur
tours.description: Discover Utrecht like never before on a kickbike! In just three hours, experience the city at a thrilling pace, gliding along the scenic Singel or exploring beautiful cycling routes. This unique and sporty adventure promises an exciting way to see Utrecht's charm and beauty.

tours.name: 3,5 uur Step verhuur
tours.description: Discover Utrecht in an exhilarating way with our kickbike tour! Over 3.5 hours, you'll zip through the city at a lively pace, exploring scenic routes and the charming Singel. Experience the thrill of a kickbike—it's a more dynamic and enjoyable alternative to cycling!

tours.name: 4 uur Step verhuur
tours.description: Discover Utrecht in a thrilling way with our kickbike tour! In just four hours, you’ll zip through the city at a fast pace, exploring scenic routes and the beautiful Singel. Experience the excitement of a kickbike—it's a sportier and more enjoyable alternative to cycling!

tours.name: Quartiere Jordaan, Anna Frank (esterno) e zona dei canali
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam beyond the crowds with a 2-hour tour through Jordaan’s hidden canals, historic houses, and quiet alleys. Discover local secrets, charming bridges, and authentic life away from tourist spots.

tours.name: 360 Video Booth: Premium
tours.description: Elevate your event with the 360 Video Booth, offering an immersive experience where guests create stunning videos from every angle. With instant sharing capabilities and professional lighting, this unique attraction is perfect for any occasion, ensuring unforgettable memories and dynamic content that will captivate everyone.

tours.name: Explorer Tour
tours.description: Paddle through Amsterdam’s waterways, visiting iconic sights and hidden gems. Feel the breeze, see stunning views, and enjoy a memorable 3-hour adventure off the beaten path with expert guides.

tours.name: Mirror Booth: Premium
tours.description: Elevate your event with our interactive photo booth experience! Enjoy unlimited printing, personalized photo strips, and instant digital delivery. With easy touchscreen operation and professional lighting, it’s perfect for weddings, corporate events, and parties, ensuring laughter and lasting memories for all your guests. Transform your celebration today!

tours.name: Private Cruise on Open Boat With Skipper - 30 pax
tours.description: Sail past historic windmills and scenic riverside views on the area's only 30-passenger boat. Savor delicious pizzas, Dutch cheese, and wine while enjoying an intimate, relaxing cruise designed for unforgettable moments.

tours.name: Private Zaanse Schans Tour from Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore Zaanse Schans’s windmills, wooden shoes, and cheese farms on a private, scenic tour. Make clogs, peek inside historic mills, and taste 20+ cheeses—all with your own guide for a personalized Dutch adventure.

tours.name: Private Day Trip to Giethoorn from Amsterdam
tours.description: Sail through Giethoorn’s picturesque canals on a private boat, explore charming thatched-roof farms, and capture stunning photos. Enjoy a scenic drive, local cuisine, and a peaceful escape from the city.

tours.name: Royal The Hague
tours.description: Walk through The Hague’s royal and political history, from Binnenhof to Noordeinde Palace and the Peace Palace. Uncover hidden neighborhoods, enjoy private guided insights, and capture memorable moments—all in an exclusive tour.

tours.name: In-room Escape Experience
tours.description: Embark on a thrilling escape adventure aboard the ss Rotterdam! Experience the excitement of an escape room in a unique way as you become a detective, unraveling the mystery of the pirates on board. This captivating activity is perfect for creating unforgettable memories with friends, family, or colleagues!

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Summer Dress - Amsterdam West
tours.description: Create your own stretchy leggings in 3 hours with guidance from fashion designers, using organic fabrics and mastering overlock sewing. Leave with a finished piece and new skills in fabric cutting and finishing.

tours.name: Kitesurfen - 3 daagse
tours.description: Master the art of kitesurfing with three lessons that guarantee you'll ride solo. With gear included and plenty of water time, you'll build confidence and skill in no time.

tours.name: The Gut & Mind Fermentation Workshop: Kimchi and Kefir
tours.description: Create your own probiotic-rich fermented vegetables in a fun, hands-on workshop. Learn the science behind gut health and the mind connection, and take home your personalized jar in this small-group experience.

tours.name: Rondleiding in Museum In Het Houten Huis
tours.description: Experience history like never before at the In Het Houten Huis museum. Join your group for an engaging tour led by our passionate volunteer guides, who will bring the past to life with fascinating stories and insights. Discover the unique charm of our exhibits and create unforgettable memories together.

tours.name: Make use of the Industrial Sewing Machine - West
tours.description: Work on your own sewing projects using top-quality machines and tools in a cozy atelier. Bring your fabrics, enjoy fresh water and cookies, and create at your own pace—perfect for all skill levels, without guidance.

tours.name: Upcycling Project in the Sewing Café with Guidance
tours.description: Transform old clothes into new favorites with expert help. Bring your ideas, use our tools and patterns, and create sustainable, personalized garments in a friendly, fully equipped sewing café.

tours.name: Central Station: A Spanish Latin Cruise; a Spanish welcome to Amsterdam
tours.description: Enjoy a relaxed 90-minute electric boat cruise through Amsterdam’s UNESCO canals. Savor stunning views, lively stories, Dutch treats, and Latin warmth—all in an eco-friendly, open-air setting perfect for friends and family.

tours.name: The Story of Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour journey through Amsterdam's rich 800-year history. Explore the historic center, from the bustling Beurs Square to the intriguing Red Light District and Chinatown. Discover hidden gems, enjoy a coffee break, and learn about the city's cultural evolution, all while strolling along picturesque canals.

tours.name: Pijl en boogschieten
tours.description: Channel your inner Robin Hood in 50 minutes of archery fun. Perfect for all ages, guided by experts, set in beautiful nature—relax, aim, and enjoy a thrilling, memorable outdoor adventure.

tours.name: Buksschieten
tours.description: Test your aim on a real rifle at Outdoor-Delft’s shooting range. Receive expert instructions, then fire unlimited rounds at targets—perfect for sharpening your skills and feeling like a true sharpshooter.

tours.name: Openbare Street Art Tour
tours.description: Explore Leeuwarden’s vibrant street art scene on a lively 1.5-hour tour, uncovering murals, graffiti, and hidden artworks with expert guides. Discover new pieces and local stories in this colorful urban adventure.

tours.name: Delightful Amsterdam
tours.description: Embark on a unique 5-hour bike tour that introduces you to five local businesses and offers five delightful tastings across four familiar neighborhoods. Enjoy the experience exclusively with your group, while exploring hidden gems and savoring vegetarian options. Access an online guide to navigate your culinary adventure seamlessly.

tours.name: Company Beach Cleanup Plastic Whale
tours.description: Join a lively 2-hour beach cleanup with colleagues, collecting trash and learning about plastic pollution. Feel the joy of making a real difference while enjoying a fun, team-building outdoor adventure.

tours.name: 1,5 uur Elektrische Step verhuur
tours.description: Experience Utrecht like never before on an electric scooter! Rent one for 1.5 to 4 hours and explore scenic routes through the historic city and lush nature. Perfect for groups, enjoy the thrill of steppin' along the picturesque Oude Gracht or the enchanting Singel, with plenty of stops for refreshments.

tours.name: 2 uur Elektrische Step verhuur
tours.description: Experience Utrecht like never before on an electric scooter! Explore scenic routes through the historic city center and lush nature, perfect for groups of up to 20. Enjoy the thrill of steppin' along the picturesque Oude Gracht or the enchanting Singel, with plenty of stops for refreshments along the way.

tours.name: 2,5 uur Elektrische Step verhuur
tours.description: Experience Utrecht like never before on an electric scooter! Explore scenic routes through the historic city center and lush nature, perfect for groups of up to 20. Enjoy the thrill of riding along the picturesque Oude Gracht or the scenic Singel, with plenty of stops for refreshments along the way.

tours.name: 3 uur Elektrische Step verhuur
tours.description: Experience Utrecht like never before on an electric scooter! Rent one for 1.5 to 4 hours and explore scenic routes through the city and nature. Perfect for groups, enjoy the historic canals, charming terraces, and beautiful parks. Discover Utrecht’s hidden gems while having fun and staying active!

tours.name: 3,5 uur Elektrische Step verhuur
tours.description: Experience Utrecht like never before on an electric scooter! Rent one for 1.5 to 4 hours and explore scenic routes through the city and nature. Perfect for groups, enjoy the historic canals, charming terraces, and beautiful parks. Adventure awaits with options to combine scooting with paddleboarding or canoeing!

tours.name: 4 uur Elektrische Step verhuur
tours.description: Experience Utrecht like never before on an electric scooter! Rent one for 1.5 to 4 hours and explore scenic routes through the historic city and lush nature. Perfect for groups, enjoy the thrill of steppin' along the picturesque Oude Gracht or the enchanting Singel while taking breaks at charming eateries.

tours.name: Canal Cruise with Dutch Pancakes and optional Drinks
tours.description: Sail through UNESCO-listed Amsterdam canals and enjoy stunning views while savoring the city's best freshly made Dutch pancakes. A lively guide shares stories, making this 75-minute cruise unforgettable.

tours.name: Holland Dream Private Tour (Zaanse Schans - Volendam - Giethoorn)
tours.description: Embark on a full-day Holland Dream Private Tour, exploring the enchanting landscapes of Zaanse Schans, Volendam, and Giethoorn. Experience working windmills, savor Dutch herring, and cruise serene canals. With personalized guidance and cultural insights, this journey promises unforgettable memories steeped in Dutch heritage and breathtaking beauty.

tours.name: Holland Wonderful Private Tour (Keukenhof Gardens - Volendam - Zaanse Schans)
tours.description: Experience the enchanting beauty of Holland on a full-day private tour. Explore the vibrant Keukenhof Gardens, the charming Volendam fishing village, and iconic windmills at Zaanse Schans. With a knowledgeable guide and all-inclusive activities, this journey promises unforgettable sights and rich cultural experiences in a single day.

tours.name: Mirror Booth: VIP Exclusive
tours.description: Elevate your event with our interactive photo booth experience! Enjoy unlimited prints, personalized photo strips, and instant access to digital photos. With professional lighting and a 32-inch touchscreen, your guests will create unforgettable memories while having fun. Perfect for weddings, corporate events, and parties—make your celebration truly unique!

tours.name: Walking Dinner Tour - Private Tour
tours.description: Savor a 4-hour culinary journey with delicious snacks, a full meal, desserts, and four drinks, all tailored to your interests. Enjoy personalized guides, flexible pickup, and a taste of Amsterdam’s vibrant food scene.

tours.name: Dutch Craft Beer & Food Tour - Private Groups
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s highlights in four immersive hours, with flexible private or group options, easy booking, and convenient pickup near Central Station. Uncover the city’s secrets on a personalized tour.

tours.name: Beginner Sewing Course: Baby Clothes (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create adorable baby clothes in a beginner-friendly workshop. Sew two garments like pants or a bib, guided by a fashion expert, using all materials provided. Perfect for beginners eager to craft lasting keepsakes.

tours.name: Jazz in de Gracht Borrel Boot
tours.description: Sail along the canal as live jazz tunes fill the air, sipping cold drinks and snacking on treats. Enjoy a lively boat ride that ends near the Jazz in de Gracht festival—perfect for music lovers seeking a unique experience.

tours.name: Walk & Boat
tours.description: Explore Middelburg’s history on a 1.5-hour walking tour, enjoy a delicious high tea or lunch, then glide through scenic canals while hearing stories of its VOC past—an unforgettable city adventure.

tours.name: Street Art Tour - Private Dutch
tours.description: Discover Utrecht like never before with a personalized tour tailored just for you and your group! Engage in a conversation to share your interests, and enjoy unique experiences, from street art to local cuisine. With flexible options and expert local guides, explore the city’s rich history and vibrant culture.

tours.name: Dé Kerstpakket Wandeling
tours.description: Experience a unique Christmas celebration in Rotterdam with the Kerstpakket Wandeling! Stroll through the city while curating your own sustainable holiday gift basket filled with local treasures. Discover the stories behind each product and enjoy a delightful outing perfect for all ages, exploring hidden gems along the way.

tours.name: Intrepid Expedition through the Redlight District (Spanish Tour)
tours.description: Uncover the fascinating history of Amsterdam’s Redlight District, from medieval roots to its Golden Age rise. Walk through narrow streets, see historic canals, and explore hidden chapels. Hear captivating stories of how commerce, culture, and vice transformed this area into a symbol of progressive attitudes and lively nightlife.

tours.name: Unveiling the Secrets of Amsterdam´s Redlight District.
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s Red Light District secrets, from historic canals and vibrant Zeedijk to the oldest streets and the iconic Oude Kerk. Dive into its rich history, colorful stories, and hidden gems in this immersive tour.

tours.name: Excursão cidade do Lego de Zaandam
tours.description: Explore the picturesque city of Zaandam, known for its Lego charm and Monet's history. This three-hour tour invites you to wander enchanting streets while savoring traditional Dutch delicacies like "Haring" and the famous croquette. Enjoy a guided experience in Portuguese or Spanish, complete with round-trip train tickets from Amsterdam.

tours.name: Privé Anne Frank en Joodse Geschiedenis Tour
tours.description: Step into Amsterdam’s WWII past with a tour through the Jewish quarter, visiting Anne Frank’s former home and hearing gripping stories of resistance and history that shaped the city’s brave legacy.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Tube Top or Skirt (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own stylish tube top or skirt in just 3 hours, learning to sew with stretchy fabrics and a serger. Choose sustainable materials, get expert guidance, and leave with a finished piece in a fun, flexible class.

tours.name: Zaanse Schans Luxury Private Bus Tour + Volendam/Edam (7 guests)
tours.description: Experience the heart of Holland on a luxury private bus tour to Zaanse Schans. Explore iconic windmills, charming wooden houses, and traditional workshops. Enhance your journey with visits to picturesque Volendam and historic Edam, renowned for its cheese. This unforgettable day blends culture, history, and stunning scenery in one remarkable adventure.

tours.name: Upcycle Top Workshop (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Transform jersey scraps into a stylish upcycled top in just three hours. Choose your style, learn serger techniques, and create a unique piece—perfect for confident beginners ready to craft with fabric.

tours.name: Prive Kitesurfles
tours.description: Jump into the water with our practical kite surfing lessons—no waiting, just action. Get personalized guidance, quick results, and all gear included. Feel the thrill of riding the waves from your very first try.

tours.name: Fiets huren op Centraal Station
tours.description: Rent a lightweight, easy-to-handle bike at Amsterdam’s Central Station and explore vibrant neighborhoods, scenic canals, and lively streets—plus hop on the free ferry to discover Noord’s famed eateries.

tours.name: Top 7 sights Amsterdam bike tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s top sights in just 90 minutes, from Vondelpark to lively squares. Enjoy scenic stops, local stories, and iconic landmarks—all on a comfortable bike perfect for quick, fun city adventures.

tours.name: Maastricht Highlights Walking Tour with a Local Expert Guide
tours.description: Explore Maastricht’s charming streets, medieval basilicas, ancient city walls, lively squares, and hidden gems like a beautiful bookshop. A perfect day trip filled with history, culture, and vibrant local life.

tours.name: Amsterdam: Anne Frank History Walking Tour
tours.description: Pedal through Amsterdam’s iconic sights in 1.5 hours, from historic Dam Square to scenic canals. Capture photos, hear fascinating stories, and soak up local culture on a lively, intimate bike adventure.

tours.name: Car Smash Amsterdam
tours.description: Unleash your stress by smashing a real car with bats, sledgehammers, or golf clubs. Feel the power, hear the crashes, and enjoy a safe, exhilarating hour of pure destruction in a supervised scrap yard.

tours.name: Company Fishing Rabobank
tours.description: Join a private boat tour and help clean Amsterdam’s canals by fishing out plastic. Compete for prizes, learn about plastic pollution, and enjoy a fun, eco-friendly adventure with your team.

tours.name: Plastic Jagen - Basisscholen, NL
tours.description: Join a lively beach cleanup to help create a plastic-free land and sea. Work with colleagues, learn about pollution, and enjoy a fun, impactful 2-hour eco-activity that leaves a lasting positive mark on the planet.

tours.name: Fietstour Rondje Stad!
tours.description: Cycle through Groningen’s best and hidden gems—majestic towers, lively markets, peaceful parks, and quirky spots—uncover the city’s vibrant history and modern charm in one unforgettable tour.

tours.name: Privé Fietstour Rondje Stad!
tours.description: Cycle through Groningen’s best and hidden gems—majestic towers, lively markets, peaceful parks, and quirky spots—uncovering the city’s vibrant history and modern charm in one unforgettable tour.

tours.name: Combination ticket - Cocktail at LuminAir & Amsterdam Canal Cruise
tours.description: Float through Amsterdam’s scenic canals, then toast to stunning skyline views from the skybar’s terrace with a refreshing cocktail. An unforgettable blend of water, city, and sky awaits you.

tours.name: Stadsrondvaart Groningen - Klassieker - 1 uur
tours.description: Sail through Groningen’s historic waterway, passing landmarks like Martinitoren and the Groninger Museum. Enjoy a drink onboard while uncovering 30+ sights and stories of the city’s maritime past, guided by a historian’s expert narration.

tours.name: Amsterdam guided walking tour in Turkish
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s transformation from a fishing village to a trading powerhouse. Explore its rich history, vibrant culture, iconic architecture, and the stories behind its famous canals and tolerant spirit.

tours.name: Giethoorn and Zaanse Schans
tours.description: Experience the enchanting charm of Giethoorn and Zaanse Schans on this 8-hour tour. Glide through picturesque canals on a guided boat ride, marvel at iconic windmills, and visit a wooden shoe workshop. Perfect for capturing unforgettable memories in authentic Dutch villages, this adventure is a must for any traveler.

tours.name: Excursión a Kinderdijk y Gouda
tours.description: Explore the Netherlands' golden age with a day at Kinderdijk’s UNESCO windmills, then wander Gouda’s historic streets, marvel at stunning architecture, and taste world-famous cheese on this immersive 8-hour tour.

tours.name: Dag skirm
tours.description: Join intense airsoft skirmishes on a 180x50m upgraded outdoor CQB field. Tackle tactical missions, enjoy fast-paced gameplay, and team up in a lively, well-organized environment—perfect for adrenaline and strategy.

tours.name: Natuurfotodag
tours.description: Join a 5-hour outdoor photography workshop in Leersum Veld, guided by pros. Use your own camera to learn about light, composition, and field techniques amid stunning nature. Perfect for all skill levels.

tours.name: Slijpen van Mes en Bijl
tours.description: Join us for an engaging workshop in Loosdrecht, where you'll master the art of sharpening, polishing, and stropping knives and axes. Learn to use various sharpening stones and tools while enjoying the scenic outdoor views. Bring your own tools for a personalized experience, ensuring your equipment is always razor-sharp.

tours.name: EHBO
tours.description: Master bushcraft emergencies with our 2-day EHBBO course in Leersum. Learn life-saving skills like wound care, splints, and rescue signals, all in stunning forest surroundings around a campfire.

tours.name: Klassenuitje 2 uur
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s highlights in 2 hours: explore Jordaan, Vondelpark, the iconic canals, the narrowest house, and the love bridge, all with a friendly guide at a relaxed pace.

tours.name: Het Wilde Diner
tours.description: Join a 3.5-hour wildpluk adventure at Voedseltuin Rotterdam, where you gather fresh ingredients, cook over open fire, and enjoy a outdoor feast in a lush city oasis—perfect for friends or team outings.

tours.name: Schilder je eigen tegel! (Putten)
tours.description: Enjoy a warm drink as you receive a quick intro, then dive right in to create your own tile, blending relaxation with hands-on fun in a cozy setting.

tours.name: Amsterdam Highlights Fietstour met Lunch
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s iconic canals and historic sights, then relax with a traditional Dutch lunch in Vondelpark. Enjoy views of the Rijksmuseum, Magere Brug, and learn fun stories from a friendly guide.

tours.name: Wandelpony
tours.description: Experience the joy of walking with ponies through the beautiful nature of Terschelling. This delightful activity is perfect for younger children, allowing them to bond with the ponies while exploring the outdoors, all under the watchful eye of a parent. A memorable adventure for little ones!

tours.name: One Hour Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the joy of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges thanks to our insurance. With a wide selection for the whole family, we guarantee you'll find the perfect ride for your adventure!

tours.name: Three Hour Bike Rental - Central Station
tours.description: Experience the joy of cycling with our top-quality city bikes, designed for comfort and fun. Enjoy peace of mind with included locks and no damage charges. With a wide selection for the whole family and guaranteed availability, your perfect ride awaits. Just bring a credit card or ID to get started!

With a wide selection available, you’re guaranteed to find the perfect ride for your adventure. Rent your bike and explore today!

tours.name: Stadswandeling Hugo de Groot
tours.description: Discover Delft through the eyes of Hugo de Groot on this captivating city walk. Explore the rich history of the sixteenth and seventeenth centuries as you trace de Groot's life and the significant events that shaped the city during his era. A unique journey into the past awaits!

tours.name: Stadswandeling Johannes Vermeer
tours.description: Walk through 17th-century Delft, tracing Vermeer's life and the city's history. Immerse yourself in the world of Johannes Vermeer and see Delft through his eyes on this captivating city tour.

tours.name: Diepzeebedrog
tours.description: Experience the thrill of an escape room aboard the historic ss Rembrandt! With just 60 minutes to thwart Captain Manus Goudkamp's sinister plans, teamwork is essential. Perfect for groups of up to 12, you can even compete against another team. Enhance your adventure with delicious dining options available on-site!

tours.name: Metro
tours.description: Experience the thrill of a unique escape room adventure set in the bustling atmosphere of Rotterdam's Central Station. With just 80 minutes to solve puzzles and catch your ship, the pressure mounts as time ticks away. Enhance your visit with delightful dining options before or after your escape!

tours.name: High Tea
tours.description: Enjoy a 1.5-hour high tea in our alpaca field with a four-course menu, unlimited tea, coffee, and juice. Feed the gentle alpacas and relax in a scenic, farm setting—perfect for a memorable, cozy gathering.

tours.name: Picknick
tours.description: Enjoy a relaxing hour with friendly alpacas in the pasture, including a picnic with unlimited juice and the chance to feed the animals—perfect for animal lovers and families alike.

tours.name: Museumweek rondleiding met toegangsbewijs
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s Diamant Museum and uncover 400 years of diamond history. See legendary jewels, learn how diamonds form over billions of years, and become a true diamond expert in just one hour.

tours.name: 3 Uren - Mountainbike Huren Hilversum
tours.description: Race through scenic trails near Hilversum on a well-maintained mountain bike, included route vignet, free roadside support, and gear suited for all ages. Feel the thrill of Utrechtse Heuvelrug’s stunning landscapes.

tours.name: 3 uren MTB huren | Lage Vuursche
tours.description: Ride fresh, well-maintained mountainbikes along scenic routes at Lage Vuursche. Perfect for kids and adults, with free parking, helmets, and all gear included—reserve now for an adventure on Utrecht’s beautiful trails.

tours.name: Dag - Mountainbike Huren Hilversum
tours.description: Rent over 200 modern mountainbikes for all ages and sizes, ride scenic routes near Hilversum, and enjoy included vignetts, free pechservice, and well-maintained bikes—perfect for a full day of adventure on the Utrechtse Heuvelrug.

With over 200 well-maintained bikes for all ages, including modern 29ers, you'll have access to stunning trails just 12 minutes away. Enjoy included services like free breakdown assistance and helmet rentals, ensuring a memorable adventure in the beautiful Utrechtse Heuvelrug.

tours.description: Discover a diverse range of rental bikes in Bloemendaal, catering to every preference! Choose from comfortable to sporty models, all meticulously maintained. tours.name: Centro Histórico e Moinhos - Tour Privado
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 7-hour journey from Amsterdam to the picturesque Zaanse Schans, where you'll explore historic windmills, witness traditional wooden clog-making, and savor delicious Dutch cheeses. After a lunch break, dive into Amsterdam's rich history, visiting iconic sites like the Dam and the Flower Market, ensuring an unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Centro Histórico: DAM, Bairro Chinês, Bairro Judeu e Mercado das Flores - Tour Privado
tours.description: Embark on a captivating three-hour private tour of Amsterdam's historic center, exploring its rich past from a fishing village to a commercial powerhouse. Discover unique aspects of Dutch life, including the history of prostitution and drug legalization, while enjoying tastings of traditional chocolates and cheeses. Tailored to your pace, this experience promises to leave you enchanted by the city.

tours.name: Jordaan, Anne Frank, Leidseplein, Vondelpark e Museumplein - Tour Privado
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like a local on this captivating 3-hour private walking tour. Explore the city's iconic canals, unique architecture, and significant historical sites, including the Anne Frank House. Tailored to your interests and pace, this immersive journey through Jordaan, Vondelpark, and the Museumplein promises unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Tour Red Light District
tours.description: Embark on a unique two-hour tour of Amsterdam's Red Light District, where you'll uncover the intriguing history of prostitution and drug legalization. With a knowledgeable guide fluent in Portuguese and Spanish, explore the secrets behind the district's iconic red lights and learn the differences between coffee shops and smartshops.

tours.name: Tour Red Light District - Tour Privado
tours.description: Embark on a unique two-hour tour of Amsterdam's Red Light District, where you'll uncover the intriguing history of prostitution and drug legalization. With a knowledgeable guide fluent in Portuguese and Spanish, explore the secrets behind the iconic red lights and the distinctions between coffee shops and smartshops in an open, taboo-free environment.

tours.name: Tour Jordaan, Anne Frank, Leidseplein
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like a local on this captivating two-hour walking tour through its picturesque canals and intriguing streets. Discover iconic houseboats, lean facades, and the poignant history of Anne Frank's home. With expert guides, immerse yourself in the city's unique architecture and vibrant culture, making unforgettable memories along the way.

tours.name: Bistro Twee33 diner a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful 3-course dinner from Bistro Twee33 aboard a private boat while cruising through the historic harbors of Dordrecht and the scenic Hollandse Biesbosch. Choose between two charming vessels, Felicità or Talamod, for an unforgettable evening of fine dining and breathtaking views.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1 uur met Bistro Twee33 a bordo
tours.description: Experience a private one-hour boat tour through the historic center of Dordrecht, indulging in exquisite bites from Bistro Twee33. Enhance your journey with oysters and a fine bottle of wine or prosecco, all served at the picturesque Wijnhaven. Choose from four charming boats for a memorable outing.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1 uur met Coffeelicious a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique private boat tour featuring a delightful homemade brunch or lunch from Coffeelicious Bakery. Enjoy freshly made sandwiches, sweet treats, and premium coffee while cruising the scenic Voorstraathaven. Choose from four charming boats and indulge in a memorable culinary adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1,5 uur met Bistro Twee33 a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique 1.5-hour private boat tour through the historic center of Dordrecht, indulging in exquisite bites from Bistro Twee33. Enhance your journey with oysters and a fine bottle of wine or prosecco, all served onboard at the picturesque Wijnhaven. Choose from four charming boats for an unforgettable outing.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2 uur met Bistro Twee33 a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique two-hour private boat tour through the historic center of Dordrecht, savoring exquisite bites from Bistro Twee33. Enhance your journey with oysters and a fine bottle of wine or prosecco, all served onboard. Choose from four elegant boats for an unforgettable culinary adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 3 uur met Bistro Twee33 a bordo
tours.description: Experience a luxurious 3-hour private boat tour through the historic center of Dordrecht. Indulge in exquisite bites from Bistro Twee33, with the option to enhance your journey with oysters and fine wine or prosecco. Choose from four elegant boats for a memorable culinary adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 3 uur met  Gelateria Lorenzo a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique private boat tour through Dordrecht's historic city center while indulging in artisanal Italian gelato from renowned maker Enzo Talamini. Choose from four charming boats and savor the delightful flavors of award-winning ice cream, making this a memorable and delicious adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1,5 uur met Coffeelicious a bordo
tours.description: Choose from four exclusive private boats—Felicità, Elena, Talamod, or Il Viaggio—for a unique water experience. Depart from the scenic Grote Appelsteiger or opt for a convenient pickup at an alternative location for a small fee. Customize your adventure and enjoy a memorable day on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2 uur met Coffeelicious a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique 2-hour private boat tour featuring a delightful homemade brunch or lunch from Coffeelicious Bakery. Enjoy fresh sandwiches, sweet treats, and premium coffee while cruising the scenic Voorstraathaven. Choose from four charming boats and let the culinary surprises elevate your day on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 3 uur met Coffeelicious a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique 3-hour private boat tour featuring a delightful homemade brunch or lunch from Coffeelicious Bakery. Enjoy fresh, richly topped sandwiches and sweet treats while cruising through the scenic Voorstraathaven. Choose from four charming boats and indulge in a memorable culinary adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1,5 uur met High Tea a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful 1.5-hour private boat cruise featuring a luxurious high tea on board. Savor homemade sweet and savory treats from Coffeelicious Bakery, crafted by Chef Joan. Choose from four elegant boats and customize your experience with beautiful presentation options, ensuring a memorable and indulgent outing on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2 uur met High Tea a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful two-hour private boat cruise featuring a luxurious high tea on board. Savor homemade sweet and savory treats from Coffeelicious Bakery, crafted by Chef Joan. Choose from four elegant boats and customize your experience, making it a unique and memorable outing on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 3 uur met High Tea a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful three-hour private boat tour featuring a luxurious high tea onboard. Savor homemade sweet and savory treats from Coffeelicious Bakery, crafted by Chef Joan. Choose from four elegant boats and customize your experience, ensuring a memorable and unique outing on the water.

tours.name: Informative Walk and Talk
tours.description: Explore the intriguing history of Amsterdam's red-light district with a unique "Walk 'n Talk" experience led by sex workers. Gain firsthand insights into the sex industry, its challenges, and legal framework. Engage in open discussions, reflect on your perceptions, and discover the area’s complexities while walking at your own pace.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2,5 uur met Bistro Twee33 a bordo
tours.description: Experience a private 2.5-hour boat tour through the historic center of Dordrecht, savoring exquisite bites from Bistro Twee33. Enhance your journey with oysters and fine wine or prosecco, served onboard. Choose from four elegant boats for a memorable culinary adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2,5 uur met Gelateria Lorenzo a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique 2.5-hour private boat tour through Dordrecht's historic city center, complemented by delicious artisanal Italian ice cream from renowned gelato maker Enzo Talamini. Choose from four charming boats and indulge in a sweet treat while enjoying the scenic views, making this a memorable outing for all.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2,5 uur met Coffeelicious a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique 2.5-hour private boat tour featuring a delightful homemade brunch or lunch from Coffeelicious Bakery. Enjoy fresh, richly topped sandwiches and sweet treats while cruising the scenic Voorstraathaven. Choose from four charming boats and indulge in a memorable culinary adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2,5 uur met High Tea a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful 2.5-hour private boat cruise featuring a luxurious high tea on board. Savor homemade sweet and savory treats from Coffeelicious Bakery, crafted by Chef Joan. Choose from four charming boats and customize your experience, making it a unique and memorable outing on the water.

tours.name: Canal Parade - 7 Hours - All Drinks Included -  Amstel
tours.description: Celebrate the Canal Parade from a lively open boat, with 7 hours of drinks, great views, and a skipper to keep the party going. Arrive early and enjoy the best spot to watch the parade pass by.

tours.name: Canal Parade - 8 Hours - All Drinks Included - Prinsengracht
tours.description: Celebrate Canal Parade 2025 from a lively open boat, soaking up vibrant views for 8 hours. Enjoy a skipper, onboard toilet, and prime vantage points along Prinsengracht—an unforgettable parade experience.

tours.name: Lopifit
tours.description: Glide effortlessly on the electric Lopifit, a walking bike that turns exercise into adventure. Cover long distances while enjoying a fun, unique experience you won’t forget.

tours.name: Diner bij de Brakke Grond
tours.description: Enjoy a cozy Flemish dinner at De Brakke Grond, a vibrant cultural hub. Savor a selection of local dishes, from hearty stews to veggie tartes, in a lively atmosphere that celebrates art, food, and community.

tours.name: Stadspas
tours.description: Experience an exciting 45-minute VR adventure designed for kids aged 3 to 14, exclusively available with a valid Amsterdam City Pass. Located on the first floor of Ballorig, this unique VR center offers thrilling games that promise unforgettable fun. Just ring the bell for entry—no need to go through Ballorig!

tours.name: Repairing Sewing Course: Basics (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Master basic clothing repairs in just two sessions. Learn to fix seams, holes, shorten pants, sew buttons, and more with expert guidance. Bring your clothes or use provided materials—skills to save and customize your wardrobe.

tours.name: RHIB varen • Powerboat varen
tours.description: Experience the thrill of a RHIB Powerboat Rally Run on the North Sea! After a safety briefing, you'll speed away from Scheveningen, feeling the adrenaline rush as you navigate the waves. This unforgettable 30-minute adventure promises excitement and stories to share, making it a perfect group activity.

tours.name: Bachelor(ette) Special
tours.description: Experience the thrill of the ‘Bachelor Special’ as the guest of honor dons a survival suit and takes the plunge into the sea! With friends cheering, you can decide how long they swim, creating unforgettable memories and hilarious moments. Capture the excitement with photos before returning to shore.

tours.name: Barbeque aan het strand Scheveningen
tours.description: Experience the ultimate beach vibe at Scheveningen with a delightful 3-hour barbecue perfect for bachelor parties and corporate outings. Enjoy grilling mouthwatering meats like marinated spare ribs and juicy burgers, complemented by fresh salads, fries, and sauces, all in a lively beachside atmosphere. Make unforgettable memories by the sea!

tours.name: Privé Sundown Tour
tours.description: Experience the magic of the sea during a Private Sundown Tour, perfect for sunset lovers. Capture stunning photos in a romantic setting, ideal for a memorable proposal. Enjoy a glass of champagne and light snacks as you soak in the beauty of the horizon on this exclusive two-hour adventure.

tours.name: Boeren Beach Golf
tours.description: Experience the thrill of boerengolf, a unique twist on traditional golf played on the beach! Enjoy the sun, sea, and sand while navigating a specially designed course. Challenge your skills against friends and family in this fun, memorable activity that promises laughter and friendly competition. Perfect for summer adventures!

tours.name: Powerboat Team Rescue
tours.description: Experience the thrill of the Powerboat Rescue in Scheveningen! This unique 90-minute adventure combines high-speed boat rides with hands-on rescue exercises in survival suits. Perfect for team building, you'll learn essential skills like helicopter markings and teamwork while enjoying the excitement of the open sea. Make unforgettable memories together!

tours.name: Rondvaart Scheveningen
tours.description: Experience a relaxing 40-minute sightseeing cruise at sea, where you can take in stunning views of the boulevard, beach, and iconic Pier with its Ferris wheel. Enjoy the intimacy of small groups, with evening outings available during peak season and special events for a truly memorable adventure.

tours.name: Cocktail workshop
tours.description: Join a thrilling 2-hour Cocktail Workshop in Scheveningen, where you'll learn to craft delicious cocktails under the guidance of an expert. Experience the art of shaking and stirring while uncovering the fascinating history and philosophy behind cocktails. Perfect for parties or team outings, this hands-on experience will elevate your mixology skills!

tours.name: Aanzoek op zee
tours.description: Surprise your partner with a unique proposal at sea! Enjoy a private 45-minute trip complete with champagne and a delightful surprise. This memorable experience is perfect for any season, ensuring your special moment is both original and unforgettable. Make your engagement truly special with this romantic adventure.

tours.name: Zeehonden Tour
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable 2-hour seal tour in the North Sea, where you’ll encounter a variety of marine life, including seals, dolphins, and possibly even a humpback whale. Experience the thrill of wildlife spotting firsthand and create lasting memories on this unique adventure at sea!

tours.name: Wie is de rat?
tours.description: Experience a thrilling hour of teamwork and deception in "Who is the Mole?" Gather in a beach tent, form teams, and tackle challenging tasks while uncovering the saboteur among you. Conclude with a fun round of Beach Golf, where creativity and communication lead to victory and rewards await the winners!

tours.name: Robinson Crusoe
tours.description: Experience the thrill of survival with the Robinson Crusoe adventure in Den Haag! Join friends or colleagues in a series of exciting challenges that test teamwork, agility, and strategy. Compete against other teams while facing unique twists, like battling imaginary cannibals. It's the ultimate team-building event filled with excitement and camaraderie!

tours.name: Zandsculpturen
tours.description: Experience a unique beach outing with a sand sculpture workshop that sparks creativity and teamwork. Participants will collaborate to design and build stunning sculptures based on chosen themes, enhancing communication and planning skills. Conclude with a friendly competition to determine the best creation, making it an unforgettable team-building adventure.

tours.name: Pub Quiz Show
tours.description: Experience the thrill of a PubQuiz, a lively quiz night perfect for friends, family, or colleagues. Engage in friendly competition while enjoying drinks and snacks, as teams tackle hilarious questions. With professional quizmasters and customizable content, this unforgettable event fosters teamwork and fun, rain or shine, in the heart of Den Haag or Scheveningen.

tours.name: Vergaderen Strand
tours.description: Discover a unique meeting experience in Scheveningen, featuring flexible spaces equipped with top-notch audiovisual technology. Enjoy tailored catering options, ample parking, and even a private dock for boat pickups. Combine productive sessions with leisure activities, all while soaking in stunning views of the harbor and proximity to the beach.

tours.name: Waterfun dag
tours.description: Experience unforgettable moments on the North Sea with our Water Fun day! Enjoy two hours of exhilarating activities like waterskiing, swimming, and wakeboarding. Perfect for families and friends, this adventure promises excitement for all ages, making it an ideal way to create lasting memories together.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1 uur met 'Antipasti a bordo'
tours.description: Sail away on a private boat and indulge in Italian antipasti—meats, cheese, olives, and balsamic cream. Choose your boat and enjoy a personalized hour of delicious flavors on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1,5 uur met 'Antipasti a bordo'
tours.description: Sail away on a private boat and indulge in delicious Italian antipasti, including meats, cheese, and balsamic. Choose from four boats and enjoy a personalized 1.5-hour cruise with optional pizza or focaccia.

tours.name: Private bike ECO city tour
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before on the “Urban Eco-Cycle” bike tour! In just three hours, explore vibrant neighborhoods, serene parks, and iconic landmarks while uncovering the city’s rich history, culture, and environmental innovations. Led by passionate guides, this unique adventure promises fun facts and insights into Amsterdam’s diverse spirit.

tours.name: Amsterdam bike ECO city tour
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before on the “Urban Exploration” bike tour! In just three hours, ride through vibrant neighborhoods, lush parks, and historic landmarks while uncovering the city’s rich culture, diverse history, and innovative sustainability efforts. Led by passionate guides, this adventure promises unforgettable insights and hidden gems waiting to be discovered.

tours.name: Hot & happening Noord - Instap Fietstour
tours.description: Cycle through vibrant Noord, a lively district full of creative spaces, green areas, and historic sites. Enjoy a 3-hour guided ride ending with a drink at the city’s oldest café.

tours.name: Foto in Klederdracht
tours.description: Experience the charm of Volendam by dressing in authentic, handcrafted traditional costumes for a memorable photo session. Enjoy personalized attention as you pose for stunning, professional-quality photos, with the option to capture your own moments too. Choose your favorite shot, and receive instant prints along with digital copies.

tours.name: Bezoek aan Experience Volendam
tours.description: Experience Volendam offers a captivating journey back to 1916, immersing visitors in the life of a traditional fishing village. Guided by an expert, explore the history and culture, then don a virtual reality headset for a 360-degree view of the past. A unique adventure for all ages awaits!

tours.name: Combi ticket Experience Volendam/Volendams Museum
tours.description: Experience the rich history of Volendam in a captivating 3-hour journey. Travel back to 1916 with immersive technology, explore traditional life and clothing, and stroll through a historic street. Conclude with a virtual reality boat ride and receive a memorable photo in authentic attire. A unique glimpse into the past awaits!

tours.name: eFoil Course 1.5h
tours.description: Glide effortlessly over the water on a high-tech Aerofoils e-Foil, feeling like you're flying. With expert guidance and top gear, learn to e-foil safely and create unforgettable memories in stunning surroundings.

tours.name: eFoil Course 2.5h
tours.description: Float effortlessly over the water on a sleek Aerofoils E-Foil, feeling like you're flying. With expert guidance and top gear, learn to glide safely and create unforgettable moments in stunning surroundings.

tours.name: SUP Rental Half a Day
tours.description: Glide across the water on a inflatable SUP, paddle in hand, with all gear included. Enjoy four hours of fun, sun, and serenity—perfect for exploring lakes or coastlines at your own pace.

tours.name: SUP Rental Full Day
tours.description: Enjoy an 8-hour inflatable SUP adventure with all gear included. Pick up the day before, paddle across calm waters, and return refreshed—perfect for a fun-filled day on the water.

tours.name: The Comedy Embassy | Amsterdam's Best Stand-Up Comedy
tours.description: Laugh out loud with top international comedians at Amsterdam’s premier comedy show. Enjoy four hilarious acts, a full bar, and a lively atmosphere—no passport needed, just pure entertainment.

tours.name: 2 uren MTB huren | Lage Vuursche
tours.description: Experience thrilling mountain biking at Lage Vuursche, where you can choose from a variety of well-maintained adult and children's bikes. Enjoy free parking, assistance, and helmets included with your rental. With direct access to scenic MTB routes, this adventure promises excitement for all skill levels, making it a memorable outdoor experience.

tours.name: Day Tour to Zaanse Schans, The Hague, and Rotterdam from Amsterdam
tours.description: Explore the Netherlands in a single day with this vibrant tour. Wander through Zaanse Schans’s windmills and traditional crafts, stroll past The Hague’s historic landmarks and royal parks, then marvel at Rotterdam’s innovative architecture and bustling market. Experience Dutch culture, history, and modern design all in one unforgettable journey.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1 uur met Coffeelicious cookies a bordo
tours.description: Experience a unique one-hour private boat tour while savoring delicious Coffeelicious cookies from Coffeelicious Bakery. Choose from four charming boats and enjoy the option of vegan cookies. Delight in a sweet surprise as the treats are delivered during your journey, making this an unforgettable culinary adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1,5 uur met Coffeelicious cookies a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful boat tour while savoring a Coffeelicious cookie, freshly baked and customizable to your dietary needs. Enjoy the unique surprise of cookies delivered onboard, adding a sweet touch to your journey. Choose from four charming private boats for an unforgettable adventure on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2 uur met Coffeelicious cookies a bordo
tours.description: Embark on a unique two-hour private boat tour while savoring delicious Coffeelicious cookies from Coffeelicious Bakery. Choose from four charming boats and enjoy the option of vegan cookies. Experience the delightful surprise of cookies delivered onboard, making your journey both tasty and memorable. Customize your pickup location for added convenience.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 2,5 uur met Coffeelicious cookies a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful 2.5-hour private boat tour featuring delicious Coffeelicious cookies from Coffeelicious Bakery. Choose from four unique boats and enjoy the option of vegan cookies. With the possibility of having cookies delivered during the cruise, this journey promises a sweet surprise and a memorable time on the water.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 3 uur met Coffeelicious cookies a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful private boat tour while savoring delicious Coffeelicious cookies from Coffeelicious Bakery. Choose from four unique boats and enjoy the option of vegan cookies. With the possibility of having cookies delivered onboard, this three-hour journey promises a sweet surprise amidst beautiful waterways.

tours.name: Jutterstocht
tours.description: Experience a delightful two-hour horse-drawn carriage ride through the enchanting woods and dunes to the beach. Listen to captivating tales from the coachman about life on Terschelling, including beachcombing adventures. Perfect for families, this memorable journey promises fun and storytelling for all ages. Reservations are required to join the adventure.

tours.name: Korte natuurtocht
tours.description: Embark on a delightful three-hour nature tour through enchanting forests, dunes, and along the beach. Led by an expert coachman, you'll discover the vibrant flora and fauna of the area, making it a perfect adventure for families with young children. Experience the beauty of nature like never before!

tours.name: Drenkelingenhuisje
tours.description: Embark on a captivating four-hour journey to the historic "Húske op de hoek," a former refuge for shipwrecked sailors on Terschelling's beach. Traverse through enchanting forests, dunes, and sandy shores, culminating at post 24. This unique adventure promises stunning landscapes and a glimpse into maritime history. Reserve your spot today!

tours.name: Beginnerstocht
tours.description: Embark on a serene 1.5-hour beginner horseback ride through enchanting forests and dunes, with the possibility of reaching the beach. Guided by an experienced instructor, you'll learn the basics of riding while enjoying the stunning natural beauty of Terschelling, making it a perfect introduction for novice riders.

tours.name: Halfgevorderden
tours.description: Experience the thrill of the Half-Advanced Ride, where you'll traverse enchanting forests and dunes before reaching the beach. Perfect for those who can walk, trot, and canter, this 90-minute adventure offers a chance to gallop on the sand—if you're ready! Join us for an unforgettable equestrian journey.

tours.name: Gevorderde 2 uurs buitenrit
tours.description: Experience the thrill of horseback riding on Terschelling, where stunning trails through forests, dunes, and picturesque landscapes lead to the beach. Advanced riders can gallop along the shore year-round, with options for short or full-day excursions, including evening rides and summer swims with horses. An unforgettable adventure awaits!

tours.name: Mixbike Utrecht Beer and prosecco on one Bike
tours.description: Hop on a 90-minute Utrecht tour combining beer and prosecco, with lively sightseeing, music, and social fun. Enjoy unlimited drinks from taps and bottles while exploring the city’s best spots with friends.

tours.name: Haarlem Self-Guided Food Tour
tours.description: Explore Haarlem’s hidden gems on a self-guided tour, savor local snacks and drinks, and uncover unique stories. Download the app, enter your code, and let the city’s flavors and history come alive at your pace.

tours.name: Top 10 Tastes of Amsterdam: Guided Walking Food Tour
The Groove Music Cruise
tours.description: Sail Amsterdam’s skyline as soulful tunes fill the air on a three-hour cruise. DJ Dillon Lewis, guest Jennie Lena, and lively gospel, funk, and dance classics create a warm, uplifting Sunday evening on the water.

tours.name: Berkenbast 4-luik
tours.description: Master the art of working with birch bark over four sessions, exploring its history, crafting techniques, and weaving methods. Create unique pieces using traditional tools and materials in an immersive, hands-on experience.

tours.name: Bijl gebruik en onderhoud
tours.description: Prepare your own meals at this self-catering course, using the communal campfire for heat. Bring your own pot if you can; a shared pan is available but limited. Enjoy independence and outdoor cooking in a rustic setting.

tours.name: Private Food Tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before on a private tour designed just for your group. With a dedicated guide, explore iconic sights and hidden treasures at your own pace. Tailored to your interests and preferences, this unique experience ensures unforgettable memories while savoring the city's rich culture and local flavors.

tours.name: Fermentation: spice up your plant-based cuisine - Amersfoort
tours.description: Join a unique 5-hour fermentation workshop conducted in Dutch, where you'll transform simple ingredients into flavorful, healthy delights like miso, kombucha, and kimchi. Learn the science behind fermentation, taste various products, and gain hands-on skills to create your own fermented foods at home, all while enjoying a delicious lunch.

tours.name: Vegan Academy's Sunday Lunch - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join Vegan Academy for an unforgettable 4-hour plant-based lunch experience in Amsterdam. Savor a delightful 5-course meal crafted by top chefs, featuring unique dishes and exquisite drink pairings.
