Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere at a beautifully set table, perfect for mingling with fellow food lovers. Reserve your spot now!

tours.name: Senior Friendly Countryside Windmill Tour
tours.description: Embark on a private tour tailored for seniors and those with mobility challenges, exploring the enchanting Dutch countryside. Discover UNESCO-listed Beemster Polder, visit charming villages like De Rijp and Edam, indulge in a cheese tasting, and witness traditional clog-making, all while enjoying a comfortable and accessible experience.

tours.name: Delicious Dam Tour
tours.description: Embark on a flavorful journey through Amsterdam’s historic center on this engaging food tour. Sample iconic Dutch treats like herring, stroopwafels, and aged cheese, all while uncovering the rich stories behind each dish. Led by a local foodie, this adventure promises laughter, delicious bites, and unforgettable memories. Come hungry!

tours.name: Keukenhof Luxury Private tour w. Canal Cruise & Tulip Experience
tours.description: Visit Keukenhof Gardens during tulip season with skip-the-line entry, guided stories, and free time to explore. Perfect for nature lovers and photographers seeking vibrant blooms and springtime magic.

tours.name: Kids Walking Tour
tours.description: Embark on a thrilling outdoor scavenger hunt through Amsterdam's historic old docks, designed for young explorers aged 6–10. Armed with a treasure map, kids will solve riddles and uncover fascinating facts, culminating in a visit to the NEMO Science Museum. It's an interactive adventure where children become the heroes of their own story!

tours.name: Old Town District Tour
tours.description: Discover the magic of Amsterdam at night on a captivating walking tour through its historic streets and illuminated canals. Uncover tales of smugglers and secret societies while enjoying traditional Dutch beers and iconic snacks. With intimate group sizes and cozy café stops, this experience offers a unique blend of history and charm.

tours.name: Rijksmuseum Guided Tour
tours.description: Experience the Rijksmuseum like never before on this two-hour guided tour, featuring masterpieces by Rembrandt, Vermeer, and Van Gogh. Enjoy fast-track entry, captivating stories, and a small group setting that ensures a personal touch. Discover the art, history, and intriguing gossip that make this visit unforgettable.

tours.name: Van Gogh Private Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey through Vincent van Gogh's life and art with Mary as your guide. This unique museum tour blends storytelling with emotional insights, exploring his iconic works and personal struggles. Experience art history that resonates deeply, leaving you not just informed, but truly connected to Van Gogh's spirit.

tours.name: Beer and Bitterballs evening stroll
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam's brown cafés on a cozy evening tour with Mary. Sip traditional Dutch beers, savor crunchy bitterballen, and stroll through historic neighborhoods. Discover the rich café culture and stories behind each unique stop, all while enjoying an intimate atmosphere that captures the essence of gezelligheid.

tours.name: The Hague Highlight Privé Fietstour• DUTCH
tours.description: Experience The Hague like never before with a personalized private tour! Perfect for companies, families, and friends, this 2.5-hour adventure showcases the city's rich history and culture. Tailor your journey with special requests, and enjoy the convenience of a guide, bike, and poncho included for an unforgettable outing.

tours.name: Ravioli making workshop - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join a captivating 4-hour workshop to master the art of making delicious plant-based ravioli! Learn the secrets of perfect pasta, explore unique fillings and sauces, and enjoy a delightful tasting experience with your creations. Leave with recipes and newfound skills to impress friends and family in your own kitchen!

tours.name: Workshop Kombucha - Amsterdam
tours.description: Learn to make your own healthy, fizzy kombucha in just 2.5 hours. Brew, flavor, bottle, and take home your custom batch, plus recipes and tips to keep brewing endlessly. Perfect for health and flavor enthusiasts.

tours.name: "Starlet" Private Canal Limousine
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s historic canals on the Starlet, a restored 1921 wooden launch with panoramic views, a silent electric engine, and cozy elegance—perfect for intimate gatherings or romantic escapes.

tours.name: Discover South Limburg
tours.description: Explore Zuid Limburg’s stunning hills, caves, and charming villages with a lively guide. Choose your adventure—nature walks, city strolls, or hidden gems—and enjoy a personalized, unforgettable day.

tours.name: The Canal Experience – Winter Special (October till March)
tours.description: Embark on a magical winter cruise in Amsterdam, where a beautifully decorated boat awaits you, adorned with Christmas lights and cozy blankets. Savor complimentary mulled wine or hot chocolate while indulging in delightful snacks. This unique experience promises romance and unforgettable memories amidst the enchanting winter scenery.

tours.name: Openbare Wybrand de Geest Free Tour
tours.description: Explore Leeuwarden’s art and history in 1.5 hours, from 17th-century portraits of Wybrand de Geest to vibrant street art inspired by old masters. Walk through beautiful spots and hear captivating stories with expert guides.

tours.name: Street Art Tour Museumnacht FRL
tours.description: Explore Leeuwarden’s vibrant street art on a 45-minute guided tour through 75 murals, uncovering stories and hidden gems in this outdoor museum—free, fun, and perfect for art lovers.

tours.name: Ravioli making workshop - Amersfoort
tours.description: Join a captivating 4-hour workshop where you'll master the art of making plant-based ravioli from scratch. Discover the secrets of perfect pasta, create delicious fillings and sauces, and enjoy a communal tasting of your culinary creations. Leave with recipes and newfound skills to impress friends and family!

tours.name: Beginner Macrame Workshop: Skirt
tours.description: Create a stylish, handmade macramé skirt or shawl in just 3 hours. Learn core knots, build rhythm, and craft a unique accessory you can wear. All materials included—just bring your creativity and enjoy a relaxing, hands-on session.

tours.name: Breakfast Tour
tours.description: Start your weekend with a scenic breakfast cruise in Groningen, savoring delicious food while hearing local stories. Relax on a boat with stunning views, friendly guides, and a cozy atmosphere to kick off your day.

tours.name: Harbour Wellness 2uur + Kano 1uur
tours.description: Paddle through Rotterdam’s historic city harbors, then unwind on Harbour Wellness Island with a sauna, hot tub, ice bath, and outdoor gym. Perfect for small groups seeking adventure and relaxation in one unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Harbour Wellness 2uur + Kajak 1uur
tours.description: Paddle solo through Rotterdam’s historic harbor, then unwind on our Harbour Wellness island with a sauna, ice bath, hot tub, and outdoor gym. Swim, relax, and enjoy a unique blend of adventure and relaxation.

tours.name: Harbour Wellness 2uur + SUP 1uur
tours.description: Paddle solo across Rotterdam’s historic harbor, then unwind on our Harbour Wellness island with a sauna, hot tub, ice bath, and outdoor gym. Enjoy relaxing yoga or a refreshing SUP adventure in a safe, scenic setting.

tours.name: Harbour Wellness 2uur + Waterfiets 1uur
tours.description: Cycle on a waterbike through Rotterdam’s historic harbor, then unwind on our Harbour Wellness island with a sauna, hot tub, ice bath, and outdoor gym. Perfect for relaxing and recharging in a scenic setting.

tours.name: Amsterdam Bike Rental | 24-Hour Rentals
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s charming streets on a classic rental bike, soaking up the vibrant city sights and lively atmosphere at your own pace.

tours.name: Sewing Lesson: Wide Pants/Shorts
tours.description: Craft your own stylish T-shirt in 3 hours using organic fabrics, sewing patterns, and professional guidance. Learn to work with stretch materials, create seams, and finish hems—leave with a personalized, finished garment.

tours.name: Shot of Improv
tours.description: Join the wildest Thursday night in Amsterdam with spontaneous improv comedy driven by you. Enjoy half-price drinks, free shots for bold suggestions, and a lively, unpredictable show that keeps you on the edge of your seat.

tours.name: Visita Panorámica Privada Ámsterdam y Molinos Zaanse Schans
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s highlights and the rural charm of Zaanse Schans in a private 5-hour tour. Walk through historic neighborhoods, see iconic canals, visit windmills, and watch traditional wooden shoe making.

tours.name: Free Tour La Haya
tours.description: Experience the charm of The Hague on a captivating free tour that unveils the rich history and stunning architecture of this vital European city. Explore iconic sites like the Mauritshuis and the Binnenhof, while enjoying unique stories and breathtaking views. Your journey concludes with the opportunity to reward your guide based on their exceptional service.

tours.name: Regular Ticket
tours.description: Enjoy a lively 1.5-hour night out in Amsterdam with a four-course meal and an all-male show full of hot guys, fun, and outrageous entertainment—perfect for friends celebrating or just having a wild night.

tours.name: VIP Ticket
tours.description: Enjoy a 1.5-hour VIP night with front-row seats, a welcome drink, and no queues at Coqtales. Perfect for a fun girls' night with hot guys, outrageous entertainment, and unforgettable memories in Amsterdam.

tours.name: Couch Seats
tours.description: Enjoy 1.5 hours of prime seats, champagne for six, and no queues at Coqtales—Amsterdam’s top all-male show. Perfect for girls’ night, with hot guys, fun, and unforgettable moments await. Book early for the best spots!

tours.name: Kano 1 uur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of paddling in the stunning Amsterdamse Bos! This one-hour adventure is perfect for all ages, offering a unique way to explore the beautiful surroundings. Just bring an ID or driver's license as a deposit and get ready for an unforgettable day on the water!

tours.name: Kano 2 uur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of paddling in the scenic Amsterdamse Bos! This two-hour adventure welcomes all ages, making it a perfect outing for families and friends. Enjoy the beauty of nature while creating unforgettable memories on the water. Just remember to bring an ID or driver's license as a deposit!

tours.name: Elektroboot 1 uur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cruising on water in a unique vessel reminiscent of a Tesla! This one-hour adventure promises excitement and innovation, perfect for those seeking a memorable outing. Just bring an ID or driver's license as a deposit and get ready for an unforgettable ride!

tours.name: Natuur/ strandwandeling aanbetaling * Nature/ Beachwalk deposit
tours.description: Join a 140-minute adventure with alpacas through nature and to the beach. Enjoy steep climbs, water fun, and fresh sea air. Suitable for kids 8+ with an adult, but not for those with walking difficulties. Book via contact for groups.

tours.name: Varend terras
tours.description: Experience the unique "Vijverhopper tour" aboard the floating terrace, navigating from the large pond to the small pond and back. Perfect for small groups of up to 10 people, this memorable journey offers a serene way to enjoy the beauty of the surroundings while creating lasting memories together.

tours.name: Privé E-Bike Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Groningen’s best and hidden gems on a private e-bike tour. Marvel at historic landmarks, vibrant markets, peaceful parks, and secret courtyards—see the city like never before.

tours.name: Pattern Drawing Workshop series 1.0  (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create custom-fit patterns in this 8-week workshop, mastering drafting, adjustments, and prototypes. Finish with three personalized blocks and the skills to turn your designs into reality. Ideal for confident sewists.

tours.name: Combi: Berkenbast Ketting en Oorbellen + Rotan Mand
tours.description: Create jewelry with birch bark and rattan in scenic Leersum, then relax overnight in the forest. Enjoy hands-on craftwork, nature walks, campfire cooking, and starry skies in this unique, immersive experience.

tours.name: EHBO Opfrisdag
tours.description: Sharpen your outdoor first aid skills in a fun, hands-on day in the woods. Practice bandages, handle bleeding, fractures, and heat injuries—perfect for adventurers wanting quick, practical emergency tips.

tours.name: Eetbare en Medicinale planten in 4 seizoenen 2026
tours.description: Join a unique four-day adventure exploring edible and medicinal plants in the beautiful Dutch countryside. Discover seasonal flora, learn to make tinctures, and share recipes while wandering through diverse landscapes. Enjoy guided walks in picturesque areas, with coffee and treats provided, making this experience both educational and delightful.

tours.name: Stadswandeling Willem van Oranje
tours.description: Discover Delft through the eyes of Willem van Oranje on this captivating city walk. Explore the rich history of the sixteenth century as you trace the life of this influential figure and uncover the significant events that shaped the city during his era. A unique journey into the past awaits!

tours.name: Stadswandeling Mienette Storm
tours.description: Step into 19th-century Delft through Mienette Storm’s eyes, walking her life story and the city’s history. Uncover hidden stories and vibrant scenes from a bygone era on this immersive city stroll.

tours.name: Stadswandeling Antoni van Leeuwenhoek
tours.description: Walk through Delft’s 17th-century streets, tracing Antoni van Leeuwenhoek’s life and the city’s history. Immerse yourself in the stories of science, discovery, and vibrant old Delft on this captivating guided tour.

tours.name: Private Tour - Amsterdam Light Festival - Shine
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals during the Light Festival’s 14th edition. Enjoy drinks, stunning art, and history in a cozy private boat—an unforgettable evening with friends, family, or colleagues.

tours.name: Private Tour - Amsterdam Light Festival - Bright
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals during the Light Festival’s 14th edition. Enjoy a cozy private cruise with drinks, blending history, art, and festive cheer for an unforgettable evening with friends or colleagues.

tours.name: Lepel snijden
tours.description: Create your own wooden spoon in this hands-on workshop, mastering safe carving techniques and reading the wood’s character. Leave with a unique, handcrafted spoon—your personal touch in every detail.

tours.name: Shared 1.5hrs Kingsday Cruise
tours.description: Celebrate King's Day from the water on our open-air boat, cruising vibrant canals with unlimited drinks, lively music, and stunning views of orange crowds and decorated boats—your perfect Dutch festival experience.

tours.name: English Highlight Tour
tours.description: Stroll through Delft’s charming streets, uncovering historic sites like Oude Kerk and Museum Prinsenhof, while hearing captivating stories about the city’s famous residents.

tours.name: Working with Chocolate - Public
tours.description: Create your own chocolate delights in a fun, hands-on class. From bean to bar, craft personalized chocolate bars and ganache-filled bonbons, then gift-wrap your treats to take home—perfect for groups and celebrations.

tours.name: Make your own Bonbons - Public
tours.description: Create your own exquisite bonbons in a hands-on workshop, learning to temper chocolate and craft beautiful, flavorful treats. No experience needed—leave with a box of your creations and recipes to enjoy at home.

tours.name: Hotel & Corporate Bike Delivery
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s vibrant streets with colleagues, guided by a map and fueled by coffee or water. Enjoy 24 hours of fresh air, scenic views, and memorable moments on two wheels.

tours.name: Amsterdam Walking Tour
tours.description: Discover the charm of Old Amsterdam on a small group walking tour, limited to just 8 participants for an intimate experience. Over 3 hours, enjoy leisurely strolls, engaging discussions, and a break to delve deeper into the city's history while exploring its major sights at a relaxed pace.

tours.name: Private Amsterdam Red Light District Tour
tours.description: Experience the Amsterdam Red Light District like never before on this intimate 1.5-hour tour, limited to just 4 participants. Guided by passionate feminists Mark and Lee, you'll explore the area respectfully, ensuring the rights of sex workers are honored while enjoying a fun and slightly cheeky adventure.

tours.name: Amsterdam Windmill Tour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 6-hour journey through the Dutch countryside, exploring charming lanes and the picturesque town of Monnickendam. Enjoy coffee and apple pie in a historic building, visit a family farm, and tour a 400-year-old windmill, culminating in a delightful cheese and wine picnic. Experience the essence of rural Holland!

tours.name: Rotterdam: Hike & Dine Food Tour (ENG)
tours.description: Savor three delicious courses at different restaurants, cruise the city by water, and explore its vibrant sides—all in four unforgettable hours with a lively guide. Perfect for food lovers and adventure seekers alike.

tours.name: Havana | The Pub Drive
tours.description: Experience the vibrant nightlife of Havana in style! Enjoy a 3-hour journey in a classic car, complete with door-to-door transport to the city's lively bars. Savor delicious cocktails and immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere, all while being chauffeured through the enchanting streets of Havana.

tours.name: Havana | The Garage Drive - vintage car restoration workshop
tours.description: Experience the magic of classic car restoration at NostagiCar's workshop, where master mechanic Julio shares his passion and stories. Enjoy a guided tour of the workshop, a ride through Havana in a vintage car, and a glimpse into Cuba's vibrant entrepreneurial spirit, all while savoring delicious Cuban coffee.

tours.name: Havana Airport to Havana City - Transfer
tours.description: Experience a seamless one-way transfer from Havana Airport to the heart of Havana City. Enjoy convenient pickup from the airport and drop-off at your chosen location, all while traveling in comfort with up to two large suitcases. Your driver monitors flight status for a stress-free arrival.

tours.name: [Community Night] The Academy Jam
tours.description: Join The Academy Jam to perform alongside talented Boom Chicago instructors. Step into the spotlight, showcase your skills, and be part of an exciting improv scene—your moment to shine on stage awaits.

tours.name: Jewish District
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s Jewish district in 3 hours, uncovering 400 years of history, resilient culture, and poignant memories at the Portuguese Synagogue and Holocaust Memorial with a local guide.

tours.name: Medieval Amsterdam Tour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s hidden history in a 2-hour walk through its medieval roots, Rembrandt’s footsteps, and a different side of the red light district—perfect for your first glimpse of the city’s tolerant, vibrant spirit.

tours.name: Jordaan Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s hidden charm in the Jordaan’s cozy alleys, historic cafes, and lively markets. Sip on traditional Dutch gin in one of its oldest bars and uncover the neighborhood’s unique, authentic culture.

tours.name: Golden Age (Half Day)
tours.description: Step back to Amsterdam’s 1600s Golden Age, exploring iconic museums and the UNESCO-listed Canal Ring. Uncover the city’s trade, art, and history with a private guide in just four unforgettable hours.

tours.name: Walk and Cruise
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s hidden courtyards, uncover 17th-century secrets, and glide along scenic canals on an electric boat—all in a lively 4-hour tour blending history, tranquility, and city charm.

tours.name: Jordaan Wandeling
tours.description: Stroll through the charming Jordaan, a tiny Amsterdam with rich stories, lively pubs, and iconic figures. In 2 hours, uncover hidden gems, local legends, and toast in the oldest pub with a shot of jenever.

tours.name: Tulip Tour bike & boat - 8 days
tours.description: Cycle through Holland’s stunning landscapes, visit colorful tulip gardens, explore historic towns like Gouda and Delft, see windmills at Kinderdijk, and enjoy charming villages and vibrant cities on an easy 8-day bike tour.

tours.name: Excursión Bruselas
tours.description: Embark on a 12-hour adventure in Brussels, the heart of Belgium and the EU. Stroll through the stunning Grand Place, meet the iconic Manneken Pis, and savor authentic Belgian beer. Optional extras include a delicious lunch featuring mussels and waffles, and a tasting of four artisanal beers for a true local experience.

tours.name: Piratenvaart vanaf Wageningen
tours.description: Kids become pirates on a boat adventure to a Rijn island, solving riddles and hunting for treasure. Dress up, explore nature, and enjoy a fun-filled 3-hour voyage perfect for children aged 5-12.

tours.name: Avondvaart van Wageningen naar de Jufferswaard
tours.description: Enjoy a peaceful evening cruise on the Rijn, passing scenic landscapes and the rejuvenated Jufferswaard nature reserve. A guide shares insights as you sail into the sunset, ending with a short nature walk.

tours.name: BIKE TOUR
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam on a traditional bike during this 2.5-hour guided tour. Navigate the historic city center safely while exploring iconic neighborhoods like Jordaan and Vondelpark. Discover hidden gems and local favorites, making unforgettable memories as you pedal through a city designed for two-wheeled adventures.

tours.name: AMSTERDAM: ARTE EN BICI CON FERRY A NDSM
tours.description: Embark on a 2.5-hour bike tour through Amsterdam, the cultural capital of Europe. Discover iconic artists and urban hotspots, explore the artistic district, and delve into the city's rich history. A local guide will unveil the secrets of the artistic underground, making this an unforgettable journey through "The Most Tolerant City in the World."

tours.name: AMSTERDAM: A TRAVÉS DE LA MÚSICA
tours.description: Embark on a 2.5-hour musical journey through Amsterdam, exploring its rich history and vibrant culture. Led by a conservatory musician, discover the sounds of pirates, the golden age, and iconic artists while visiting live music venues. Experience the city like never before, with a unique blend of music and storytelling.

tours.name: Tour a pé por Amsterdam e passeio de barco pelos canais
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour tour of Amsterdam's historic center, where you'll explore its rich past from a fishing village to a commercial hub. Discover iconic sites like the Central Station and the Jewish Quarter, while savoring traditional Dutch chocolates and cheeses, leaving you enchanted and eager to return.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Body Worlds
tours.description: Experience a unique one-hour canal cruise combined with the captivating BODY WORLDS exhibition in Amsterdam. Created by Dr. Gunther von Hagens, this internationally acclaimed showcase of the human body has fascinated over 40 million visitors since 1995, making it a memorable journey into the wonders of human anatomy.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Red Light Secrets Museum
tours.description: Embark on a unique 1-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to the Red Light Secrets Museum, the world's first prostitution museum. Explore a historic brothel, uncover the haunting tale of the infamous Chinese Annie, and delve into the captivating stories of sex workers, revealing the secrets of this ancient profession.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam with a one-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to the iconic Rijksmuseum. Explore over 8,000 masterpieces, including works by Vermeer, Rembrandt, and Van Gogh, immersing yourself in the rich art and history of the Netherlands. A perfect blend of culture and scenic beauty awaits!

tours.name: Heineken Experience + Canal Cruise Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Discover the rich heritage of Heineken® at the iconic brewery in Amsterdam. This unique experience offers insights into the brewing process, innovative practices, and the brand's storied history. Learn the art of tasting and savoring Heineken® like never before in a historic setting that celebrates its legacy.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + The Amsterdam Dungeon
tours.description: Experience the dark history of Amsterdam with a thrilling one-hour canal cruise followed by a visit to The Amsterdam Dungeon. Encounter the chilling tales of witch hunts, torture, and executions through immersive theater, stunning sets, and professional actors, making history come alive in an unforgettable way.

tours.name: Lovers Canal Cruise + This is Holland
tours.description: Embark on a breathtaking one-hour canal cruise combined with the immersive experience of THIS IS HOLLAND. Discover the stunning beauty of the Netherlands through a captivating journey that allows you to truly feel the essence of this remarkable country, offering a unique perspective you won't forget.

tours.name: Meeuwenkolonie
tours.description: Embark on a captivating journey to the Meeuwenkolonie at De Boschplaat, where you’ll witness a vibrant bird breeding ground. Enjoy a scenic walk, a cozy campfire break with coffee or tea, and an enlightening excursion with a forest ranger, who will share fascinating insights about the nesting birds.

tours.name: Beginner Embroidery Workshop 1.0
tours.description: Master embroidery in just 3 hours with expert guidance. Learn basic stitches, get all materials included, and take home your tools to keep creating. Perfect for beginners eager to start stitching.

tours.name: The Connoisseur's Taste
tours.description: Indulge in a personalized Amsterdam food adventure, crafted around your passions—whether savoring rooftop seafood, exploring Dutch spirits, or blending whiskey with art—created with top local experts just for you.

tours.name: Cleansday Plastic Fishing
tours.description: Join a lively canal adventure on September 19, 2025, as you fish for plastic, turn waste into treasure, and help make Amsterdam cleaner—all while enjoying a fun, community-filled day on the water.

tours.name: Amsterdam Light Festival - Ticket
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals during the Light Festival’s 14th edition. Enjoy drinks, stunning art, and history with friends or colleagues on a cozy private boat—an unforgettable evening on the water.

tours.name: Mirror Booth + gepersonaliseerd gastenboek
tours.description: Create unforgettable memories with a 3-hour Mirror Booth, unlimited prints, fun props, and a personalized guestbook. Guests leave heartfelt messages and photos, making your celebration truly special.

tours.name: Breakfast @ By Ami
tours.description: Savor a vibrant, luxurious breakfast platter with fresh orange juice, creamy yogurt with granola and berries, fluffy pancakes, and a loaded bagel with egg salad and avocado—perfect for starting your day in style.

tours.name: Lunch @ By Ami
tours.description: Enjoy a hearty 12-hour lunch with options: meat, fish, or vegan. Savor sandwiches, gourmet toppings, soup, fresh salad, and fries—perfect for a satisfying, flavorful break. Reserve now and indulge in a complete meal.

tours.name: Dinner @ By Ami
tours.description: Savor a delicious main course with a drink for only E25. Choose from juicy Black Angus steak, fresh catch of the day, or creamy truffle gnocchi—indulge in rich flavors and seasonal ingredients.

tours.name: High Cocktail/Gin @ By Ami
tours.description: Savor three expertly crafted cocktails with matching bites at By Ami Wijnhaven. Enjoy unique flavors, housemade syrups, and creative mixes—perfect for friends or family, with or without alcohol.

tours.name: Van Elst (U.) naar De Blauwe Kamer
tours.description: Sail past beautiful nature spots and historic Rhenen from the water. Spot rare birds, wild horses, and lush landscapes before a scenic 45-minute walk at Blauwe Kamer. An adventure full of nature, history, and wildlife awaits.

tours.name: Avondvaart vanaf Rhenen, oostwaarts (alleen varen)
tours.description: Enjoy a peaceful evening cruise on the Rhine, sailing past scenic spots like Grebbeberg and Blauwe Kamer. A guide shares stories about nature, history, and water management during this 1.5-hour adventure.

tours.name: Van Oosterbeek (Drielse Veer) naar Arnhem (Slag om Arnhem) (alleen varen)
tours.description: Sail along the Nederrijn from Oosterbeek and relive the Battle of Arnhem from the water. Hear stories of heroic crossings, see historic sites, and pass under the John Frost Bridge on this 2-hour scenic cruise.

tours.name: Courses 🎓
tours.description: Join our improv courses to unlock creativity, build scenes, craft stories, and master stage presence through fun, dynamic sessions ranging from fundamentals to advanced formats. Perfect for all skill levels!

tours.name: Amsterdam private tour to Keukenhof, tulip fields and windmills
tours.description: Explore Holland's spring magic with vibrant tulip fields, iconic windmills, and the stunning Keukenhof garden. Small group, flexible stops, and exclusive viewpoints make this 8-hour tour unforgettable.

tours.name: BROEK IN WATERLAND & ZAANSCHE SCHANS
tours.description: Embark on a captivating full-day Dutch Heritage Tour to Broek in Waterland and Zaanse Schans. Discover charming streets and historic wooden homes, then explore an open-air museum filled with windmills and traditional crafts. Experience clog making, cheese sampling, and breathtaking scenery, creating unforgettable memories in the heart of the Netherlands.

tours.name: Wheel of Wonders | May 15
tours.description: Experience an extraordinary evening of magic where the audience spins a wheel to determine the deck, leading to unique, interactive performances by three skilled magicians. With only 16 seats per show, this intimate setting promises unforgettable moments of wonder and participation. Join the fun and shape the magic!

tours.name: Sundeck Cruiser - Open Boat Private Canal Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s historic canals on a sleek open-sundeck boat, soaking in iconic sights and hidden gems. Local skippers share stories as you explore narrow passages and secret spots in this personalized cruise.

tours.name: Queer Cannabis Tour
tours.description: Join a vibrant queer-led tour exploring Amsterdam’s real cannabis history, science, and culture. Discover safe spaces, break stereotypes, and celebrate freedom through stories, sights, and insider knowledge.

tours.name: Van Elst (U.) naar de Palmerswaard
tours.description: Sail through scenic landscapes to historic Rhenen or lush Palmerswaard, then explore vibrant nature and wildlife on guided walks. Enjoy nature, history, and animal sightings in beautiful, diverse areas.

tours.name: The Hague Highlight Privé Fietstour
tours.description: Explore Den Haag in 2.5 hours with a private guide, bike, and poncho. Perfect for groups seeking a personalized city tour of the city of Peace and Justice—tailored to your wishes.

tours.name: The Champagne Diamond Surprise
tours.description: Experience the Champagne Surprise Tour at Royal Coster Diamonds, where guests enjoy a glass of champagne containing either a real diamond or a cubic zirconia. With expert guidance, learn to distinguish between the two while exploring Europe's largest diamond collection. A unique and memorable evening awaits, complete with a stunning keepsake!

tours.name: Groningen – Centrum
tours.description: Experience the gripping history of Groningen during the Battlefield Tour, where expert guides reveal the significant battles of April 1945. Explore the lasting remnants of conflict over a captivating three-hour journey, culminating at the Grote Markt. Discover the stories that shaped the city and immerse yourself in its remarkable past.

tours.name: Perimeter Oosterbeek – Slag om Arnhem
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 7-hour Battlefield Tour through Oosterbeek's eastern perimeter, exploring significant sites from the Arnhem conflict of September 1944. Led by expert guides, this 5-kilometer walk offers deep insights and a poignant connection to history, complemented by a visit to the Airborne Museum and a delightful two-course lunch.

tours.name: Operation Amherst – Drenthe
tours.description: Join the captivating "Operation Amherst – Drenthe" tour, where you'll explore the historical sites of World War II in the Netherlands. With expert guides, enjoy a blend of bus travel and short walks, uncovering the lasting impacts of the April 1945 battles. A delicious lunch in Appelscha adds to this memorable experience.

tours.name: Delfzijl Pocket – Noordelijke sector
tours.description: Embark on a captivating Battlefield Tour tracing the Canadian advance through historic sites in Delfzijl. With expert guides, explore significant locations, enjoy a delicious lunch, and uncover the remnants of battles from April 1945. This immersive experience combines history, storytelling, and stunning landscapes for a memorable day.

tours.name: Groningen – Noordelijke kant
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 3-hour walking tour of Groningen, starting at the iconic Martinitoren. Discover the city's rich history as expert guides recount the events of April 1945, revealing remnants of past battles. Enjoy a coffee break with insightful stories about the Battle of Groningen, making this experience both educational and memorable.

tours.name: Band of Brothers DagtourIn de voetsporen van Band of Brothers - dagtour
tours.description: Experience the gripping history of World War II on the "In de voetsporen van Band of Brothers" day tour. Follow the courageous soldiers of Operation Market Garden, guided by experts. Enjoy luxurious transport, a fully catered lunch, and immerse yourself in their extraordinary stories of bravery and fear.

tours.name: Delfzijl Pocket – Zuidelijke sector
tours.description: Embark on a captivating Battlefield Tour tracing the Canadian advance through historic sites like Woldendorp and Termunten. Enjoy a delicious lunch at a modern hotel, guided by experts who provide rich insights. Experience the poignant history of Farmsum, where the last German defenses stood in 1945, all in a luxurious coach.

tours.name: Operation Berlin – Terugtrekking uit Oosterbeek
tours.description: Join the captivating "Operation Berlin" walking tour, tracing the historic route from Hartenstein HQ through scenic woods to a hidden monument by the Rhine. Explore the former hospital, De Tafelberg, where wounded soldiers were left behind, and unwind with a drink at Schoonoord, reflecting on the day's discoveries.

tours.name: Strijd om de Maasbruggen
tours.description: Experience the gripping history of Rotterdam during World War II on the "Strijd om Maasbruggen" tour. Explore the fierce battles over the Maas bridges, witness the strategic maneuvers of both German and Dutch forces, and gain insights from expert guides. Enjoy coffee and cake while visiting the Marine Museum.

tours.name: Fietsvaren in Dordrecht (Biesbosch)
tours.description: Experience the unique Biesbosch tour in Dordrecht, where you can explore stunning landscapes on easy-to-use water bikes. Choose from 2, 4, or 8-hour adventures, enjoying a safe, eco-friendly ride with live GPS tracking. Perfect for all skill levels, this memorable activity combines exercise with breathtaking views.

tours.name: Huur een kano
tours.description: Experience tranquility on the water with our canoe rentals, perfect for 2-3 people. Choose between 1 or 2 hours of serene paddling in the beautiful Rijnhaven. Enjoy the peaceful surroundings while adhering to our safety guidelines, ensuring a memorable and safe adventure on the water.

tours.name: Huur een kajak
tours.description: Experience tranquility on the water with our kayak rentals! Choose between one or two hours in a single kayak, exploring the serene Rijnhaven. Enjoy the peaceful surroundings while adhering to our safety guidelines, ensuring a memorable and safe adventure. Perfect for those seeking relaxation and a unique outdoor experience.

tours.name: Huur een SUP
tours.description: Experience tranquility on the water with our single-person stand-up paddleboards (SUPs). Choose between 1 or 2 hours of serene paddling in the beautiful Rijnhaven. Enjoy the peaceful surroundings while adhering to our safety guidelines, ensuring a memorable and safe adventure on the water. Perfect for relaxation and exploration!

tours.name: Suppen op World Clean Up Day
tours.description: Join the global movement on World Cleanup Day as Dagje Suppen and Decathlon Utrecht unite to clean Utrecht's waters on September 15. Experience the thrill of paddling on SUPs and canoes while collecting waste, and be among the first 20 to register for this impactful, community-driven event.

tours.name: Ticket voor busvervoer Evenementenhal
tours.description: Hop on Texeltours' shuttle from Oudeschild, Den Burg, or De Koog to the lively Evenementenhal. Return trips run late into the night, making your event experience smooth, easy, and hassle-free.

tours.name: Koffie Compleet Zondag 7 juni 2026
tours.description: Enjoy a relaxing boat ride with fresh coffee, tea, and treats, passing Westbroekpark and the city center. Perfect for a cozy Sunday morning on the water.

tours.name: Biglietto ingresso Casa di Anne Frank + introduzione con guida italiana
tours.description: Experience the poignant history of Anne Frank's secret refuge with a guided introduction that brings her story to life. Enjoy priority access and a 20-minute overview of Anne and her family's journey, followed by a self-guided tour with an audio guide, allowing you to explore at your own pace.

tours.name: Masterclass Cucina Povera
tours.description: Learn to cook authentic Italian dishes in a fun 5-hour workshop in Amsterdam. Make fresh pasta, classic focaccia, and Torta della Nonna, all with simple ingredients and expert tips from a nonna-style chef.

tours.name: Cucina Povera - 4 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in 'Cucina Povera' in the heart of Amsterdam, where you'll transform simple ingredients into exquisite Italian dishes. Enjoy a hands-on cooking workshop, learn to make fresh pasta, and enhance your culinary skills. Perfect for team building, this experience promises delicious food and unforgettable memories.

tours.name: Cucina Povera - 3 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in 'Cucina Povera' in the heart of Amsterdam, where you'll transform simple ingredients into exquisite Italian dishes. Enjoy a hands-on cooking workshop, learn to make fresh pasta, and enhance your culinary skills while bonding with your team. A unique experience filled with flavor and creativity awaits!

tours.name: Classique Française - 3 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in the art of French cuisine during this 4-hour workshop in Amsterdam. Master classic dishes like steak tartare and entrecôte with bearnaise sauce, culminating in a delightful tarte Tatin. Perfect for enhancing culinary skills and fostering team spirit, this experience promises to tantalize your taste buds and inspire creativity.

tours.name: Taste of Brews & Bites Public Tour
tours.description: Taste 52 Dutch beers at a historic bar, learn Amsterdam’s beer stories, and enjoy a secret sip at a lively 1895 venue supporting social causes—all in 3.5 hours of flavorful exploration.

tours.name: Cucina Povera -  Request / Offerte
tours.description: Experience the art of 'Cucina Povera' in Amsterdam with a unique cooking workshop for groups of up to 120. Over four hours, learn to create delicious three- or four-course meals, including fresh pasta and traditional desserts, while enhancing your culinary skills in a fun, interactive environment.

tours.name: Classique Française - Request / Offerte
tours.description: Join a captivating 4-hour Classique Français cooking workshop in the heart of Amsterdam, where you'll master the art of classic French cuisine. Explore iconic dishes like Soupe à l’Oignon and Tarte Tatin, while enhancing your culinary skills. This unique experience promises delicious flavors and unforgettable memories for groups of 20 or more.

tours.name: Openbare Muzikale Stadswandeling
tours.description: Uncover Leeuwarden’s musical secrets on a lively 1.5-hour tour, exploring historic venues, stories of artists, and instruments. Enjoy expert guides, local tales, and a free map—pay what you think it’s worth at the end.

tours.name: Beach cleanup voor scholen
tours.description: Kids learn about plastic pollution while cleaning the beach, making a difference, and having fun. They sort trash, see the impact of plastic soup, and leave with new knowledge—all in 1.5 to 2 hours of outdoor teamwork.

tours.name: Hollandse Cruise
tours.description: Join a 1.5-hour cruise with homemade cake, traditional Dutch games, and a tasty snack platter. Sip drinks at the bar and enjoy a warm welcome aboard this charming maritime adventure.

tours.name: Kingsday Cruise - Single Tickets
tours.description: Celebrate Kings Day in style with a unique 3-hour boat party on Amsterdam's picturesque canals! Enjoy complimentary drinks, a lively sound system, and a fun captain as you and your friends create unforgettable memories on this vibrant national holiday. Don't miss the chance to experience the ultimate Kingsday celebration!

tours.name: Openbare Art Nouveau Tour
tours.description: Uncover Leeuwarden’s Art Nouveau secrets on a 2-hour walk, spotting historic buildings, hidden details, and stories from 1900. See the city through new eyes with expert guides and exclusive insights.

tours.name: Workshop Jut en Knutsel tijdens VLOED festival Zandvoort
tours.description: Join a fun beach cleanup with hands-on plastic juting, then craft colorful keychains from collected trash. Help keep Zandvoort's beaches clean while discovering the value of waste in a lively outdoor activity.

tours.name: Highlights of Amsterdam walking tour
tours.description: Embark on a private walking tour of Amsterdam, where you'll explore iconic landmarks like Dam Square and the Royal Palace. Stroll along picturesque canals, uncover hidden courtyards, and delve into the city's rich history and vibrant culture with an expert guide, making for an unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Amsterdam Light Festival - Open Boot - Zonder Drankjes
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals, cozy under blankets, past iconic landmarks like NEMO, Magere Brug, and Westerkerk. A magical water journey showcasing stunning light art and historic beauty.

tours.name: Walk-in Pattern Drawing class
tours.description: Master pattern drafting in just 8 sessions, creating your own fitted blocks and personalized designs. Gain expert guidance, essential skills, and confidence to craft perfect patterns tailored to your body.

tours.name: Dé Amsterdamse Sterrenvaart
tours.description: Join a lively boat cruise with live music from René Eshuijs, tasty Dutch snacks, and stunning views of Amsterdam’s skyline. Sing, dance, and enjoy a festive afternoon filled with laughter and gezelligheid.

tours.name: Dé Pinkster Brunch
tours.description: Sail over het IJ met een uitgebreide brunch, live Amsterdamse muziek, en de beroemde Music Bingo. Geniet van Luilak-bollen, dans, zingen, en een gezellige sfeer met vrienden, familie of collega’s.

tours.name: Bastcontainers
tours.description: Create a traditional Native American berry basket from natural bark, sparrenwortel, and local materials. Enjoy a relaxing, hands-on workshop in the forest, perfect for all skill levels, with options to combine and extend your experience.

tours.name: Workshops 👋🏻
tours.description: Join our improvisational theatre workshops, perfect for all skill levels! Each week features a unique theme, offering experienced players a chance to hone their craft while welcoming beginners to embark on their improv journey. Enjoy fun-filled sessions every Sunday or explore specialized topics with guest instructors.

tours.name: Shows 🎭
tours.description: Experience the thrill of spontaneity with ImproNation's improvisational theatre performances! Each show is a unique blend of curated acts, jam sessions, and student showcases, featuring diverse talents from across the globe. Join the excitement as every night offers fresh surprises and unforgettable moments, ensuring no two performances are ever the same.

tours.name: Private Group Street Art Walking Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s vibrant Jordaan neighborhood, uncover hidden street art, discuss its meaning, and create your own graffiti masterpiece in just 2 hours. A colorful, interactive art adventure awaits.

tours.name: Arabische kookworkshop
tours.description: Experience the rich flavors and aromas of the Middle East in this captivating Arabic cooking workshop! Immerse yourself in the enchanting world of aromatic spices and vibrant dishes, culminating in a shared feast that tantalizes your senses and embodies the warm hospitality of the region. A culinary journey not to be missed!

tours.name: Solo Traveler
tours.description: Join a flexible tour designed for solo travelers. We find the best available time for you, with easy booking and free cancellations. Just choose your date, fill out the form, and enjoy a hassle-free adventure.

tours.name: Keukenhof and Tulip Fields
tours.description: Embark on a private tour to Europe's largest tulip garden, where you'll be captivated by stunning floral displays and themed gardens. Enjoy a luxurious ride, a delightful lunch at a countryside estate, and gain insights into tulip cultivation and the rich history of Dutch tulips for an unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Giethoorn venice of the North private tour
tours.description: Embark on a private tour to Giethoorn, the enchanting "Dutch Venice." Glide through serene canals on a traditional boat, stroll past charming thatched-roof cottages, and soak in the tranquil, car-free atmosphere. With leisure time to explore local cafés and hidden gems, this experience promises unforgettable memories in a storybook setting.

tours.name: Three cities in one day Delft, The Hague and Leiden
Dutch countryside and Windmills tour
tours.description: Discover the enchanting Dutch countryside on a journey through Zaanse Schans, where iconic windmills and traditional wooden houses showcase the nation's heritage. Visit local cheese farms and charming fishing villages, savoring authentic Dutch culture while strolling along picturesque canals and historic streets. This experience promises unforgettable memories and delightful discoveries.

tours.name: Dé Amsterdamse Muziekvaart Soeverein
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals on an elegant boat, enjoying a four-course gourmet dinner, live music, and captivating stories from the captain—ending with a toast at the iconic Magere Brug.

tours.name: Natural Dyeing Workshop: Eco-Print Fabric by Atelier Nachtvlinder
tours.description: Transform plain fabrics into stunning eco-prints using natural pigments, guided by expert Annastasia. Leave with 3 meters of personalized textiles and a clear creative vision in a mindful, nature-inspired workshop.

tours.name: Street Art & Alternative Walking Tour at NDSM
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s vibrant street art scene, graffiti halls, and underground culture on a 2-hour tour. Discover squats, hidden bars, and local secrets with passionate guides who make you feel like a native.

tours.name: Study Tours
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s innovative green solutions, from renewable energy to water management, on a 2.5-hour tour showcasing how the city leads in sustainability and smart urban living.

tours.name: Havana | The 1-Hour Classic Car City Drive
tours.description: Experience the vibrant essence of Havana in just one hour from the comfort of a vintage car. Discover iconic landmarks like the Capitol and Malecón while cruising through the city's lively districts. This unique sightseeing adventure offers a memorable glimpse into Havana's rich culture and stunning scenery.

tours.name: Havana | The 2-Hour Classic Car City Drive
tours.description: Experience the vibrant essence of Havana in just two hours from the comfort of a vintage car. Explore iconic districts like Centro Habana and Vedado, witnessing landmarks such as the Capitol and Malecón. This unique sightseeing adventure combines history, culture, and stunning views, making it an unforgettable journey through the heart of Cuba.

tours.name: Havana City to Havana Airport - Transfer
tours.description: Experience a seamless one-way transfer from Havana City to José Martí International Airport. Enjoy punctual and reliable service in a chic and comfortable vehicle, all at the price of a modern taxi. Travel stress-free with up to two large suitcases, making your journey memorable and hassle-free.

tours.name: Van Wijk bij Duurstede naar de bierbrouwerij bij Fort Everdingen.
tours.description: Sail over de Lek naar Fort Everdingen, wandel door de historische omgeving, leer over ambachtelijk bier maken, proef een drankje, en geniet van rust en natuur tijdens deze 4 uur durende excursie.

tours.name: Van Wageningen naar Kasteel Doorwerth
tours.description: Sail past scenic landscapes to Kasteel Doorwerth, explore its historic halls, and enjoy a relaxing river cruise with stunning views and a guided tour—an unforgettable journey into history and nature.

tours.name: Cheese Market & City Tour
tours.description: Watch cheese being sold and weighed at Alkmaar’s historic market, then stroll through medieval streets, learn Dutch history, and taste local cheese—an authentic 2.5-hour journey into culture and tradition.

tours.name: Ticket flower field
tours.description: Capture stunning springtime photos in a beautiful tulpenveld or narcissen field. Book a 45-minute slot to create memories amid vibrant blooms, perfect for any outfit or mood.

tours.name: Workshop ouder en kind
tours.description: Master bushcraft skills: build shelters, start fires, and survive in the wild. Learn to find warmth, food, and safety in nature’s toughest moments—an immersive outdoor experience for adventurers aged 8 and up.

tours.name: Invaren met vrijwilligers en partners vanaf Wageningen
tours.description: Join fellow volunteers and partners for a lively boat ride, land excursion, and social gathering. Refresh your sailing skills, say goodbye to departing friends, and enjoy snacks and drinks in a friendly, informal setting.

tours.name: Shared Open Sundeck Cruise
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s hidden canals on a cozy, open-sundeck boat. Enjoy intimate views of historic architecture, narrow passages, and local stories from friendly skippers in a 60-minute adventure.

tours.name: Piratenvaart vanaf Rhenen
tours.description: Join a pirate adventure on the Blauwe Bever! Search for hidden treasure on a scenic river island, solve riddles, and dress up as a pirate. Perfect for kids 5-12, with fun, nature, and a splash of imagination.

tours.name: Company Winter Fishing Amsterdam
tours.description: Join a cozy winter canal cruise to fish plastic waste, sip warm drinks, and enjoy peaceful scenery. With blankets, a skipper, and a fun competition, it’s an eco-friendly adventure you won’t forget.

tours.name: Proef de Betuwe vanaf Rhenen.
tours.description: Sail through the Betuwe’s lush landscape to De Spees, a historic fortress with Roman watchtowers. Enjoy local treats, learn about ancient defenses, and explore scenic trails on this engaging 3-hour adventure.

tours.name: Piratenvaart vanaf Oosterbeek
tours.description: Kids become pirates on a boat adventure to a hidden island along the Rhine, solving riddles and hunting for treasure. Dress up, explore nature, and enjoy a fun-filled 3-hour voyage perfect for young explorers.

tours.name: Fietstour + Rondvaart (gedeeld)
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s highlights with a friendly guide, then relax on a scenic boat tour of the canals and IJ. Perfect for families, this 2-hour bike and 1-hour boat combo reveals the city’s charm from land and water.

tours.name: Vaar voor de Favela
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s enchanting canals at night, sipping unlimited drinks while admiring illuminated landmarks like the Magere Brug and Anne Frank House. Each ticket supports children in Rio’s favelas, providing education and safety. Enjoy a memorable boat ride that combines stunning sights with making a meaningful difference.

tours.name: The Hague Highlight Bike Tour  - ENGLISH
tours.description: Embark on the captivating The Hague Highlight Tour, where enthusiastic guides unveil the city's secrets while you explore on comfortable bicycles. In just 2.5 hours, discover intriguing local history, gain insider tips, and experience the charm of The Hague like never before. A memorable adventure awaits!

tours.name: Italiaanse kookworkshop
tours.description: Experience the authentic flavors of Italy in this unique cooking workshop in Amsterdam! Learn refined techniques from Italian chefs as you create classic dishes like fresh pizzas, homemade pasta, and rosemary focaccia. Enjoy a delightful evening filled with passion for food, accompanied by exquisite Italian wines. La dolce vita awaits!

tours.name: Free Tour de Haarlem
tours.description: Un paseo por Haarlem revela su historia, cultura y secretos mejor guardados, desde molinos y cárceles hasta casas históricas, en una visita llena de encanto y descubrimientos en solo unas horas.

tours.name: Combi: Rotan Mand en Bastcontainer
tours.description: Create beautiful baskets from natural materials in a scenic forest setting, then relax overnight under the stars, cook over open fire, and enjoy a unique craft experience in nature’s embrace.

tours.name: Off-the-Beaten-Path Tulip and Windmill Tour
tours.description: Escape busy crowds and explore authentic Dutch beauty with peaceful tulip gardens, vibrant fields, historic windmills, charming villages, Gouda cheese tasting, and scenic drives through UNESCO-listed landscapes—an unforgettable countryside adventure.

tours.name: Beginner Lingerie Workshop: Bralette
tours.description: Create your own stylish bandana in a fun, beginner-friendly crochet workshop. Learn stitches, choose colors, and leave with a personalized accessory after 3 hours of expert guidance and relaxing crafting.

tours.name: Beginner Lingerie Workshop: Panties or Thong
tours.description: Try crochet with a fun, beginner-friendly workshop—learn stitches, pick your colors, and make a stylish bandana in just 3 hours. All materials included, plus expert guidance and relaxing vibes.

tours.name: Sparta Granny Handbrake
tours.description: Discover the city like never before by renting a unique omafiets! With its open frame for easy access and a convenient rear rack for your belongings, this bike is perfect for exploration. Enjoy the freedom of cycling with included lights and locks, making your adventure both safe and memorable.

tours.name: Tour privato Amsterdam in bicicletta
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s iconic canals, historic houses, and vibrant neighborhoods on a private 2-hour bike tour. Pedal past Vondelpark, Leidseplein, and the Rijksmuseum with a local guide—an authentic city experience.

tours.name: Plasticvissen Scheepvaartmuseum Amsterdam
tours.description: Kids dive into museum learning then race plastic-fishing boats to collect trash and unique items, competing for prizes. A fun, eco-friendly adventure combining education and water fun in just 2 hours.

tours.name: Pizza Cruise
tours.description: Experience the enchanting canals of Amsterdam on a private 90-minute cruise, where you’ll savor delicious pizza and enjoy unlimited drinks. Glide past iconic landmarks with a knowledgeable guide, uncovering the city's rich history while celebrating with friends and family in a comfortable, eco-friendly boat. A truly memorable adventure awaits!

tours.name: The Rose Séance Experiment
tours.description: Join a haunting 2.5-hour séance in historic Amsterdam, where spirits and mysteries come alive. Communicate with the past, enjoy drinks, guided tours, and a spirit photo in a chilling, unforgettable setting near Jordaan.

tours.name: Pure Dutch - 4 courses
tours.description: Experience the essence of Dutch cuisine in a vibrant 4-hour cooking workshop in Amsterdam. Discover traditional dishes like Zaanse mustard soup and Texels lamb, while enhancing your culinary skills. Enjoy the warmth of Dutch hospitality, perfect for team building, and customize your experience with fun add-ons for a memorable day.

tours.name: Cucina Povera - Italian
tours.description: Experience the art of 'Cucina Povera' in Amsterdam, where simple ingredients become exquisite dishes. Perfect for groups of up to 120, this immersive cooking workshop offers three- or four-course meals and the chance to master fresh pasta making. Enhance your skills while enjoying a unique culinary adventure!

tours.name: Pure Dutch - 3 courses
tours.description: Immerse yourself in the rich flavors of Dutch cuisine during this 4-hour cooking workshop in the heart of Amsterdam. Discover traditional dishes like Zaanse mustard soup and Texels lamb, while enhancing your culinary skills. Enjoy a unique blend of cooking, team building, and the warmth of Dutch hospitality.

tours.name: Koningsvissen Rotterdam
tours.description: Join a lively canal cleanup on April 28th, sailing with plastic fishing boats to collect waste, enjoy drinks, and help the environment. All gear provided, fun guaranteed—perfect for a hangover recovery!

tours.name: MIX&DRIP SESSIE
tours.description: Create your own unique BE@RBRICK in a fun, creative session perfect for friends, dates, or celebrations. Choose from a variety of bears and bunnies, then take home a personalized keepsake to cherish forever.

tours.name: Masterclass Pure Dutch
tours.description: Taste authentic Dutch flavors in a 5-hour chef-led class in Amsterdam. Make and enjoy hearty dishes like mustard soup, Texel lamb, and grandma’s apple pie—perfect for sharing with friends and family.

tours.name: Dé Amsterdamse Muziekvaart (Middag)
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s skyline on MS de Jordaan, enjoy live music, lively music bingo, and a hearty Dutch buffet with stroopwafels and ice cream. Sing, dance, and soak up the festive atmosphere on this unforgettable cruise.

tours.name: Kerstvaart 2026
tours.description: Sail through Amsterdam’s skyline on MS de Jordaan, enjoy festive music, a delicious 3-course Christmas buffet, lively bingo, and lively singing and dancing—an authentic, joyful holiday celebration on the water.

tours.name: Veilig Bijl Gebruik en Onderhoud
tours.description: Master the safe and versatile use of a hatchet in a two-day outdoor course. Learn tree felling, wood splitting, carving, and maintenance—all in beautiful forest surroundings. Perfect for outdoor enthusiasts aged 16+.

tours.name: Pizza Party
tours.description: Bake delicious pizza in the wild using a portable oven, learning dough, fire, and cooking techniques amid stunning forest scenery. Enjoy hands-on fun, tasty toppings, and relaxing moments in nature’s embrace.

tours.name: Vezels & Touw
tours.description: Spend two relaxing days immersed in natural fibers, learning to gather, process, and weave with traditional techniques in a beautiful forest setting. Create, unwind, and connect with nature in this hands-on fiber course.

tours.name: King's Day Boat party
tours.description: Celebrate King's Day on a lively boat with unlimited drinks, good vibes, and your own weed. Dance, relax, and enjoy 3 hours of festive fun on the water.

tours.name: Lingerie Workshop Series 2.0: Wired Bra (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Create your own underwire bra and matching lingerie in a fun, hands-on workshop. Learn expert techniques, craft a perfect fit, and leave with a beautiful, custom-made set. All materials included—sewing skills recommended.

tours.name: Berkenbast Skolotni
tours.description: Join a unique workshop in the Netherlands where you'll master the art of working with exquisite birch bark from northern Scandinavia. Discover its properties, layering techniques, and the processing of spruce roots, all while creating a stunning container. Experience hands-on learning in a creative atelier setting. Perfect for ages 16 and up!

tours.name: Berkenbast Tavlinka
tours.description: Join a unique workshop in the Netherlands where you'll master the art of working with exquisite birch bark from northern Scandinavia. Discover its properties, preparation, and layering techniques while creating your own stunning container. This hands-on experience promises to be both educational and creatively fulfilling in a charming atelier setting.

tours.name: Five-hour Countryside & Windmills Tour
tours.description: Escape the city on a private 5-hour tour of the Dutch countryside, featuring hotel pick-up and drop-off. Discover the enchanting Zaanse Schans with its iconic windmills and local crafts, while exploring picturesque villages and lush landscapes. Enjoy personalized insights from your guide, blending history, nature, and Dutch traditions in one unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Four-hour Private Keukenhof Tour
tours.description: Experience the vibrant beauty of Keukenhof Gardens on a private 4-hour tour. Enjoy convenient hotel pick-up and drop-off as you explore stunning tulip fields and floral displays. With a knowledgeable guide sharing insights into the region's horticultural history, this tour promises unforgettable sights and memorable moments in Holland's springtime paradise.

tours.name: Five-hour Private Keukenhof Tour
tours.description: Experience a private 5-hour escape to the stunning Keukenhof Gardens and the picturesque Dutch countryside. Enjoy breathtaking floral displays, explore vibrant tulip fields, and visit charming villages and windmills. With hotel pick-up and a knowledgeable guide, this springtime adventure promises unforgettable sights and insights in Holland.

tours.name: Private Tour to Efteling Theme Park
tours.description: Embark on a magical journey to Efteling Theme Park, where fairy tales come to life! Enjoy a full day of enchanting attractions, thrilling rides, and whimsical shows, all with convenient hotel pick-up and drop-off. This unforgettable adventure is perfect for families, couples, and theme park enthusiasts seeking excitement and wonder.

tours.name: Into The Woods halfjaar opleiding 2026
tours.description: Embark on a transformative six-month journey with Siegurd Bushcraft & Survival and Living by Nature. This immersive program offers nature enthusiasts a comprehensive training experience, blending engaging theory with hands-on skills. Discover the art of living harmoniously with nature and prepare for unforgettable adventures in the great outdoors!

tours.name: Canal Pride Party Boat
tours.description: Glide through Amsterdam’s illuminated canals on a cozy electric boat, sipping drinks and soaking in stunning art installations. Hear stories, learn city secrets, and enjoy the vibrant festival atmosphere from a warm, comfortable seat.

tours.name: Beginner Crafting Course 1.0
tours.description: Join our flexible 4-lesson crafting courses in Amsterdam to learn sewing or various crafts like knitting, embroidery, crochet, or macramé. Create unique items with expert guidance and choose your schedule.

tours.name: Art & Soul Retreat aan het water
tours.description: Experience a unique blend of creativity, relaxation, and culinary delight at Boutique Hotel De Bungelaer. Enjoy a four-day art course with international artist Geoffrey Wijn, fine dining, and yoga in a serene setting. Perfect for art lovers seeking inspiration, delicious food, and a memorable getaway with friends or partners.

tours.name: Vuur de basis
tours.description: Master the art of building a reliable fire from scratch, using methods like firesteel and flint. Learn to find tinder, manage flames, and leave no trace—essential skills for survival and emergencies.

tours.name: Varen met Koningsdag
tours.description: Glide silently through Utrecht’s scenic spots on an electric boat, starting almost anywhere in the city. Celebrate Koningsdag on the water, creating unforgettable memories in a peaceful, eco-friendly way.

tours.name: Pro Wrestling Holland Live x Boom Chicago
tours.description: Get ready to RUMBLE as Pro Wrestling Holland returns to Boom Chicago on February 27, 2026! Witness shocking twists, intense matches, and electrifying moments in this unforgettable live show. Book your seat now!

tours.name: Festival di Dande 2024
tours.description: Experience the vibrant Festival Di Dande, a celebration filled with lively music, dance, and cultural performances. Immerse yourself in the rich traditions and joyous atmosphere, making unforgettable memories as you connect with the community and enjoy the unique flavors and artistry that this festival has to offer.

tours.name: Luchtoorlog boven Friesland
tours.description: Experience the intense air warfare over Friesland during World War II, where Allied bombers frequently traverse the skies. Discover the strategic defenses established to protect key cities and military sites, and immerse yourself in the historical significance of this frontline region. A captivating journey through a pivotal chapter in history awaits.

tours.name: Private Christmas Road Trip: From Amsterdam to Brussels Market
tours.description: Enjoy a luxurious, stress-free Christmas road trip from Amsterdam to Brussels with festive treats, captivating stories, VR visuals, and holiday magic at Winter Wonders—an unforgettable holiday adventure for all.

tours.name: eFoil Course 30 min (demo)
tours.description: Float effortlessly over water on a sleek eFoil, feeling like you're flying. Perfect for all skill levels, with expert guidance. Book now and experience the thrill of gliding on the newest, safest, and most exciting water sport.

tours.name: Boom Gone Country
tours.description: Join a lively country dance party in Amsterdam with real line dances, fun costumes, and a welcoming crowd. Feel the energy of Nashville-style music and dance your heart out in a night you won’t forget.

tours.name: PC King Level up
tours.description: Celebrate the PC-King's 40th birthday at a unique retro gaming party at the HomeComputerMuseum! Enjoy exclusive talks from LucasArts pioneers David and Annie Fox, who will share insights into the creation of beloved video games. Join this unforgettable milestone event filled with nostalgia and gaming history!

tours.name: VOS in de VS – Michiel Vos
tours.description: Join Dutch-American journalist Michiel Vos for a lively evening of sharp insights, personal stories, and humor about American culture, politics, and identity—offering a unique inside look at the U.S. from someone living between two worlds.

tours.name: [Community Night] Izzy Goessens "Crumble"
tours.description: Join Izzy’s hilarious debut as she navigates online dating chaos, tears, and awkward moments. Expect laughs, vulnerability, and wild stories about love, grief, and making poor decisions in a world of digital romance.

tours.name: [Academy] Workshop with Elf Lyons: How to Make your Dream Show (One Day Intensive)
tours.description: Unlock your creative potential with a relaxed, fun improv rap workshop that turns fear into freedom, helping you find your flow, craft punchlines, and enjoy making music in a stress-free environment.

tours.name: Naco Ladino – Carlos Ballarta
tours.description: Laugh, think, and challenge norms with Carlos Ballarta’s sharp humor on Latin American culture, identity, and modern life. A bold, provocative show in Spanish that will make you reflect and laugh out loud.

tours.name: Nanutria en Amsterdam
tours.description: Venezuelan comedian Nanutria delivers a fresh, improvisational stand-up show filled with sharp irony, tackling everyday, complex, and silly topics. Each performance is unique, hilarious, and perfect for Spanish speakers.

tours.name: 1637 Dagen van Onrecht
tours.description: Joseph Oubelkas's gripping story of resilience: 1637 days in a Moroccan cell, choosing growth over hatred, and rediscovering freedom through hope, humor, and forgiveness. An emotional journey of human strength and renewal.

tours.name: Owner's Table
tours.description: Join a curated evening at the Owner’s Table with great seats, snacks, bubbles, and surprises. Sip cava, enjoy tasty bitterballen, then settle in for an unforgettable comedy show in Amsterdam’s best theater.

tours.name: Full Body Thinking LIVE – met Wouter de Jong
tours.description: Wouter de Jong onthult hoe je lichaam de sleutel is tot echte rust en focus. Met humor en wetenschap laat hij zien dat ontspanning begint in je lijf, niet in je hoofd. Een avond vol inzicht en inspiratie.

tours.name: Angelo Duro "Ho tre belle notizie"
tours.description: Angelo Duro’s latest show, “Ho tre belle notizie,” delivers his signature sharp humor with three surprising stories. Expect laughs, honesty, and bold insights that will leave you talking long after the curtain falls.

tours.name: Van Rhenen naar de Eckse Waarden
tours.description: Join a scenic boat trip to Eckse Waarden, a vital bird habitat. Spot moorhens, snipes, and more with a guide, then enjoy a short nature walk. Perfect for bird lovers seeking a peaceful, nature-filled adventure.

tours.name: Avondvaart Van Rhenen naar de Eckse Waarden
tours.description: Join a scenic boat trip to Eckse Waarden, a vital bird habitat. Spot rare waterbirds like porseleinhoen and watersnip during a guided walk, with stunning views along the Nederrijn. Perfect for nature lovers and birdwatchers.

tours.name: Verrassingsvaart vanaf Wageningen
tours.description: Join a scenic boat trip to a hidden, historic nature area along the Nederrijn. Enjoy a guided ¾-hour walk through beautiful, intriguing landscapes filled with natural and cultural sights. An adventure worth exploring.

tours.name: Take the Cannoli: The Movie Quiz
tours.description: Laugh your way through 30 years of comedy with quick improv games, hilarious scenes, and audience suggestions, all while enjoying drinks. A lively, fast-paced night of fun, surprises, and nonstop laughter.

tours.name: Pattern Drawing Workshop Series 1.0 - Summer Edition
tours.description: Create perfect, custom-fit patterns in just four days. Learn to draft, adjust, and design your own clothing blocks with expert guidance—turn your ideas into tailored garments you can make yourself.

tours.name: Epic Rap Battles of History
tours.description: Join the hilarious rap battles of history live in Amsterdam, where legendary figures clash in witty, high-energy showdowns featuring stars like Weird Al and Snoop Dogg. Don't miss this epic, one-of-a-kind event!

tours.name: Special: Feestcruise op Koningsdag door almere!
tours.description: Celebrate Koningsdag on a spacious boat cruise through Almere’s lively waters, with music, festive vibes, and stunning views. Perfect for groups seeking a fun, relaxed way to enjoy the holiday’s vibrant atmosphere.

tours.name: Watch the World Cup at Boom Chicago!
tours.description: Watch Euro or World Cup matches on massive screens at Boom Chicago. Enjoy table service, a lively crowd, and a fun atmosphere. Reserve your spot early for the best view and drinks delivered right to your table.

tours.name: E-Bike
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before with StarBikes Rental! Choose from a diverse range of top-brand bikes, including E-bikes, tandems, and traditional 'omafiets'. Explore scenic bike paths or enjoy a countryside picnic with our rental options. Experience the city at your own pace with the perfect bike for every adventure!

tours.name: Sparta Granny Footbrake
tours.description: Rent a bike and explore the city with ease! Our unique omafiets features an open frame for effortless riding and a rear rack for your luggage. Equipped with lights and locks, these bikes ensure a safe and enjoyable adventure. Don’t forget your good mood and ID for a memorable day out!

tours.name: Spéciales (Tandem)
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before with StarBikes Rental! Choose from a diverse selection of top-brand bikes, including romantic tandem options and classic Dutch "omafiets." Explore scenic bike paths or venture into the countryside with a picnic basket. Experience the joy of cycling in a city designed for it!

tours.name: Fun2Go
tours.description: Discover the city like never before by renting a bike designed specifically for customers with disabilities. Enjoy a full day of exploration from opening to closing, ensuring a unique and memorable experience. Just bring your good mood and identification, and get ready for an adventure on two wheels!

tours.name: Velopair
tours.description: Discover the city like never before with our specially designed bike for disabled customers! Enjoy the freedom of exploration with a detachable wheelchair feature. Rent for a full day, from opening to closing, and embark on a memorable adventure. Just bring your good mood and valid ID for an unforgettable experience!

tours.name: Velo+
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam like never before with our specially designed electric bike for disabled customers, allowing you to carry your own wheelchair. Enjoy a full day of exploration on our top-quality bikes, from E-bikes to traditional models, all at the lowest prices in the city. Adventure awaits!

tours.name: Mobility Scooter
tours.description: Explore the city like never before by renting a foldable scooter, designed specifically for seniors and those with mobility challenges. At StarBikes Rental, enjoy a diverse selection of top-quality bikes, including traditional Dutch models. Discover Amsterdam's scenic bike paths or venture into the countryside with ease and comfort.

tours.name: The Hague Highlight Privé Wandeltour
tours.description: Explore Den Haag’s highlights in 2 hours with a private guide, who meets you at your hotel or station and reveals the city's hidden gems, all while staying dry with a poncho.

tours.name: Smart Energy Deep Dive
tours.description: Join a 2.5-hour session exploring how citizens are transforming energy use—producing, trading, and shaping a sustainable future through innovative projects like City-zen.

tours.name: Smart Mobility Deep Dive
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s innovative mobility scene, from electric shared rides to autonomous boats, and learn how the city is shaping sustainable, smart transport solutions for the future.

tours.name: Circular City Deep Dive
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s bold move toward sustainability in a 2.5-hour session on smart solutions and circular economy policies shaping our future. Join innovators transforming raw material use today.

tours.name: Amsterdam Family - Private Intro tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam with your family on a fun 1.5-hour guided walk through iconic sights and hidden gems. Kids enjoy quizzes, treasure hunts, and tasty Dutch cookies while your host shares local tips and surprises.

tours.name: Paseo en Barco Ámsterdam
tours.description: Experience the enchanting canals of Amsterdam on a 75-minute boat tour that reveals the city's rich history and stunning architecture. Recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage site, these waterways showcase Amsterdam's Golden Age, offering a unique perspective of its iconic landmarks, all enhanced by an informative Spanish audio guide.

tours.name: [Academy] Intro to Improv Class
tours.description: Unlock your creativity with fun improv exercises that boost agreement, spontaneity, and listening skills—no experience needed. Join us and discover how to think on your feet in a welcoming, supportive environment.

tours.name: [Academy] Level 2 Class: The 2-Person Scene
tours.description: Master the art of scene-building in 8 weeks, crafting compelling moments rooted in emotion, relationships, and environment. Learn the essentials of 2-person scenes that fuel all improvisation styles.

tours.name: [Academy] Level 3 Class: Building Character
tours.description: Unleash your creativity over 8 weeks by mastering character building through physicality, emotion, status, and music. Craft compelling, multi-dimensional characters that leap off the page.

tours.name: [Academy] (Long-Form) Level 4 Class: Advanced Scenework
tours.description: Enhance your scene skills over 8 weeks, mastering organic starts, support moves, and opening devices. Build dynamic, supportive performances and showcase your growth in a final end-of-session performance.

tours.name: Stadswandeling Delft met gids
tours.description: Experience Delft like never before with a private guided city walk! Discover hidden courtyards and charming canals as knowledgeable local guides bring the city's rich history to life. Tailor your tour to your interests and enjoy a memorable journey through this picturesque destination, perfect for small groups and special requests.

tours.name: Historische stadswandeling Delft
tours.description: Join the most popular city walk in Delft and uncover the fascinating history behind Willem van Oranje's burial, the city's VOC heritage, and the story of Johannes Vermeer. Led by an enthusiastic guide, this engaging tour offers a unique glimpse into Delft's rich past, with an optional visit to the Nieuwe Kerk.

tours.name: Stadswandeling Stap in de Gouden Eeuw van Delft
tours.description: Explore Delft's Golden Age with a private guide on a captivating 1.5-hour walking tour. Discover the flourishing art and science of the era, featuring renowned figures like Vermeer and Hugo de Groot. This unique experience immerses you in the rich history of Delft, perfect for small groups seeking inspiration.

tours.name: Zaterdagse Stadswandeling Delft
tours.description: Join our captivating historical walking tour of Delft every Saturday! Explore the charming city center with an enthusiastic guide who reveals the fascinating stories behind Willem van Oranje, Vermeer, and the iconic Delftware. Experience the beauty of Delft's canals and hidden gems in just one hour, with a small group for a personalized adventure.

tours.name: Stadswandeling Vermeer
tours.description: Discover the enchanting city of Delft on a 1.5-hour guided walking tour. Led by an enthusiastic guide, explore historic sites linked to the renowned painter Vermeer, including his birthplace and the church of his baptism. Immerse yourself in the charm of the 17th century as you stroll through this picturesque town.

tours.name: Hofjeswandeling Delft
tours.description: Discover the hidden charm of Delft on a captivating 1.5-hour guided city walk. Explore picturesque hofjes, narrow streets, and elegant buildings, uncovering the rich history behind these quaint residences. Perfect for all ages, this unique experience offers a glimpse into the city's past and present, making it a memorable adventure.

tours.name: Happy Lunch tour
tours.description: Embark on a delightful culinary walk through Delft with your own group!
