Enjoy a drink, explore the city with a knowledgeable guide, and savor a main course with a beverage and coffee to finish. Perfect for gatherings, this 2.5-hour experience promises a memorable taste of Delft every day!

tours.name: Happy Diner tour
tours.description: Embark on a delightful culinary journey through Delft, visiting three unique restaurants. Enjoy a welcome drink and appetizer, followed by a guided stroll through the historic city. Savor a main course and finish with a delectable dessert and coffee, all while soaking in local insights. A memorable experience awaits!

tours.name: Rondleidingen Oude/Nieuwe Kerk Delft
tours.description: Experience a private guided tour of Delft's iconic churches, the Nieuwe Kerk and Oude Kerk. Uncover the rich history of Willem van Oranje and admire stunning stained glass windows. With opportunities for unique encounters and insights into famous figures, this tour promises an unforgettable journey through time and culture.

tours.name: Puzzeltocht door Delft
tours.description: Embark on a captivating puzzle adventure through the historic streets of Delft! This self-guided tour allows you to explore at your own pace, uncovering fascinating facts about the city. Starting and ending at the Markt, this engaging experience lasts two hours and is perfect for participants of all ages.

tours.name: Algemeen historische stadswandeling
tours.description: Discover the captivating history of Delft on a 1.5-hour private walking tour with an enthusiastic guide. Uncover intriguing stories about Willem van Oranje, the city's VOC heritage, and the legacy of Johannes Vermeer. This engaging experience offers a unique blend of culture and history, perfect for all ages.

tours.name: Fietstocht Delft met gids
tours.description: Explore the enchanting city of Delft on a guided bike tour! In just 1.5 hours, discover scenic spots like Delftse Hout and Agnetapark while learning fascinating facts. Choose from various routes, including the picturesque Bieslandse polder or a Vermeer-themed ride, for a unique and memorable adventure. Perfect for all ages!

tours.name: [Academy] (Long-Form) Level 5 Class: Finding The Game
tours.description: Master scene dynamics by mastering game and point of view, using tools like shiny objects and gift-giving to create engaging, synchronized performances. An 8-week journey ending in a live showcase.

tours.name: Stacejam: A Solo Musical Improv Show
tours.description: Watch Stacey Smith craft an entire world from a single suggestion, bringing dozens of characters to life through spontaneous scenes and songs in a lively, one-hour musical improv show.

tours.name: [Academy] Musical Improv: Level 1
tours.description: Unleash your inner performer with lively musical improv sessions. Sing, create, and laugh through spontaneous scenes that turn your ideas into unforgettable melodies every Sunday afternoon.

tours.name: Het verhaal van de Biesbosch Linie Crossers
tours.description: Embark on a unique 3-hour boat tour through the Hollandse Biesbosch, guided by an expert who reveals the gripping history of wartime 'crossers' and their hidden ark. Discover the remnants of this significant vessel while enjoying coffee and tea, all in a picturesque setting. Limited to 30 participants for an intimate experience.

tours.name: Slag om Arnhem vanuit Duits perspectief – Aanval op Meinerswijk
tours.description: Experience the Battle of Arnhem from a unique German perspective with Ingrid Maan. Through exclusive photos and personal accounts from veterans, delve into their memories and the realities of the attack on Meinerswijk. This immersive tour combines history and personal stories, offering a profound connection to wartime experiences.

tours.name: De strijd om Hell’s Highway
tours.description: Embark on an immersive 8-hour battlefield tour tracing the heroic efforts of the American 101st Airborne Division along Hell’s Highway. Discover key locations of fierce combat during September 1944, enriched by expert guides who reveal the historical significance and remnants of these pivotal events, all while enjoying comfortable transport and lunch.

tours.name: Dinner Package
tours.description: Enjoy a 4-course dinner at ACE followed by the sensational Coqtales all-male show. Perfect for a lively girls’ night out with great food, drinks, and outrageous entertainment in Amsterdam.

tours.name: Tyrone
tours.description: Add excitement to your party with a professional male stripper. Choose costumes, enjoy a 20-minute dance, and create unforgettable memories. Perfect for birthdays, bachelorette parties, or girls' nights out. Book now!

tours.name: Caramel Macchiato
tours.description: Add excitement to your party with a professional male stripper in costume of your choice. Enjoy a 20-minute dance, photos, and unforgettable teasing—perfect for birthdays, bachelorette parties, or girls' nights.

tours.name: Bram
tours.description: Add excitement to your party with a professional male stripper dressed in your choice of costume. Enjoy a 20-minute act, flirtatious moves, and unforgettable fun—perfect for birthdays, bachelorette, or girls' nights out.

tours.description: Add excitement to your celebration with a professional male stripper dressed in your favorite costume. Enjoy a 20-minute dance, photos, and unforgettable teasing—perfect for birthdays, bachelorette parties, or girls' nights.

tours.description: Add excitement to your party with a professional male stripper dressed in your choice of costume. Enjoy a 20-minute dance, photos, and unforgettable teasing—perfect for birthdays, bachelorette, or girls’ nights.

tours.description: Add excitement to your party with a professional male stripper in costumes like firefighter or doctor. Enjoy a 20-minute show, photos, and a lap dance—guaranteed to make your event unforgettable. Book now!

tours.name: [Academy] Elective Class: Comedy Writing
tours.description: Unleash your comedic voice in this 4-week course with hands-on exercises, personalized coaching, and group feedback. Learn to craft jokes, find your perspective, and dip into satire—all designed to make your humor stand out.

tours.name: Diamond Polishing Experience Tour
tours.description: Create your own brilliant in Amsterdam’s historic diamond workshop, learn about the 4 C’s, add facets to your diamond with expert guidance, then toast with champagne and take home a personalized gem.

tours.description: Explore iconic long-form styles like La Ronde and the Pretty Flower, gaining a broad overview. Plus, showcase your work in an exciting end-of-session performance.

tours.description: Unleash your improv energy with fast-paced, inspiring games that challenge your commitment. Each week offers fresh challenges, culminating in a lively performance you won’t want to miss.

tours.name: [Academy] Elective Class: Sketch Comedy
tours.description: Join a 6-week sketch comedy course with Laura Maynard, turning ideas into hilarious sketches. Create an original show onstage through writing, improvising, and directing in this immersive, hands-on experience.

tours.name: Utrecht Private Tour
tours.description: Travel from Amsterdam to Utrecht and explore its unique canals, historic churches, and the towering Dom. Enjoy personalized time for photos and shopping in this charming, labyrinthine Dutch city.

tours.name: Private Day Trip to Rotterdam - The Hague and Madurodam
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s innovative architecture, stroll through The Hague’s historic sites, and marvel at tiny Dutch landmarks in Madurodam—all in one personalized 7-hour tour with a friendly guide.

tours.name: Private Day Trip to Bruges and Ghent
tours.description: Explore Bruges and Ghent on a private 13-hour trip from Amsterdam. Wander medieval streets, admire stunning canals, visit historic landmarks, and enjoy Belgian chocolates, beers, and boat rides in these enchanting cities.

tours.name: Private Guided Tour in Rijksmuseum
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour journey through the Rijksmuseum, the Netherlands' premier art destination. Accompanied by a knowledgeable Spanish-speaking guide, explore over four centuries of Dutch art history. This unique experience promises to immerse both adults and children in the rich cultural heritage of the Netherlands.

tours.name: The Flower Fairy Tour
tours.description: Join Fleur in a magical flower forest to pick blooms, craft a beautiful arrangement, dress up as a fairy, enjoy a Dutch-inspired tea party, and decorate mini pancakes—an enchanting 4-hour adventure full of fun and whimsy.

tours.name: The Crown Tour
tours.description: Kids transform into princesses or knights with costumes, makeup, and accessories, then enjoy a royal carriage ride and etiquette lessons. A magical, interactive 4-hour experience in Amsterdam for young royalty.

tours.name: Fietsverhuur Lage Vuursche Fazantenhof
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking in the stunning landscapes of Lage Vuursche! Rent a well-tuned bike effortlessly and hit the scenic red and green trails, offering 20 km and 10 km routes respectively. Whether you're a beginner or seasoned rider, enjoy an unforgettable adventure with friendly support along the way.

tours.name: Amsterdam
tours.description: Experience the thrill of a Silent Rave in Amsterdam, where you can dance to your favorite beats with wireless headphones! Perfect for all ages, this unique event allows you to immerse yourself in music while enjoying the vibrant atmosphere of "Little Manhattan." Don’t miss out on this unforgettable night!

tours.name: Tilburg
tours.description: Experience the thrill of a Silent Rave, where you can dance to your favorite beats with headphones in a unique, immersive atmosphere. Perfect for all ages, this unforgettable night promises fun and excitement. Rent your headphones and join the party at Lovensestraat 17-03 in Tilburg for a night to remember!

tours.description: Experience the thrill of riding unique skelters from Berg, designed for family fun! Choose from various models, including spacious family skelters, a driewielskelter with a sidecar, and a speedy single-seater. Complete your adventure with authentic autoped steps, all perfect for creating unforgettable memories together.

Choose from various models, including a spacious family skelter, a versatile Trike, or a speedy single-seater. Each ride promises excitement and adventure, making it a memorable outing for kids and parents alike. Join the fun and pedal your way to joy!

tours.description: Explore the Netherlands in a day with a small group tour: walk through The Hague’s historic sites, marvel at Rotterdam’s innovative skyline, and see centuries-old windmills in Kinderdijk—an unforgettable journey into Dutch culture.

tours.name: Explore Amsterdam through the eyes of Rembrandt van Rijn
tours.description: Step into 17th-century Amsterdam’s Golden Age with a 3-hour walk through historic canals and streets. Uncover Rembrandt’s story, vibrant trade, and art, all brought alive with stories, anecdotes, and augmented reality.

tours.description: Join lively hosting and audience games that keep everyone engaged and laughing, turning your event into an unforgettable, interactive experience full of fun surprises.

tours.description: Experience the thrill of a Silent Rave, where you can dance to your own beat with rented headphones! Perfect for all ages, this unique event allows you to enjoy music in a vibrant atmosphere. Just pick up your headphones and get ready for an unforgettable night of fun and freedom!

tours.description: Experience the thrill of exploring on your own terms with a Vespa rental! Enjoy unlimited kilometers and the freedom to choose your start time for a 5-hour adventure. With a self-service system, pick up and return your Vespa hassle-free, making every moment memorable as you cruise through the day.

tours.name: Hele Dag
tours.description: Experience the freedom of exploring on a Vespa for a whole day! With a self-service system, you can easily pick up and return your scooter at your convenience. Enjoy unlimited kilometers, full insurance, and a full tank, making your adventure both exciting and hassle-free. Perfect for those aged 18 and over!

tours.description: Join the captivating Battlefield Tour of the Waalbrug in Nijmegen, where a knowledgeable guide leads you through a 5-kilometer journey exploring the intense battles of September 1944. Discover lasting remnants of history and immerse yourself in the stories that shaped this iconic site, all within a memorable 2.5-hour experience.
