Experience expert care for pieces from any source, and while you wait, immerse yourself in over 180 years of exquisite craftsmanship. Don’t miss this unique opportunity to restore your jewelry’s brilliance!

tours.name: [Academy] Level 6: Build Your Own Games
tours.description: Unlock your creativity by exploring different styles and formats, then craft your own unique games in a fun, hands-on experience that sparks imagination and skill.

tours.name: Music Improv Spectacular
tours.description: A hilarious Wednesday show where guest storytellers inspire comedians to craft spontaneous scenes and songs, blending storytelling and music for an unforgettable, laugh-out-loud experience.

tours.name: Disco DAISY
tours.description: Step onto Alkmaar’s first floating dance bar, where lively music meets the water’s edge. Feel the rhythm, dance under the sky, and enjoy a unique experience on this one-of-a-kind floating café.

tours.name: Paaseieren zoeken
tours.description: Join a fun Easter egg hunt on a safari ship along the Nederrijn, with the Easter Bunny onboard. Search for hidden eggs, enjoy scenic river views, and learn about the river and ship during this exciting 3-hour adventure.

tours.name: Visit Zaanse Schans, blooming flower fields and Keukenhof
tours.description: Cycle through vibrant flower fields, visit historic Zaanse Schans windmills and cheese farms, and marvel at the stunning Keukenhof gardens—an unforgettable spring adventure full of color, scent, and Dutch charm.

tours.name: Take a look at the world’s largest flower trade center in Aalsmeer
tours.description: Watch millions of vibrant flowers from 50 countries traded live at the world’s largest flower auction. Feel the buzz of the bustling floor and see the heart of international flower trade in action.

tours.name: Cycle through the blooming flower fields soaking up the scent of spring
tours.description: Cycle through vibrant Dutch flower fields in full bloom, breathing in the sweet scents of tulips, daffodils, and hyacinths. Enjoy 12 km of easy riding in a stunning, colorful landscape perfect for happy memories.

tours.name: Cycle tour through the flower fields and visit flowerpark 'Keukenhof'
tours.description: Cycle through vibrant flower fields and visit Keukenhof’s stunning gardens, where millions of tulips and blooms create a breathtaking, fragrant landscape—an unforgettable spring celebration of color and beauty.

tours.name: Karting
tours.description: Experience the thrill of racing at Europe’s largest indoor karting arena, just outside Amsterdam’s city center. Perfect for both seasoned racers and beginners, this exciting attraction offers two exhilarating 15-minute karting rounds, along with laser battles, refreshing beers, and tasty snacks for an unforgettable day of fun!

tours.name: Cycle below sea level through reclamation 'The Beemster'
tours.description: Cycle through the UNESCO Beemster polder and historic Graft-de Rijp, marvel at centuries-old forts and charming villages, and see how Dutch ingenuity protected the Netherlands for centuries—all in 5.5 hours.

tours.name: Vlechten met Berkenbast
tours.description: Create a small basket from birch bark, a strong, historic material used across cultures. In 5.5 hours, learn the craft, enjoy coffee and snacks, and leave with a beautiful handmade piece.

tours.name: Week - Mountainbike huren Hilversum
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking in Hilversum with over 200 top-quality bikes for all ages. Enjoy easy access to stunning trails just 12 minutes away, complete with modern features and free breakdown service. Each bike is meticulously maintained, ensuring an unforgettable adventure on the beautiful Utrechtse Heuvelrug.

tours.name: Perimeter Oosterbeek - Noordelijke sector
tours.description: Join the Battlefield Tour on October 2, 2022, for a poignant 5-kilometer walk through the eastern perimeter, exploring significant sites from September 1944. Led by expert guides, this immersive experience includes entry to the Airborne Museum Hartenstein and a delightful two-course lunch at restaurant Schoonoord.

tours.name: Perimeter Oosterbeek - Zuidelijke sector
tours.description: Join the Battlefield Tour on October 16, 2022, for a poignant 5-kilometer walk through the eastern perimeter of Oosterbeek. Led by an expert guide, you'll explore significant historical sites and gain insight into the events of September 1944, witnessing the lasting impact of this pivotal moment in history.

tours.name: SD’ers vluchten naar Schiermonnikoog – Dagtour Exclusief!
tours.description: Join an exclusive tour on September 4, 2022, to explore a gripping historical escape. Discover the dramatic flight of 120 SD and SS members from Groningen to Zoutkamp, featuring notorious figures like Robert Lehnhoff. Experience the tension of their daring plan to evade capture during a pivotal moment in history.

tours.name: LGBTEAM Building
tours.description: Join a lively 2-hour walk through Amsterdam’s pink and historic district, led by a storyteller. Share stories, explore LGBTQ+ history, and build stronger, more inclusive teams in a fun, safe environment.

tours.name: One Hour Rental
tours.description: Experience the charm of Den Haag from its serene waterways! Paddle through a blend of historic and modern architecture, explore picturesque rural areas, and enjoy scenic picnic spots along the way. With options for dining and relaxation, this unique canoeing adventure promises unforgettable moments in a stunning setting.

tours.name: Two Hour Rental
tours.description: Experience the charm of Den Haag's waterways with a two-hour canoe adventure! Paddle through the historic center, marvel at the blend of old and modern architecture, and explore serene rural areas. Enjoy scenic picnic spots or visit local cafes for a delightful meal, making this outing truly memorable.

tours.name: Three Hour Rental
tours.description: Experience the charm of Den Haag's waterways with a 3-hour canoe adventure! Paddle through the historic center, marveling at its unique architecture and bridges, or explore serene rural areas. Enjoy scenic picnic spots or visit local cafes for a delightful break, making this a memorable way to discover the city.

tours.name: Four Hour Rental
tours.description: Experience the charm of Den Haag's waterways with a 4-hour canoe adventure! Glide through the historic center, marveling at its blend of old and modern architecture. Enjoy scenic stops for picnics or explore local cafes. This unique journey offers a perfect mix of relaxation and exploration in a picturesque setting.

tours.name: Day Rental
tours.description: Experience the charm of Den Haag's waterways with a canoe rental adventure! Paddle through the city's historic center, marvel at its unique architecture, and explore serene rural areas. Enjoy leisurely breaks at picturesque spots for a picnic or visit local cafes, making this a memorable day on the water.

tours.name: Amsterdam Close-up Magic Show | Nov 27
tours.description: Enjoy a 2-hour night of world-class magic and comedy in Amsterdam’s historic Jordaan. Watch top magicians perform hilarious tricks, mingle at the afterparty, and experience unforgettable entertainment just minutes from iconic sights.

tours.name: CITY OF FREEDOM Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam's rich tapestry of freedom on this unique 1.5-hour tour. Discover hidden art spaces, a special coffeeshop, and a street-art garden while engaging with local change makers. Delve into the city's history and vibrant multicultural present, all while supporting local businesses and initiatives that shape Amsterdam's future.

tours.name: TOLERANCE & MIGRATION Tour
tours.description: Discover the vibrant multicultural tapestry of Amsterdam East on this insightful 2.5-hour tour. Explore the historical and contemporary narratives of tolerance, migration, and racism, visiting significant sites like the Holocaust memorial and the community center Meevaart. Engage in meaningful discussions while supporting local initiatives that promote harmony and connection.

tours.name: COUNTERCULTURE Tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam's vibrant alternative culture at NDSM-Wharf, a former shipyard transformed into a creative hub. Explore art studios, meet local artists, and learn about the area's rich history and activism. This unique tour offers a glimpse into the future of creativity amidst a lively neighborhood filled with festivals and exhibitions.

tours.name: URBAN AGRICULTURE Tour
tours.description: Explore the hidden green gems of Amsterdam Oost on a captivating 2.5-hour tour that reconnects you with nature and community. Discover innovative urban farming practices while visiting unique gardens, including a permaculture project and a historic nature playground. Embrace sustainability and enjoy the beauty of city gardening in a concrete landscape.

tours.name: De oversteek van de Rijn – Dagtour
tours.description: Join an exclusive tour on March 25, 2023, to explore the pivotal events of the Rhine offensive. Experience the dramatic crossing near Wesel, supported by paratroopers, with expert guides. Enjoy a fully catered lunch and luxury coach transport, making this a memorable journey through history.

tours.name: [Academy] Workshop: Musical Improv Intensive
tours.description: Unleash your vocal potential in a 6-hour workshop mastering song structure, style, and character. Craft unforgettable choruses and create musical magic in a lively, hands-on session from 11AM to 5PM.

tours.name: Privé rondvaart 1 uur met High Tea a bordo
tours.description: Experience a delightful private boat tour featuring a luxurious high tea aboard. Savor homemade sweet and savory treats from Coffeelicious Bakery, crafted by Chef Joan. Choose from four charming boats and customize your experience, whether in elegant boxes or on a tiered stand. Enjoy a unique blend of scenic views and gourmet indulgence.

tours.name: MTB Kinderfeestje | Lage Vuursche 6+
tours.description: Experience an unforgettable children's party with our mountain biking adventure, perfect for groups of 4 to 9 kids aged 6 and up. Professional instructors guide them through thrilling rides, teaching essential biking techniques for safe riding. Reserve now for a memorable celebration in the beautiful Lage Vuursche!

tours.name: Double The Magic | Sep 18
tours.description: Enjoy a 2-hour night of mind-blowing magic and comedy in Amsterdam’s city center. Watch world-class magicians perform hilarious tricks and mind reading, all in a lively theater near the Anne Frank house.

tours.name: Join Waitlist - Open group cooking classes
tours.description: Join the waitlist for popular cooking classes—get notified if a spot opens up before your preferred date. Keep an eye out for new sessions and turn your culinary dreams into reality.

tours.name: Private Canal Cruise with Drinks and Snacks
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before on a private 90-minute canal cruise. Enjoy stunning views of iconic landmarks while sipping unlimited drinks and savoring traditional Dutch snacks. With a local skipper sharing captivating stories, this cozy boat tour promises unforgettable memories as you explore the city's beautiful waterways. Don't miss out!

tours.name: Private luxury cruise with drinks & silent disco
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam's enchanting canals on a private 90-minute boat tour with friends. Enjoy unlimited drinks and a local guide as you glide past iconic sights like the Wester Church and Margere Brug. Elevate your adventure with an optional silent disco, dancing under the stars while keeping the noise down.

tours.name: Guided Canal Cruise
tours.description: Embark on a unique 75-minute canal cruise in Amsterdam, where you can sip unlimited drinks while soaking in stunning views of historic architecture and iconic waterways. With insightful commentary from your skipper, this relaxing experience starts and ends at Leidseplein, perfect for further city exploration.

tours.name: Lingerie Workshop Series 2.0: Wired Bra - Summer Edition
tours.description: Create your own underwire bra and matching lingerie in a hands-on workshop with expert designers. Learn fitting, sewing techniques, and leave with a personalized set of beautiful, custom-made lingerie.

tours.name: Amsterdam Histórico
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam like never before with the unique FREE TOUR, where you choose the topics that intrigue you most. Explore the city’s stunning sites while diving into its rich history and culture. Tailor your adventure to uncover the truth behind its famous landmarks, ensuring unforgettable stories to share.

tours.name: Barrio Rojo
tours.description: Explore the intriguing history of Amsterdam's most controversial neighborhood on this eye-opening 1.5-hour tour. Delve into the realities of legalized prostitution, uncover hidden stories, and learn about the district's unique landmarks. This respectful and informative experience promises to challenge perceptions and deepen your understanding of a complex social issue.

tours.name: II Guerra Mundial y Ana Frank
tours.description: Embark on a poignant journey through Amsterdam, exploring the profound impact of World War II and the haunting legacy of Anne Frank. Visit key historical sites, uncover stories of resistance, and reflect on the values of identity and humanity. This immersive tour offers a unique perspective on a pivotal moment in history.

tours.name: 40min Privé Intro Clinic | 2-4 pers.
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking with a 40-minute Private Clinic in Lage Vuursche! Tailored for all skill levels, this session includes expert guidance to enhance your techniques. Afterward, explore scenic trails on high-quality bikes. Embrace adventure and nature in this unforgettable biking experience! Book your spot today!

tours.name: 40min Privé Intro Clinic | 5-15 pers.
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking with a 40-minute Private Clinic tailored to your skill level, led by an expert instructor. After honing your techniques, explore scenic trails on high-quality bikes. Perfect for all riders, this adventure in the stunning nature of Lage Vuursche promises excitement and unforgettable memories.

tours.name: 40min Privé Intro Clinic | 16-120 pers.
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking with a 40-minute Private Clinic in Lage Vuursche. Tailored for all skill levels, you'll receive expert guidance to enhance your techniques before exploring scenic trails on high-quality bikes. Enjoy a memorable adventure in nature, perfect for both beginners and seasoned riders alike.

tours.name: You’ll Never Walk Alone
tours.description: Embark on a delightful 2.5-hour winter walk through Rotterdam's city center, perfect for solo explorers or those seeking company. Discover local culinary gems as you savor delicious snacks from various entrepreneurs. Enjoy a printed route magazine and a unique Rotterdam bag, ensuring a memorable and tasty adventure!

tours.name: Cucina Povera up to 20
tours.description: Experience a unique company outing with a cooking workshop in Amsterdam, where you'll dive into 'Cucina Povera' and learn to create delicious Italian dishes. Perfect for team building, this hands-on event allows groups to master culinary skills, including fresh pasta making, while enjoying a delightful three- or four-course meal.

tours.name: Corporate Cucina Povera 4 Hours - Keizersgracht
tours.description: Experience a unique company outing with a cooking workshop in Amsterdam, where you'll dive into 'Cucina Povera' and learn to create delicious Italian dishes. Perfect for team building, this hands-on experience allows you to master fresh pasta and other culinary skills while enjoying a delightful three- or four-course meal.

tours.name: Cucina Povera 3 course - Jordaan
tours.description: Experience a unique company outing with a cooking workshop in Amsterdam, where you'll dive into 'Cucina Povera' and transform simple ingredients into exquisite dishes. Learn to make fresh pasta and enjoy a delightful Italian menu, perfect for team building and culinary skill enhancement, accommodating up to 120 participants.

tours.name: Cucina Povera 4 course - Jordaan
tours.description: Experience a unique company outing with a cooking workshop in Amsterdam, where you'll master the art of 'Cucina Povera.' Learn to create fresh pasta and enjoy a delicious Italian menu tailored for your group. Perfect for team building, this hands-on culinary adventure promises fun and skill-building for all levels.

tours.name: Classique Française up to 20
tours.description: Join the Classique Français cooking workshop in Amsterdam for a delightful 4-hour journey into the heart of French cuisine. Learn classic techniques while preparing iconic dishes like Soupe à l’Oignon and Tarte Tatin, all using local ingredients. Perfect for enhancing culinary skills and fostering team spirit, this experience is unforgettable!

tours.name: Classique Française 3 course - Jordaan
tours.description: Embark on a culinary journey through French cuisine in the heart of Amsterdam! Enjoy a delightful three-course meal featuring steak tartare, entrecôte with béarnaise sauce, and the exquisite tarte Tatin. Perfect for team-building events, this experience promises to tantalize your taste buds with refined flavors and fresh ingredients.

tours.name: Classique Française 4 course - Jordaan
tours.description: Embark on a culinary journey through French cuisine in the heart of Amsterdam! Savor four exquisite courses, including steak tartare, classic onion soup, and a sumptuous entrecôte with Bearnaise sauce, topped off with the elegant Poire Belle-Hélène. Perfect for all skill levels, this experience promises to delight your palate.

tours.name: 3 Hours - Keizersgracht
tours.description: Embark on a culinary journey through French cuisine in the heart of Amsterdam! Enjoy a delightful 3-course meal featuring iconic dishes like steak tartare and entrecôte with Bearnaise sauce, culminating in the exquisite Poire Belle-Hélène dessert. Perfect for all levels, this experience promises to tantalize your taste buds!

tours.name: Workshop Vegan Inspired By Ottolenghi - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join a 4-hour vegan workshop inspired by Ottolenghi’s Middle Eastern flavors. Learn professional knife skills, create six vibrant recipes, and enjoy a shared, healthy feast of salads, veggie pies, burgers, and saffron panna cotta.

tours.name: Sewing Workshop Series: Basics Bundle (Amsterdam West)
tours.description: Join a structured sewing course over 16 evenings to master techniques like seams, zippers, pockets, and collars. Learn step-by-step with expert guidance, all tools provided, plus a helpful booklet and tasty treats. Perfect for beginners.

tours.name: Workshop Vegan Inspired By Ottolenghi - Amersfoort
tours.description: Join a captivating 4-hour workshop inspired by Yotam Ottolenghi, where you'll master professional cutting techniques and explore vibrant Middle Eastern flavors. Create six delicious plant-based dishes, from Moroccan-inspired carpaccio to panna cotta with saffron. Enjoy your culinary creations in a shared dinner, making this a unique and memorable experience.

tours.name: Workshop Vegan Curries - Amsterdam
tours.description: Join the Vegan Curries workshop at the Vegan Academy for a flavorful journey into plant-based cooking! Learn to create mouthwatering curries like Korma and Green Thai, master homemade naan, and discover the secrets of spices. Enjoy a delicious meal of your creations and take home recipes to impress loved ones.

tours.name: Workshop Vegan Italian Food - Amsterdam
tours.description: Learn to make delicious vegan Italian dishes like ravioli, lasagna, and tiramisu in just 4 hours. Master pasta techniques, plant-based substitutes, and enjoy a shared meal. Take home recipes and discounts on online courses.

tours.name: Workshop Vegan Italian Food - Amersfoort
tours.description: Join the Vegan Academy for a 3.5-hour workshop that transforms classic Italian dishes into delicious vegan versions. Learn to make fresh pasta, ravioli, lasagna, and more, while enjoying a meal of your creations. Take home recipes and gain skills to impress friends and family with your newfound culinary expertise.

tours.name: Een daghuur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking in the stunning Veluwe region with our top-quality bikes. Perfect for all skill levels, our service includes convenient bike delivery to the trailhead. Enjoy a seamless adventure surrounded by nature, with expert guidance and reliable equipment ensuring an unforgettable ride.

tours.name: 2 dagen verhuur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking in the stunning Veluwe region with our top-quality bikes, perfect for all skill levels. Enjoy hassle-free service as we deliver and collect your bike right at the trailhead. Explore breathtaking landscapes and create unforgettable memories, all while riding through scenic routes in Harderwijk and Ermelo.

tours.name: 3 dagen verhuur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking in the stunning Veluwe region! Rent high-quality bikes for a day and explore scenic trails, whether you're a beginner or an expert. Enjoy personalized bike fitting and local route guidance, all starting from a convenient location near the forest. Adventure awaits!

tours.name: 4 dagen verhuur
tours.description: Embark on an exhilarating mountain biking adventure in the stunning Veluwe region! Rent high-quality bikes and explore scenic trails, whether you're a beginner or an experienced rider. Enjoy personalized service with bike adjustments and local route insights, all starting from a convenient location near the forest. Unleash your adventurous spirit!

tours.name: 5 dagen verhuur
tours.description: Embark on an exhilarating mountain biking adventure in the stunning Veluwe region! Rent high-quality bikes tailored for all skill levels, with expert guidance and route recommendations. Start your journey at a convenient location near scenic trails, ensuring an unforgettable experience in nature. Discover the thrill of mountain biking today!

tours.name: 6 dagen verhuur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking in the stunning Veluwe region! Rent high-quality bikes and explore scenic trails, whether you're a beginner or an expert. Enjoy personalized bike adjustments and local route insights right at the forest's edge. With convenient pickup and drop-off, your adventure awaits just minutes from the trails!

tours.name: 7 dagen verhuur
tours.description: Experience the thrill of mountain biking in the stunning Veluwe region! Rent high-quality bikes and explore scenic trails, whether you're a beginner or an expert. Enjoy personalized bike adjustments and local route guidance, all starting from a convenient location. Unleash your adventurous spirit and create unforgettable memories in nature!

tours.name: Plant Power: Fermentatie & Smaak - 2 daags - Amersfoort
tours.description: Join the Vegan Academy's two-day PLANT POWER workshop on November 17, 2024, to explore innovative plant-based cooking techniques. Learn about fermentation, conservation, and the science behind umami flavors with expert chefs. Engage in hands-on cooking, discover unique recipes, and elevate your culinary skills while embracing a sustainable future.

tours.name: Customized Tour
tours.description: Experience the Grand Dutch Food Tour and explore a variety of customizable private food tours tailored to your preferences. Our knowledgeable guides, who also specialize in art and history, ensure a seamless experience. Enjoy added services like museum tickets and bike rentals, allowing you to focus solely on the enjoyment.

tours.name: The Oyster P&P Tour
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable adventure with friends and family as you harvest fresh oysters from expansive beds. Learn the art of picking and cleaning oysters, then savor your catch at a fantastic restaurant, prepared just the way you like. Experience the thrill of farm-to-table dining like never before!

tours.name: Bridgerton Style Dinner Trip
tours.description: Indulge in a day of royal pampering with an exclusive ‘Bridgerton’-style dining experience at a stunning castle. Enjoy haute cuisine amidst opulence, complete with elegant dress rentals to enhance your regal transformation. This unforgettable event in the last week of September promises a unique escape into a world of grandeur.

tours.name: SUPboard huren
tours.description: Experience the thrill of stand-up paddleboarding with high-quality boards from STX and Naish, perfect for beginners and seasoned paddlers alike. Enjoy a range of rental options from one hour to a full day, complete with paddles and safety gear. Explore the beautiful waters of Loosdrecht at your own pace!

tours.name: Grote SUPboard huren
tours.description: Experience the thrill of stand-up paddleboarding at SUPcentre Loosdrecht! Choose from one-hour, three-hour, or full-day rentals, complete with all necessary gear. Glide across serene waters while enjoying stunning views, and customize your adventure with optional add-ons like wetsuits and meals. Perfect for both beginners and seasoned paddlers!

tours.name: Sail Yourself - Luxury Open Boat
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable adventure sailing the Zaan area in a beautiful Dutch sloop! With no license required, you can enjoy the freedom of steering your own boat. Perfect for all ages, this experience includes a coolbox for your refreshments and accommodates up to eight passengers for a memorable day on the water.

tours.name: Taste of Jordaan Public Food Tour
tours.description: Taste top Dutch treats at six spots in Jordaan, a historic neighborhood along canals. Discover hidden gems, meet generations of locals, and enjoy a 3.5-hour journey into Amsterdam’s rich history and flavors.

tours.name: Taste of Jordaan Private Food Tour
tours.description: Taste Dutch delights at six top spots in Jordaan, explore hidden gems, and sip at a 400-year-old café. Enjoy a personalized 3.5-hour tour blending food, history, and local stories in Amsterdam.

tours.name: Amsterdam's Latin Quarter: De Pijp Food Tour
tours.description: Taste Amsterdam’s rich heritage in a 3.5-hour tour through De Pijp, visiting six family-run spots, sampling local and international flavors, and exploring historic streets and Europe's oldest market.

tours.name: Private: Amsterdam's Latin Quarter: De Pijp Food Tour
tours.description: Taste Amsterdam’s rich heritage in a 3.5-hour private tour through De Pijp, visiting family-run spots, savoring Dutch pancakes, and exploring Europe's oldest market—an unforgettable flavor-filled journey.

tours.name: Taste of Brews & Bites Private Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s rich beer heritage with a private 3.5-hour tour. Taste 52 Dutch taps, learn local stories, and enjoy unique brews at historic venues, all with a small group and expert guide.

tours.name: Sips & Sorcery
tours.description: Enjoy a 2-hour night of world-class magic and comedy in Amsterdam’s city center, featuring top international magicians and hilarious surprises that will leave you amazed and laughing all evening.

tours.name: Pure Dutch up to 20
tours.description: Discover the rich flavors of Dutch cuisine in a hands-on cooking workshop in the heart of Amsterdam. Learn to create traditional dishes like Frisian nail cheese and mustard soup, while enjoying the warmth of Dutch hospitality. Perfect for all skill levels, this experience promises culinary delight and memorable moments.

tours.name: Sunset SUP
tours.description: Glide through Hoorn’s sunset skyline on a stand-up paddleboard, guided by a pro. Feel the evening breeze and watch the city glow as you paddle along, creating unforgettable memories on the water.

tours.name: Volle maan SUP Tour
tours.description: Experience the magic of paddling under the full moon on a unique SUP tour in Hoorn. Join us Wednesday evening at 8:30 PM for a memorable journey through the illuminated waters, starting from the WSV harbor. Don’t miss this enchanting adventure that combines nature and tranquility!

tours.name: Traditional Canal Cruise with Guide - Location Anne Frank
tours.description: Experience the magic of Amsterdam's canals with KINboat's cozy, heated cruise. In just one hour, explore iconic landmarks like the Anne Frank House and Westerkerk, guided by an expert captain. Enjoy multilingual storytelling and refreshing beverages as you create unforgettable memories in this enchanting city. Book your adventure today!

tours.name: Pure Dutch - Request / Offerte
tours.description: Embark on a culinary adventure in Amsterdam with a unique 4-hour cooking workshop focused on traditional Dutch cuisine. Discover classic dishes like Frisian nail cheese and Texel lamb while enhancing your culinary skills. Enjoy the warmth of Dutch hospitality and create memorable flavors that celebrate Holland's rich culinary heritage.

tours.name: Gelato Making Workshop
tours.description: Dive into the art of gelato-making in this engaging 2-hour class! Learn from expert Gelato Chefs, explore the ingredients and pasteurization process, and create two unique flavors—one milk-based and one vegan. Enjoy a behind-the-scenes tour, meet the team, and indulge in a delightful gelato tasting experience.

tours.name: V1 & V2 Vergeldingswapens in Overijssel – Dagtour
tours.description: Embark on a captivating battlefield tour starting at 09:30 in Ommen, where you'll explore the history of the V1 and V2 weapons. Visit launch sites in Hessum, Mataram, Dalzicht, and Hellendoorn, and uncover the chilling stories behind these terror-inducing missiles while discovering remnants in the stunning Sallandse hills.

tours.name: Nutty Anita x Amsterdam Magic Show | Dec 20
tours.description: Laugh, gasp, and marvel at a hilarious magic show in Amsterdam featuring Fritz with a Z, international acts, and quirky host Ken Parsons—an unforgettable night of tricks, jokes, and surprises you can't miss.

tours.name: Sup Huren
tours.description: Experience the thrill of stand-up paddleboarding with Sup Huren Harderwijk! Rent a high-quality board and paddle to explore the stunning Wolderwijd and Veluwemeer lakes, or glide through the charming historic harbor of Harderwijk. This unique adventure promises unforgettable views and a refreshing way to connect with nature.

tours.name: XXL Sup Huren
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable adventure with friends, colleagues, or family on the XXL Sup! Each participant receives a paddle as you navigate together, testing your teamwork and coordination. This unique experience promises laughter and bonding as you paddle through the water, creating lasting memories along the way.

tours.name: Anne Frank and Amsterdam Jewish History Walking Tour
tours.description: Embark on a poignant 1.5-hour journey through Amsterdam's Jewish history, tracing the footsteps of Anne Frank and others during WWII. Explore the city's resilience, the February Strike, and the Winter of Hunger, culminating in a reflective visit to the Anne Frank House district, guided by a knowledgeable local expert.

tours.name: Indofoodtour vega-editie (te voet)
tours.description: Embark on a unique vegetarian Indofood tour in The Hague, where you'll explore multiple eateries and discover the city's rich Indonesian culinary heritage. With four delicious stops, this walking adventure combines tasty food with fascinating insights, making it a memorable experience for food lovers and culture enthusiasts alike.

tours.name: Ontdek West Binnendoor
tours.description: Experience Rotterdam like never before with the 'Ontdek West Binnendoor' city walk. Explore at your own pace, discovering local businesses and vibrant street art along the way. Immerse yourself in the lively atmosphere of the city center and uncover hidden gems that make this urban adventure truly unforgettable.

tours.name: Amsterdam City Introduction Tour
tours.description: Discover Amsterdam's rich history and culture on this engaging 1.5-hour walking tour. Stroll through picturesque canals and historic neighborhoods, uncovering hidden gems along the way. With an expert guide sharing captivating stories, you'll experience the city's unique charm and vibrant atmosphere, making this an unforgettable introduction to the Dutch capital.

tours.name: Anne Frank Walking Tour Including House Tickets
tours.description: Embark on a poignant 1.5-hour journey through Amsterdam, exploring its rich Jewish heritage and culminating at the iconic Anne Frank House. Led by knowledgeable guides, this tour offers deep insights into Anne's life and the era, making it a heartfelt tribute to resilience and history. Secure your spot for this unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Luxe Sloep
tours.description: Embark on a personalized private boat cruise through Harlem, tailored for groups of up to 24. Experience the vibrant atmosphere and scenic waters while enjoying the company of friends or colleagues. Enhance your journey with a variety of catering options, ensuring an unforgettable adventure that will be cherished for years to come.

tours.name: Gewoon ontspannen en cruisen
tours.description: Embark on a tranquil 75-minute cruise through Harlem's picturesque canals with our friendly skipper. Relax and soak in stunning views while enjoying your favorite drinks on board. This unique experience offers a perfect blend of serenity and beauty, making it a memorable way to explore Harlem's enchanting waterways. Reserve your spot today!

tours.name: Haarlem Culinair
tours.description: Embark on a unique culinary journey with the Haarlem Culinair boat tour! Enjoy 90 minutes of scenic views along Haarlem's charming canals, guided by a friendly skipper. Savor a selection of complimentary drinks and indulge in five curated culinary stops showcasing the best local snacks. Don't miss this unforgettable experience!

tours.name: Divet Drag Show
tours.description: A dazzling one-man show at Amsterdam Pride, where Marko Vainio transforms into over 30 global icons with fierce looks, stunning lip syncs, and shimmering costumes. An unforgettable night of glamour, humor, and star power.

tours.name: [Academy] Musical Improv Elective: Singing in Character & Style
tours.description: Create spontaneous songs in jazz, rock, country, and more, shaping each tune with character, emotion, and storytelling. Boost your improvisation skills and deliver unforgettable, style-switching performances.

tours.name: [Academy] Guest Workshop: Get Out of Your Head
tours.description: Join Luke Null, ex-SNL star, for an improv workshop that pushes you to let go of overthinking. Dive into fun, spontaneous exercises and leave with a freer, more instinctive performance—so immersive, you'll forget your head!

tours.name: The Famous Boom Chicago Improv Comedy Show
tours.description: Laugh out loud at Boom Chicago, Amsterdam’s top improv comedy spot. Enjoy fast-paced sketches, live music, and a talented cast, all while relaxing at your table with drinks. Witness comedy history in the making!

tours.name: Walking Tour Seville Jewish Quarter
tours.description: Discover the enchanting Jewish Quarter of Seville with Camaleon Tours! This captivating journey unveils the rich history and charm of the neighborhood, where each alley and corner reveals fascinating stories. Immerse yourself in the essence of Jewish Seville through the insights of our knowledgeable guides.

tours.name: Kids Summer Sewing Sessions
tours.description: Kids aged 7-12 can craft their own clothing over four fun summer days, learning sewing, fabric dyeing, upcycling, and more with a professional designer. All materials included—creativity and confidence guaranteed.

tours.name: Private Anne Frank and Jewish City Walking Tour
tours.description: Embark on a poignant 1.5-hour journey through Amsterdam's Jewish history, tracing the footsteps of Anne Frank and others during WWII. Explore the city's resilience, learn about the February Strike, and reflect at the Anne Frank House district, guided by a local expert. Experience the powerful stories that shaped our world.

tours.name: Private Anne Frank Walking Tour Including House Tickets
tours.description: Embark on a poignant 1.5-hour journey through Amsterdam, exploring its rich Jewish heritage and culminating at the iconic Anne Frank House. Led by knowledgeable guides, this deeply moving tour offers invaluable insights into Anne's life and the era, making it a memorable tribute to resilience and history.

tours.name: Walking city tour in Rotterdam
tours.description: Uncover Rotterdam’s transformation from ruins to a vibrant hub of innovation, architecture, and culture. Walk through iconic sites, explore modern design, and hear stories of resilience, progress, and community in this dynamic city tour.

tours.name: A Technology Demonstration
tours.description: Step into a mysterious jazz-age world blending live music, magic, and sci-fi secrets. Explore three immersive rooms, enjoy drinks, and uncover hidden truths—an unforgettable 2.5-hour journey into the future and past.

tours.name: E-Bike Verhuur Watertorenweg
tours.description: Experience the stunning Veluwe by renting a high-quality electric bike for a day. Choose from two convenient pickup locations and explore the beautiful nature at your own pace. With reliable bikes offering up to 120 kilometers of range, enjoy a memorable adventure tailored for individuals, couples, or groups.

tours.name: E-Bike Verhuur Wellenpad
tours.description: Experience the stunning Veluwe on an electric bike, available for daily rental from two scenic locations. Enjoy high-quality, well-maintained bikes that can travel up to 120 kilometers. With personal service and convenient pick-up options, explore the beautiful nature around Harderwijk and Ermelo at your own pace.

tours.name: Varende kumpulan
tours.description: Sail for 4 hours with unlimited drinks, lively music, and a delicious Indonesian dinner, immersing yourself in a vibrant, memorable evening on the water.

tours.name: Infinity Island Rental (Weekends)
tours.description: Transform your boat with the Infinity Island—an inflatable 4x2m platform perfect for sunbathing, yoga, or mooring your jet ski. Includes a swim ladder and easy connection to the Infinity Pool boat.

tours.name: Infinity Island Rental (Mid-week)
tours.description: Transform your boat with the Infinity Island—an inflatable 4x2m platform perfect for sunbathing, yoga, or mooring your jet ski. Includes a swim ladder and easy connection to the Infinity Pool boat for endless fun.

tours.name: Infinity Island Rental (Full Week)
tours.description: Transform your boat into a floating paradise with the 4x2m Infinity Island—perfect for sunbathing, yoga, or mooring your jet ski. Includes a swim ladder and easy connection to the Infinity Pool boat.

tours.name: Infinity Scooter Rental (Full Day)
tours.description: Glide effortlessly with this powerful infinity scooter, diving up to 30 meters deep and floating freely. Two batteries, snorkel gear, and a lightweight design make your underwater adventure unforgettable.

tours.name: Infinity Scooter Rental (Full Week)
tours.description: Glide effortlessly with this sleek infinity scooter, powered by dual 500W motors. Dive up to 30 meters deep, float across the water, and enjoy 80 minutes of adventure—perfect for exploring underwater wonders.

tours.name: De Canadese bevrijding | 80 jaar vrijheid
tours.description: Experience the poignant history of the liberation of the Netherlands on May 5, 1945, by the First Canadian Army. April, known as 'the Sweetest Spring,' was a month of both hope and brutality, marking the end of a long struggle with fierce battles continuing even as victory was near.

tours.name: Amsterdam Bike Tour
tours.description: Experience Amsterdam's cycling revolution on a guided bike tour through its innovative urban landscape. Explore key sites, engage with cycling experts, and challenge your perceptions of cycling infrastructure. This unique excursion offers insights into best practices and the future of mobility, making it perfect for curious minds eager to inspire change in their own cities.

tours.name: Alternative Amsterdam Gallery Bike Tour
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam’s hidden street art spots, from murals to galleries and secret corners. Led by passionate guides, uncover the city’s vibrant art scene and its stories on this immersive, offbeat bike tour.

tours.name: Mobility Equipment Rental - Scooters
tours.description: Experience hassle-free travel in Amsterdam by renting mobility aids tailored to your needs. Enjoy the convenience of having wheelchairs, scooters, and more delivered directly to your hotel. Avoid the stress of transporting equipment and focus on making unforgettable memories during your stay in the Netherlands. Book in advance for the best selection!

tours.name: Mobility Equipment Rental - Walkers & Wheelchairs
tours.description: Experience hassle-free travel in Amsterdam with convenient mobility aid rentals delivered directly to your hotel. Choose from a wide range of equipment, including wheelchairs and scooters, allowing you to explore without the burden of transporting your own gear. Enjoy a tailored solution for your mobility needs during your stay.

tours.name: Mobility Equipment Rental - Shower Chairs
tours.description: Experience hassle-free travel in Amsterdam with convenient mobility aid rentals delivered directly to your hotel. Avoid the burden of transporting personal equipment and choose from a wide range of high-quality products, including wheelchairs and scooters. Enjoy your trip with ease, knowing the right support is just a reservation away.

tours.name: [Academy] Workshop: Diagnostics
tours.description: Hone your improv skills with targeted diagnostics that reveal what works and what doesn’t. Elevate your scenes with sharper timing, purpose, and fun—perfect for performers eager to boost their improvisation game.

tours.name: Laugh Out Proud
tours.description: Celebrate queer joy with a glittering 1970s-inspired holiday show full of comedy, music, and heartfelt moments. Join us for a lively night of fun, laughter, and unapologetic self-expression.

tours.name: Grupo Di Betico ★ LIVE!
tours.description: Experience the vibrant rhythms of Aruba as Grupo Di Betico, the island's iconic folkloric band, takes the stage in the Netherlands. Enjoy a captivating 2.5-hour performance featuring a dynamic string and brass orchestra, all while adhering to a suggested dress code for an unforgettable evening of music and culture.

tours.name: Grupo Di Betico ★ LIVE! [MGE]
tours.description: Experience the vibrant sounds of Grupo Di Betico, Aruba's iconic folkloric band, as they bring their unique pop-style concert to the Netherlands. Enjoy an unforgettable 2.5-hour performance filled with lively music and energy, all from the comfort of your seat. Don't miss this chance to celebrate Aruba's rich musical heritage!

tours.name: [Community Night] Comedy Lab
tours.description: Step into the Comedy Lab, where bold improv, hybrid sketches, and stand-up experiments push comedy to new heights. Witness fresh, fearless humor born from creative chaos—maybe even the next big Boom Chicago hit.

tours.name: [Community Night] Indie Night
tours.description: Laugh with top Dutch indie comedy teams, enjoy fresh acts, a star headliner, and a lively long-form jam—all in English. A night of spontaneous humor and unexpected surprises awaits you.

tours.name: [Community Night] It Takes Two: Comedy Duo Night
tours.description: Laugh out loud with "It Takes Two," where comedy duos deliver double the fun. Join us the first Friday of each month at 7PM for a night of hilarious chemistry and unforgettable performances.

tours.name: [Community Night] Tell Amsterdam: Storytelling Night
tours.description: Step into a lively evening of real stories told live on stage, each month exploring a new theme. Join *Tell Amsterdam* on the final Friday at 7 PM for an authentic, captivating storytelling experience in English.

tours.name: [Community Night] Tight Five: Boom's Open Mic
tours.description: Laugh along with Amsterdam’s rising comedians at *Tight Five*, a lively open mic showcasing fresh jokes and bold talent every first Friday. Experience the thrill of new comedy in a vibrant, English-speaking setting.

tours.name: Milieujutten JutXL
tours.description: Join a two-hour eco-ride along Terschelling’s coast, picking up plastic and helping keep the North Sea clean. Experience the thrill of making a difference while enjoying a scenic journey on a historic horse-drawn carriage.

tours.name: Op ‘e riid met Rients en Flang
tours.description: Ride in a traditional carriage to Boschplaat with stories from Rients and island flavors. Enjoy pofkes, baked fish, drinks, and scenic views on a charming 3-hour trip starting in Hoorn.

tours.name: Avondtocht te paard
tours.description: Race along the quiet North Sea beach at sunset, feeling the cool breeze and golden light. This two-hour evening ride in galop offers a peaceful, exhilarating escape—experience required for this unforgettable adventure.

tours.name: Ruiterweekend op Terschelling
tours.description: Ervaar een onvergetelijk paardrij-weekend met je ruiterclub, ponyclub of vrienden! Geniet van spannende ritten, samenhorigheid en de schoonheid van de natuur. Dit unieke avontuur biedt de perfecte gelegenheid om herinneringen te creëren en je passie voor paardrijden te delen met gelijkgestemden.

tours.name: Midwinter jutterstocht
tours.description: Ride through Terschelling’s stunning landscapes in a cozy horse-drawn carriage, wrapped in fleece blankets and sheepskins—warm, scenic, and perfect even in chilly weather.

tours.name: Arrenslee tocht
tours.description: Enjoy the enchanting sound of bells as you glide in a cozy horse-drawn carriage, with options for snowy Terschelling sleighs or Austrian-style rides, complete with warm drinks and plush blankets.

tours.name: [Summer Intensive] Take Your Improv to the Next Level: 5-Day Long-Form Intensive
tours.description: Elevate your improv skills in a 5-day intensive, mastering scene work, editing, and long-form formats. Perform live in a showcase, push boundaries, and unlock your full creative potential with expert guidance.

tours.name: Onderhoud op maandag
tours.description: On Mondays, the ship undergoes essential maintenance, ensuring a safe and enjoyable experience for future voyages. While sailing is paused, this behind-the-scenes glimpse into maritime care highlights the dedication to preserving the vessel's integrity, making it a unique opportunity to appreciate the craftsmanship of seafaring.

tours.name: Meeting Space Elandsstraat
tours.description: Discover two stunning venues in Amsterdam, perfect for corporate groups. Enjoy flexible options tailored to your needs, complete with Wi-Fi and presentation screens. Experience a unique blend of beauty and functionality, making your event memorable in a vibrant city setting.

tours.name: Club paintball
tours.description: Join us for an exhilarating day of paintball action! Starting with an engaging warm-up, participants will dive into two thrilling game sessions, perfect for both members and non-members. Experience the adrenaline rush and camaraderie as you strategize and compete in this unforgettable outdoor adventure.

tours.name: Custom Program
tours.description: Embark on a unique one-day journey through Amsterdam's urban innovation landscape. Experience insightful meetings, engaging site visits, and a walking tour of the Marineterrein Amsterdam Living Lab. Connect with like-minded individuals over a networking lunch, culminating in reflective discussions that deepen your understanding of the smart city ecosystem.

tours.name: Stoottroepen aan de Waal – Winter 1944/1945
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 3-hour Battlefield Tour in Groningen, where expert guides reveal the remnants of the fierce battles from April 1945. Explore significant sites, enriched with personal stories, original photos, and eyewitness accounts, making history come alive as you walk through the echoes of the past.

tours.name: Heineken® Flagship Walking Tour
tours.description: Uncover Amsterdam’s rich history and the story of Heineken in this lively 2-hour walk. End with two fresh beers on the rooftop, overlooking the city that inspired the iconic brewery.

tours.name: Public Luxury “Small Boat” Canal Cheese Cruise
tours.description: Browse a top cheese shop with a cheese expert, then relax on a luxury canal boat cruise. Savor a curated cheese board, learn about each cheese’s unique flavors, and enjoy drinks as you glide through Amsterdam’s scenic waterways.

tours.name: Heerlijk Lokaal Dordt
tours.description: Experience Dordrecht like never before on a unique 15-kilometer cycling adventure this autumn! Discover hidden gems and savor delicious local delicacies at charming spots, all while learning about the city's rich agricultural heritage. Join friends or family for an unforgettable day filled with flavors and history on October 21st!

tours.name: Tour privato e personalizzato
tours.description: Personalizza la tua visita ad Amsterdam con una guida dedicata! Invia un'email per scegliere la data, il numero di partecipanti e le attrazioni che desideri esplorare. Riceverai un preventivo su misura per un'esperienza unica e memorabile nella città dei canali.

tours.name: Tour privato per famiglie 'Caccia al tesoro'
tours.description: Embark on an exciting 90-minute adventure in Amsterdam with your children aged 6 to 11! Join a treasure hunt for the elusive pirate Jack, solving puzzles and exploring the city's unique architecture. This interactive tour combines fun and learning, ensuring a memorable experience for the whole family in a private setting.

tours.name: Zuurkooltochten
tours.description: Embark on a captivating 2-hour boat tour along the scenic NH canal. Experience the tranquility of the waterway as you soak in the picturesque views and discover the charm of the surrounding landscape. This unique journey offers a perfect blend of relaxation and exploration, making it a memorable outing.

tours.name: Sail Shared Drinks and Bites
tours.description: Experience a magical golden hour cruise with Starboard Boats, gliding through Amsterdam's iconic canals amidst the vibrant SAIL 2025 festivities. Savor gourmet bites and refreshing drinks as the majestic Tall Ships and their towering sails provide a breathtaking backdrop, making this an unforgettable afternoon of relaxation and excitement.

tours.name: SAIL 2025: Vattenfall
tours.description: Join a lively plastic fishing boat tour during SAIL 2025, sailing in IJmuiden or Amsterdam. Spot, collect, and clean plastic waste in just one hour—fun and impactful for all ages.

tours.name: For Families: Art & Activities at Albert Cuyp Market
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam’s lively Pijp neighborhood with a fun-filled family scavenger hunt, tasty market treats, creative art activities, and local stories—all led by a queer artist. Perfect for bonding and discovering together.

tours.name: [Academy] Meisner for Improviers Workshop
tours.description: Unlock your emotional truth and deepen your scenes with advanced improv techniques. Learn to listen, connect, and respond authentically in a supportive, hands-on environment over two inspiring days.

tours.name: Mike Wozniak: The Bench
tours.description: Mike Wozniak brings his sharp humor to The Bench, a hilarious story centered around a bench. No matter your opinions, prepare for a comedy show that will leave you laughing and thinking.

tours.name: Het Wilde Diner X Wilde Weide
tours.description: Join a guided wildpluk walk, gather fresh ingredients, and cook a delicious outdoor dinner over open fire. Enjoy homemade pizza, grilled veggies, and natural flavors in a scenic festival setting.

tours.name: Tricycle
tours.description: Rent a unique three-wheeled bike and explore the city with enhanced stability! Enjoy a full day of adventure from opening to closing time. Bring your ID and a good mood for an unforgettable experience as you navigate the sights at your own pace. Perfect for a fun day out!

tours.name: Smart City the Amsterdam Way
tours.description: Join a lively 90-minute session to explore how Amsterdam is shaping its future through innovative projects in energy, mobility, digital tech, and sustainability. Perfect for curious minds and change-makers alike.

tours.name: Digital City Deep Dive
tours.description: Explore how Amsterdam's digital revolution shapes our lives, revealing cutting-edge innovations and challenges in connectivity and data. Dive into the future of technology in just 2.5 hours.

tours.name: Agnetapark stadswandeling
tours.description: Discover the enchanting Agnetapark in Delft on a guided city walk that unveils the inspiring story of the Van Marken couple. This unique experience blends social history and remarkable architecture, perfect for those who appreciate tales of progress and strong, socially conscious individuals. Join us for a memorable journey!

tours.name: Architectuur stadswandeling Delft
tours.description: Discover the architectural wonders of Delft on a captivating 1.5-hour guided walking tour. Explore a blend of historic and modern buildings, uncovering hidden gems that even locals may not know. Perfect for architecture enthusiasts and curious minds alike, this unique experience offers a fresh perspective on the city's rich design heritage.

tours.name: Oranjestadswandeling
tours.description: Experience the rich history of the Dutch Royal Family on a captivating walking tour through Delft. Led by a private guide, explore significant sites connected to the Oranjes and immerse yourself in the fascinating stories that shaped the nation. Perfect for groups of up to 25, available daily at your convenience.

tours.name: Langs Delftse Meesters
tours.description: Experience the rich history of Delft during the Golden Age on a captivating 2-hour guided city walk. Discover the stories behind renowned painters like Vermeer and Rembrandt's student, Carel Fabritius, while exploring the very locations they immortalized in their art. A unique journey through time awaits you!

tours.name: Stadswandeling 'Ja zuster, nee zuster', verpleging en zorg in Delfts historie
tours.description: Explore Delft on a guided walking tour that reveals its rich history, from picturesque canals to the hidden streets of poverty. Discover the city's oldest hospital, learn about its medical pioneers, and visit Museum ‘De Griffioen’ to see rare medical artifacts. This unique journey offers a captivating glimpse into the past.

tours.name: Stadswandeling 'Ja zuster, nee zuster', verpleging en zorg in Delfts historie (copy)
tours.description: Discover Delft's rich history on a captivating VOC city walk, where you'll explore stunning historic buildings and hear intriguing tales of the first multinational. Experience the city's journey of prosperity and hidden sorrow, guided by a private expert. Join this unique adventure and immerse yourself in Delft's remarkable past!

tours.name: Rondleiding Nieuwe Kerk
tours.description: Discover the rich history of the Nieuwe Kerk in Delft, guided by an expert who reveals its secrets linked to Willem van Oranje. This unique experience also includes access to the stunning Oude Kerk, renowned for its stained glass and notable monuments. Join us for an engaging half-hour tour!

tours.name: VIP Dinner Package
tours.description: Enjoy a 4-course dinner at ACE with front-row Coqtales show seats, a welcome drink, and no queues—perfect for an unforgettable Amsterdam girls' night filled with fun, hot guys, and outrageous entertainment.

tours.name: Day Trip to Rotterdam and The Hague
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s innovative architecture and vibrant markets, then stroll through The Hague’s elegant streets, historic sites, and the Peace Palace on this 8-hour guided tour of South Holland’s top cities.

tours.name: GAYPRIDE
tours.description: Dance through a vibrant celebration at Disco DAISY's GAYPRIDE edition, where colorful lights and energetic beats create an unforgettable night of fun, freedom, and self-expression.

tours.name: Private Kingsday Cruise
tours.description: Join a 3-hour adventure for just €120, where you'll dive into exciting activities that thrill your senses and create unforgettable memories. Perfect for those seeking fun and adventure in a short time.

tours.name: Moederdag tour
tours.description: Celebrate Mother's Day in style at Royal Coster Diamonds! Enjoy a unique tour exploring the captivating world of diamonds, complete with a welcome drink, insights into the cutting process, and a chance to win stunning diamond necklaces. Leave with newfound expertise and a luxurious goodie bag for an unforgettable experience.

tours.name: Private 1 Hour Cruise | Experience | Starts from Starboard Dock
tours.description: Sail a luxury electric boat for an hour, enjoying drinks from the open bar with a friendly skipper and host. Relax in a clean, safe environment as you glide through the water and soak up the scenery.

tours.name: ERS Congress fietshuur
tours.description: Cycle through Amsterdam like a local on a stylish, eco-friendly bike. Reach the Jordaan and Negen Straatjes easily, guided by digital maps, while enjoying a comfortable ride that’s good for you and the planet.

tours.name: ESN Introduction Week Groningen
tours.description: Experience Groningen like never before during the ESN Introduction Week! Join fellow international students for a delightful boat tour through picturesque canals, complete with an open bar and music. This unique one-hour adventure, running from September 1st to 5th, is the perfect way to kick off your new journey!

tours.name: [Academy] Exploring Viewpoints
tours.description: Unlock your creativity with a 4-week Viewpoints improv course, blending movement, response, and awareness. Dive into playful scenework, characters, and ensemble techniques to boost spontaneity and fun.

tours.name: Andrés Parra “Venga que si es pa’ eso”
tours.description: Join Andrés Parra’s stand-up journey from pain to growth, blending humor, raw honesty, and reflections on fear, silence, and self-discovery. A powerful night of laughter and insight into overcoming life’s struggles.

tours.name: Standing tickets
tours.description: Secure your spot at the standing tickets bar area for a lively, energetic atmosphere where you can mingle, sip, and soak up the buzz of the crowd in a vibrant setting.

tours.name: Coqtales Eastern Ticket
tours.description: Enjoy a lively 1.5-hour night out with hot guys, delicious drinks, and outrageous fun. Savor a four-course meal before the top-rated all-male Coqtales show—Amsterdam’s unforgettable ladies’ entertainment.

tours.name: [Academy] "Get Out of Your Head" Longform Improv Workshop with Luke Null
tours.description: Unlock your flow with fun, stress-free improv rap! Learn to rhyme, punchline, and perform confidently in a relaxed setting—transform fear into freedom and boost your musical improv skills. No heavy pressure, just pure creativity.

tours.name: [Academy] Say Something: A Freestyle Rap Workshop
tours.description: Unleash your inner rapper with this fun, relaxed workshop. Learn to find your flow, rhyme confidently, and support others in a playful environment—no experience needed, just a willingness to create on the spot.

tours.name: Stephanie's Vriendinnen
tours.description: Laugh along with Sashi’s hilarious take on family, love, and geopolitics in her stand-up show "Pear Tree," blending sharp wit, international stories, and bizarre insights that keep you laughing from start to finish.

tours.name: Bootcampen op het Wad
tours.description: Experience an exhilarating 2-hour adventure on the stunning Wieringer Wad! Engage in a dynamic bootcamp session, followed by a refreshing cooldown. This unique program is perfect for team building, culminating in a delightful gathering with drinks and snacks. Bring your sporty attire and get ready for an unforgettable experience!

tours.name: Stadsfiets - 1 dag
tours.description: Experience the thrill of cycling through the city on a 7-speed city bike. Enjoy the freedom to explore urban landscapes with ease, making every ride a unique adventure. Whether you're commuting or leisurely sightseeing, this bike offers a smooth and enjoyable journey, perfect for discovering hidden gems in your surroundings.

tours.name: E-bike - 1 dag
tours.description: Experience the freedom of exploring on an electric bike, offering a range of 30 to 80 km. This unique adventure allows you to effortlessly traverse scenic routes, making every ride memorable and exhilarating. Enjoy the thrill of cycling without the strain, perfect for both leisurely outings and adventurous journeys.

tours.name: Bakfiets - 1 dag
tours.description: Experience the thrill of riding a three-wheeled electric cargo bike! This unique mode of transport combines stability and ease, making it perfect for family outings or running errands. Enjoy the freedom of exploring your surroundings while effortlessly carrying your belongings, all while reducing your carbon footprint.

tours.name: Arrenslee
tours.description: Experience the thrill of a beautiful horse-drawn sleigh ride! Glide through picturesque landscapes and embrace the magic of winter. This unique adventure promises unforgettable moments and a chance to connect with nature in a serene setting. Discover more about this enchanting experience at havefunevents.nl/arrenslee.

tours.name: NS combikaart 2 pers voor 1
tours.description: Experience a memorable outing by booking for two! Enjoy a unique opportunity to share an exciting adventure with a friend or loved one, creating lasting memories together. Don't miss out on this chance to bond and explore in a delightful setting designed for pairs.

tours.name: Van Gogh museum guided tour and entrance ticket (INGLESE)
tours.description: Join our engaging 1.5-hour guided tour led by our expert team, conducted in English. Experience a unique exploration filled with insights and stories that will enhance your understanding and appreciation of the site. Don’t miss this opportunity to discover something new in an interactive and informative setting.

tours.name: Meeting Space Keizersgracht
tours.description: Experience the charm of Amsterdam with two stunning venues perfect for corporate groups. Enjoy flexible options tailored to your needs, complete with WiFi and presentation screens. Whether for meetings or events, these beautifully located spaces offer a unique setting that will make your gathering truly memorable.

tours.name: Shopper
tours.description: Experience exclusive access to purchase surplus stock at unbeatable prices! Enjoy a visit to the museum, where you can immerse yourself in art and history, all while savoring complimentary coffee or tea. This unique opportunity combines shopping and culture for a memorable day out.

tours.name: Snack & Sup
tours.description: Experience the thrill of stand-up paddleboarding with our unique package! Rent a SUP complete with a paddle, and enjoy a refreshing drink alongside a delightful candy bar. Choose your favorites conveniently at our shop for a memorable day on the water filled with fun and tasty treats.

tours.name: Lunch & Sup
tours.description: Experience the perfect day on the water with a stand-up paddleboard rental, complete with a delightful lunch arrangement. Savor delicious sandwiches, a refreshing smoothie, and fresh fruit as you paddle. Don’t miss this unique opportunity to combine adventure and relaxation in a beautiful setting!

tours.name: Chikawono & Sup
tours.description: Enhance your stand-up paddleboarding adventure with the Chikawono package! Enjoy a SUP board and paddle while savoring delicious savory snacks on the water. This unique experience combines the thrill of paddling with delightful treats, making your outing truly memorable. Join us for an unforgettable day on the water!

tours.name: Amsterdam Morbid History Tour
tours.description: Explore Amsterdam's haunting past on a captivating morbid tour. Discover chilling stories of the plague, grim executions, and infamous crimes as you stroll through the eerie streets where history's darker moments occurred, revealing a unique and unsettling perspective of the city's rich heritage.

tours.name: Walking Tour Monumental Seville
tours.description: Discover the rich history and vibrant culture of Andalusia on a captivating journey from Seville to the enchanting cities of Córdoba and Carmona. Explore their timeless heritage and stunning architecture, making this excursion a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in the beauty and charm of these remarkable destinations.

tours.name: Amsterdam City Paddle
tours.description: Experience the thrill of paddling through Amsterdam's stunning waterways with expert instructors guiding you. This unique adventure combines the beauty of the city with the excitement of water sports, making it a memorable outing for both beginners and seasoned paddlers. Discover Amsterdam from a fresh perspective on the water!

tours.name: Non-Touristy Tulips, Windmill & Cheese Tasting (Half-Day Tour)
tours.description: Escape the crowds to Holland’s countryside: snap photos of vibrant tulip fields, visit historic bulb gardens, taste authentic Gouda cheese, explore windmills, and wander charming villages on a peaceful half-day adventure.

tours.name: 4 + 1 Gratis
tours.description: Experience the thrill of stand-up paddleboarding with professional instruction tailored to your skill level. Choose from 1, 2, or 5-hour sessions, and enjoy the freedom to explore stunning locations. This unique adventure promises unforgettable moments on the water, whether you're a beginner or an experienced paddler.

tours.name: Private Amsterdam Light Festival Cruise — Your Floating Living Room
tours.description: Join local Amsterdammers on a cozy, private boat to see the city’s hidden spots and the stunning Light Festival. Relax in a floating living room with warm drinks, stories, and exclusive views away from the crowds.

tours.name: Parque das Tulipas Keukenhof e Passeio de Barco pelos Canais
tours.description: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Holland on a 5.5-hour tour to the stunning Keukenhof Tulip Park. Enjoy round-trip transportation and optional audio guide in Portuguese. Enhance your adventure with a scenic canal cruise in Amsterdam, making this a memorable day filled with vibrant tulip fields and charming waterways.

tours.name: Kingsday Boat Tour Amsterdam | Shared + Private Tours
tours.description: Experience the vibrant celebration of Kingsday in Amsterdam, where the city transforms into a sea of orange. Join locals and visitors alike in lively street parties, unique markets, and festive parades, creating an unforgettable atmosphere filled with music, laughter, and a true sense of Dutch culture and community.

tours.name: Amsterdam Stopover Tour
tours.description: Skip the stress of layovers with a guided tour of Amsterdam’s highlights. In just a few hours, explore iconic sites like Dam Square, the Flower Market, and the Jordaan District. Longer options include visiting windmills, charming villages, or the stunning Keukenhof gardens—perfect for making your stop unforgettable.

tours.name: Three-hour Private Zaanse Schans & Windmills Tour
tours.description: Discover the enchanting Dutch countryside on a private 3-hour tour from Amsterdam. Visit the scenic Zaanse Schans, famous for its iconic windmills and charming wooden houses. With hotel pick-up and a knowledgeable guide, this personalized experience offers a delightful escape into the rich history and culture of Holland.

tours.name: Van Oosterbeek naar de Loowaard
tours.description: Join a scenic boat trip from Oosterbeek to Arnhem, then enjoy a ¾-hour guided walk through Loowaard’s wetlands, spotting birds and learning about river history amid lush, changing landscapes. An adventure in nature and culture.

tours.name: Day trip to Pueblos Blancos and Ronda Small Group
Mike, misc private
tours.description: Join Mike’s eclectic events for surprises, lively moments, and unforgettable fun. Dive into a mix of activities that keep the energy high and the good times rolling all day long.

tours.name: Private tour of The Hague & Rotterdam
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam and The Hague on a flexible, private 5-hour tour. Wander through historic streets, marvel at iconic architecture like Cube Houses, and visit royal palaces and government buildings. Enjoy personalized stories, insider tips, and a seamless transfer between cities—an unforgettable journey through two vibrant Dutch cities.

tours.name: Private full-day tour of Delft and Gouda
tours.description: Embark on a captivating full-day private tour through Delft and Gouda, two iconic Dutch towns rich in history. Stroll along serene canals, visit the Royal Delft Museum, and savor Gouda cheese while exploring medieval streets and stunning architecture. Enjoy personalized pacing and unique insights from your guide, making this experience truly memorable.

tours.name: Private full-day tour of Rotterdam & Delft
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s modern skyline and historic harbor by boat, then step back into Delft’s timeless streets, visiting Vermeer’s city, royal pottery, and charming squares—an unforgettable private day tour.

tours.name: Private Mauritshuis museum tour
tours.description: Explore Dutch Golden Age masterpieces like Vermeer and Rembrandt on a private, flexible tour. Enjoy personalized insights, ask questions, and dive into 17th-century art and culture in just one hour.

tours.name: Local Foodie Adventure in Amsterdam
tours.description: Taste Amsterdam’s vibrant food scene by visiting four top restaurants, sampling over eight delicious dishes and drinks, all with a local guide sharing insider secrets and culinary stories.

tours.name: Rotterdam Highlight Biketour - DUTCH
tours.description: Cycle through Rotterdam’s vibrant streets, uncover hidden gems and iconic sights with a lively guide. Enjoy a relaxed ride, fascinating stories, and scenic stops—rain or shine—on this memorable 2.5-hour adventure.

tours.name: Private tour of The Hague & Delft
tours.description: Explore The Hague and Delft in 4.5 hours with a private guide, visiting palaces, historic sites, and art treasures. Dive into Dutch history, from Vermeer to William of Orange, at your own pace.

tours.name: Private tour of Rotterdam & Delft
tours.description: Explore Rotterdam’s modern skyline and Delft’s historic charm in one half-day private tour. Wander cobbled streets, see iconic landmarks, and enjoy personalized pacing through two contrasting Dutch cities.

tours.name: Private full-day tour of The Hague, Delft & Rotterdam
tours.description: Embark on a captivating full-day private tour through The Hague, Delft, and Rotterdam, where history and modernity collide. Explore royal palaces, historic churches, and the stunning Cube Houses, all while a knowledgeable guide shares intriguing stories. Tailor the experience to your pace and uncover the Netherlands' rich cultural tapestry.

tours.name: Private walking tour of Delft + Royal Delft
tours.description: Stroll through Delft’s historic streets, uncover stories of Vermeer and Orange, then visit Royal Delft’s 17th-century factory to see authentic Delftware made by hand—an immersive journey into Dutch history and craftsmanship.

tours.name: Private walking tour of Gouda
tours.description: Explore Gouda’s medieval streets, canals, and historic landmarks with a private guide. Uncover stories behind the cheese, church, and town hall, all tailored to your interests in an engaging, relaxed 1.5-hour stroll.

tours.name: Private walking tour of Leiden
tours.description: Stroll through Leiden’s historic streets, visiting Rembrandt’s birthplace, the oldest university, and sites of heroic resistance. Uncover stories of art, science, and Dutch resilience in this personalized 1.5-hour tour.

tours.name: Private walking tour of Utrecht
tours.description: Uncover Utrecht’s rich history and lively spirit on a private walking tour. Wander charming canals, climb the tallest church tower, and explore hidden courtyards that reveal centuries of Dutch heritage.
